[READ MORE](https://iglesianicristo.net/cristiano-hindi-sa-pangalan-lamang/)Maraming tao ang nagsasabi na sila’y Cristiano, subalit itinuturo ng Biblia na ang pagiging tunay na tagasunod ni Cristo ay higit pa sa pangalan. [READ MORE](https://iglesianicristo.net/cristiano-hindi-sa-pangalan-lamang/)Walang pagtatangi ang Diyos sa taong ililigtas. Ang katunayan nito, ibig Niya na ang lahat ay maligtas. Subalit, niliwanag din ng Biblia na upang ang tao’y maligtas ay kailangang makarating siya sa pagkaalam ng katotohanan. Hindi mabigat ang kondisyong ito, at makatuwiran lamang na hanapin ng Diyos na matugunan ito ng tao. [WATCH NOW](https://iglesianicristo.net/ang-diyos-ay-hindi-nagtatangi-ng-tao/)Walang pagtatangi ang Diyos sa taong ililigtas. Ang katunayan nito, ibig Niya na ang lahat ay maligtas. Hindi mabigat ang kondisyong ito, at makatuwiran lamang na hanapin ng Diyos na matugunan ito ng tao. The Iglesia Ni Cristo was preached by Brother Felix Y. Manalo, God’s Messenger in these last days, and was registered in the Philippines on July 27, 1914.



READ MORE](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/history/)[Time is running out, time to get ready


“So always be ready, alert, and prepared, because at an hour when you’re not expecting him, the Son of Man will come.”




READ MORE](https://iglesianicristo.net/time-is-running-out-time-to-get-ready/)[Learn our socio-civic activities


Concerned with the welfare not only of its members but also of society in general, the Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) undertakes programs and projects in its various fields of endeavor, which are guided by and at the same time promote Christian values.

[READ MORE](https://iglesianicristo.net/cristiano-hindi-sa-pangalan-lamang/)Walang pagtatangi ang Diyos sa taong ililigtas. Ang katunayan nito, ibig Niya na ang lahat ay maligtas. Subalit, niliwanag din ng Biblia na upang ang tao’y maligtas ay kailangang makarating siya sa pagkaalam ng katotohanan. Hindi mabigat ang kondisyong ito, at makatuwiran lamang na hanapin ng Diyos na matugunan ito ng tao. [WATCH NOW](https://iglesianicristo.net/ang-diyos-ay-hindi-nagtatangi-ng-tao/)Walang pagtatangi ang Diyos sa taong ililigtas. Ang katunayan nito, ibig Niya na ang lahat ay maligtas. Hindi mabigat ang kondisyong ito, at makatuwiran lamang na hanapin ng Diyos na matugunan ito ng tao. [WATCH NOW](https://iglesianicristo.net/ang-diyos-ay-hindi-nagtatangi-ng-tao/)[Learn about our History


The Iglesia Ni Cristo was preached by Brother Felix Y. Manalo, God’s Messenger in these last days, and was registered in the Philippines on July 27, 1914.



READ MORE](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/history/)[Time is running out, time to get ready


“So always be ready, alert, and prepared, because at an hour when you’re not expecting him, the Son of Man will come.”




READ MORE](https://iglesianicristo.net/time-is-running-out-time-to-get-ready/)[Learn our socio-civic activities


Concerned with the welfare not only of its members but also of society in general, the Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) undertakes programs and projects in its various fields of endeavor, which are guided by and at the same time promote Christian values.



READ MORE](https://iglesianicristo.net/socio-civic/)[CLICK FOR DETAILS](https://iglesianicristo.net/international-voice-competition-2025-guidelines/)

Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)

## About the Iglesia Ni Cristo

(Church Of Christ)

ENGLISH

[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/about-us-francais/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/about-us-italiano/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/about-us-portugues/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/about-us-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/deutsch/)
[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/espanol/)
[한국어](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/%ed%95%9c%ea%b5%ad%ec%96%b4/)
[繁體中文](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/%e7%b9%81%e9%ab%94%e4%b8%ad%e6%96%87/)

The *Iglesia**Ni Cristo*(Church Of Christ) is a Christian religion whose primary purpose is to worship the Almighty God in a manner taught by the Lord Jesus Christ and His apostles as recorded in the Bible.

The Church Of Christ is a church for all peoples. It is for everyone who will embrace the true faith regardless of race, nationality, cultural background, social standing, economic status, and educational attainment.

Thus far, the *Iglesia Ni Cristo*has an international membership comprising 152 racial and ethnic backgrounds. It maintains nearly 7,000 congregations and missions grouped into more than 178 ecclesiastical districts in 168 countries and territories in the six inhabited continents of the world.

## Vision: A Radiant Church

In Ephesians 5:27, the Church Of Christ is described as a “radiant church, without stain or wrinkle or any other blemish, but holy and blameless” ( *New International Version*).

Based on this, the *Iglesia Ni Cristo*is envisioned as a Church that is in perfect unity of faith and practice, where every member is devoted to a life of holiness founded on true Christian teachings and is dedicated to all of his or her Christian duties toward spiritual maturity.

## Mission: A Church that Shares

Concerning the mission of the Church, Mark 16:15-16 states, “And he said to them, ‘Go into all the world and preach the good news to all creation. Whoever believes and is baptized will be saved, but whoever does not believe will be condemned’” ( *NIV*) and Colossians 1:28 affirms, “We proclaim him, admonishing and teaching everyone with all wisdom, so that we may present everyone perfect in Christ” ( *NIV*).

Hence, the *Iglesia**Ni Cristo*shall continuously preach the gospel of salvation written in the Bible thereby propagating the Church and edifying the faithful, guiding them in the proper worship of God and righteous way of life leading to salvation.

## 有關 Iglesia Ni Cristo

(Church Of Christ)

繁體中文

[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/about-us-francais/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/about-us-italiano/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/about-us-portugues/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/about-us-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/deutsch/)
[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/espanol/)
[한국어](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/%ed%95%9c%ea%b5%ad%ec%96%b4/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/)

Iglesia Ni Cristo(基督的教會) 是一個基督宗教，旨在遵守聖經記載主耶穌基督和他的使徒們所教導的方式來敬拜全能的神。

基督的教會是個接受所有人的教會。無論種族、國籍、文化背景、社會經濟地位和學歷，都可以進入教會擁有真正的信仰。

到目前為止，Iglesia Ni Cristo(基督的教會)的成員來自了152個種族和族裔背景；超過178個教區和7000多個地方教會，遍佈在世界六大洲的166個國家與地區。

## 願景 : 一個榮耀的教會

在〈以弗所書〉五章27節，基督的教會被形容為一個「榮耀的教會，毫無玷污、皺紋等類的缺陷，而是聖潔沒有瑕疵的。」《和合本修訂版》

基於如此，Iglesia Ni Cristo(基督的教會)展望成為一個在信仰與實踐完全團結一致的教會，每位成員都能致力過著真正的基督徒該有的聖潔生活，和專心履行所有的教會職責，以達到屬靈的成熟。

## 傳道 : 樂於分享的教會

關於教會的傳道，〈馬可福音〉十六章15至16節：「他又對他們說：『你們到全世界去，向所有的人傳福音。信而受洗的必定得救，不信的必被定罪。』」《新譯本》。在〈歌羅西書〉一章28節則證明：「我們傳揚他，是用各樣的智慧，勸戒各人，教導各人，為了要使各人在基督裡得到完全」《新譯本》。

因此，Iglesia Ni Cristo(基督的教會)持續地宣揚聖經的救恩福音，藉著傳揚教會與造就成員們的信仰，指導他們正確地敬拜神，和過著引導救恩的公義生活。

[教會發展](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/history/)[敬拜聚會](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship/)[薰陶會員](https://iglesianicristo.net/edification/)[分享信仰](https://iglesianicristo.net/evangelism/)[社會服務](https://iglesianicristo.net/socio-civic/)![](https://21prd-incnet.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/15144614/sealforweb-01.png)

## Iglesia Ni Cristo 소개

(Church Of Christ)

한국어

[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/about-us-francais/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/about-us-italiano/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/about-us-portugues/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/about-us-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/deutsch/)
[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/espanol/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/)
[繁體中文](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/%e7%b9%81%e9%ab%94%e4%b8%ad%e6%96%87/)

이글레시아 니 크리스토 (그리스도의 교회)는 성경에 기록된 주 예수그리스도와 그분의 사도들의 가르침에 따라 전능하신 하나님께 섬기고 예배드리는 주요 목적이 있는 기독교 종교이다.

그리스도의 교회는 모든 사람을 위한 교회이다. 인종, 국적, 문화적 배경 사회적 지위, 경제적 상태, 교육 수준 관계없이 하나님의 부르심과 신앙을 받아드리는 모든 사람을 위한 것이다.

이글레시아 니 크리스토는 이제껏152개의 인종으로 구성되어 국제적인 교회원이 있다. 7000여 개의 회중과 전도 사업은 178 개의 교회관구로 6개의 대륙 중에서 166여 개의 국가와 준주에서 조직된다.

## 비전: 영광스러운 교회

에베소서5:27, 그리스도의 교회는 “영광스러운 교회”로 묘사되는데, “점이나 주름진 것들이 없이 거룩하고 흠 없는 것이다.”

그 구절에 근거로, 이글레시아 니 크리스토는 믿음과 실천의 온전한 단결이 있는 곳, 어디서 각 교인은 거룩한 생활에 전념하고 영적 성숙으로 향해 기독교의 의무를 헌신적으로 다하는 교회로 되게 노력한다.

## 사명: 나눠 주는 교회

교회의 선교적 사명에 관해 마가16장15~16절은 “또 주께서 그들에게 말씀하시기를 “너희는 온 세상에 가서 모든 피조물에게 복음을 전파하라. 믿고 침례를 받는 자는 구원을 받을 것이나 믿지 않는 자들은 정죄함을 받으리라.” 골로새서1:28, “우리가 그를 전파하고 각 사람을 훈계하며 모든 지혜로 각 사람을 가르침은 각 사람을 그리스도 예수 안에서 온전하게 제시하려는 것이라.”

그러므로 이글레시아 니 크리스토는 성경에 기록된 구원의 복음을 전파하기를 계속함으로써 교회를 선전할 뿐만 아니라 합당한 예배를 하는 데 인도하고 구원의 방향으로 이끄는 것으로 인해 신자를 계발하겠다.

[역사](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/history/)[예배](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship/)[믿음을 세움](https://iglesianicristo.net/edification/)[복음 전도](https://iglesianicristo.net/evangelism/)[사회적 시민적](https://iglesianicristo.net/socio-civic/)![](https://21prd-incnet.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/15144614/sealforweb-01.png)

## イグレシア ニ クリストについて

(Church Of Christ)

日本語

[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/about-us-francais/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/about-us-italiano/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/about-us-portugues/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/deutsch/)
[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/espanol/)
[한국어](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/%ed%95%9c%ea%b5%ad%ec%96%b4/)
[繁體中文](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/%e7%b9%81%e9%ab%94%e4%b8%ad%e6%96%87/)

*Iglesia Ni Cristo*(キリストの教会)は聖書に書かれている主イエスキリストと使徒たちの教えたことに基づいて、神を礼拝するのを一番の目的として活動しているクリスチャン宗教である。

Iglesia Ni Cristoはすべての人のための教会。人種、国籍、文化的背景、社会的地位、経済的地位、学歴に関係なく、真の信仰を受け入れるすべての人を対象としている。

これまで、Iglesia Ni Cristoは152の人種や民族で構成された国際的なメンバーシップを有している。166の国と地域、178以上の教会地区、およそ7,000もの集会所を世界の6つの大陸で展開している。

## 求めるもの：輝かしい教会

エフェソ5:27（新改訳）ではキリストの教会を「しみや、しわや、そのようなものの何一つない、きよく傷のないものとなった教会」と言い表している。

これにともない、キリストの教会は信仰と行いが完全に一つになること、各メンバーが真のクリスチャンの教えで聖く正しい生き方を送り、兄弟姉妹たちが霊的に成熟するようクリスチャンとしての義務に一生懸命努めることである。

## 目指すもの：共有される教会

教会が目指すことについては、マルコ16:15-16新改訳で述べている。「全世界に出て行き、すべての造られた者に、福音を宣べ伝えなさい。信じてバプテスマを受ける者は、救われます。しかし、信じない者は罪に定められます。」そして、コロサイ1:28新共同訳では「このキリストを、わたしたちは宣べ伝えており、すべての人がキリストに結ばれて完全な者となるように、知恵を尽くしてすべての人を諭し、教えています。」と主張している。

したがって、キリストの教会は聖書に書かれた救いの福音を教え続け、それによって教会を広め、信者の信仰を強め、神への正しい礼拝と救いにつながる正しい生き方に導いているのである。

## À propos de l'Iglesia Ni Cristo

(Church Of Christ)

Français

[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/about-us-italiano/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/about-us-portugues/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/about-us-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/deutsch/)
[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/espanol/)
[한국어](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/%ed%95%9c%ea%b5%ad%ec%96%b4/)
[繁體中文](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/%e7%b9%81%e9%ab%94%e4%b8%ad%e6%96%87/)

L’ *Iglesia Ni Cristo*ou l’Église Du Christ est une religion chrétienne dont l’objectif principal est d’adorer le Dieu Tout-Puissant dans la manière enseignée par le Seigneur Jésus-Christ et Ses apôtres tel qu’il est écrit dans la Bible.

L’Église Du Christ est une église pour toutes les personnes. Elle est pour tous ceux qui embrassent la vraie foi qu’importe l’origine, la nationalité, le contexte culturel, le statut social, le statut économique et le niveau de scolarité.

Jusqu’ici, l’ *Iglesia Ni Cristo*a des membres à l’international comprenant 152 origines et ethniques. Elle maintient près de 7 000 congrégations et missions regroupées en plus de 178 districts ecclésiastiques dans 166 pays et territoires dans les six continents du monde habités.

## La Vision: Une Église Rayonnante

Dans Éphésiens 5:27, l’Eglise Du Christ est décrite comme une «église rayonnante, sans tache, ni ride, ni aucun défaut, mais digne et irréprochable». ( *La Bible du Semeur*).

Basée sur ceci, l’ *Iglesia Ni Cristo*est envisagée comme une Église qui est en parfaite unité de foi et pratique, où chaque membre est dévoué à une vie de sainteté fondée sur les vrais enseignements chrétiens et est dédié à tous ses devoirs chrétiens vers la maturité spirituelle.

## La Mission: Une Église qui Partage

Concernant la mission de l’Église, Marc 16:15-16 déclare: «Et il leur dit: ‘Allez dans le monde entier, annoncez la Bonne Nouvelle à tous les hommes. Celui qui croira et sera baptisé sera sauvé, mais celui qui ne croira pas sera condamné.’» ( *BDS*) et Colossiens 1:28 affirme: «C’est lui que nous annonçons, exhortant tout homme, et instruisant tout homme en toute sagesse, afin de présenter à Dieu tout homme, devenu parfait en Christ». ( *Louis Segond*).

Ainsi, l’ *Iglesia Ni Cristo*doit prêcher continuellement l’évangile du salut écrit dans la Bible en propageant l’Église et édifiant les fidèles, les guidant dans le correcte manière d’adorer Dieu et la manière juste de vivre menant au salut.

## A proposito della Iglesia Ni Cristo

(Church Of Christ)

Italiano

[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/about-us-francais/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/about-us-portugues/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/about-us-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/deutsch/)
[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/espanol/)
[한국어](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/%ed%95%9c%ea%b5%ad%ec%96%b4/)
[繁體中文](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/%e7%b9%81%e9%ab%94%e4%b8%ad%e6%96%87/)

La *Iglesia Ni Cristo*o Chiesa Di Cristo è una religione Cristiana che ha lo scopo principale di adorare l’Onnipotente Dio nel modo che è stato insegnato dal Signore Gesù Cristo e dai Suoi apostoli, come scritto nella Bibbia.

La Chiesa Di Cristo è una chiesa per tutti. È per chiunque decide di abbracciare la vera fede indipendentemente dalla razza, dalla nazionalità, dal bagaglio culturale, dalla posizione sociale, dallo stato economico e dal livello d’istruzione.

Fino ad ora, la Chiesa Di Cristo ( *Iglesia Ni Cristo*) è composta da membri che provengono da quasi tutto il mondo, comprendendo 152 origini etniche e razziali. Essa gestisce circa 7000 congregazioni e missioni raggruppate in oltre 178 distretti ecclesiastici in 166 paesi e territori nei sei continenti abitati del mondo.

## Visione: Una Chiesa Radiosa

In Efesini 5:27, la Chiesa Di Cristo è descritta come una “chiesa radiosa, senza macchie o rughe o altre imperfezioni, ma santa e irreprensibile” (tradotto da *New International Version*).

Sulla base di questo, l *‘Iglesia Ni Cristo*è concepita come una Chiesa in perfetta unità di fede e pratica, dove ogni membro è dedicato a una vita di santità fondata sui veri insegnamenti Cristiani ed è devoto a tutti i propri doveri Cristiani verso la maturità spirituale.

## Missione: Una Chiesa che Condivide

Per quanto riguarda la missione della Chiesa, in Marco 16:15-16 viene dichiarato: “E disse loro: «Andate per tutto il mondo, predicate il vangelo a ogni creatura. Chi avrà creduto e sarà stato battezzato sarà salvato; ma chi non avrà creduto sarà condannato.” (Nuova Riveduta) e in Colossesi 1:28 viene affermato: “È lui infatti che noi annunziamo, ammonendo e istruendo ogni uomo con ogni sapienza, per rendere ciascuno perfetto in Cristo” (Conferenza Episcopale Italiana).

Quindi, l’ *Iglesia Ni Cristo*continuerà a predicare il vangelo della salvezza scritto nella Bibbia, facendo diffondere la Chiesa e edificando i fedeli, guidandoli nella corretta adorazione a Dio e nel giusto modo di vivere verso la salvezza.

## Sobre a Iglesia Ni Cristo

(Church Of Christ)

Português

[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/about-us-francais/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/about-us-italiano/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/about-us-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/deutsch/)
[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/espanol/)
[한국어](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/%ed%95%9c%ea%b5%ad%ec%96%b4/)
[繁體中文](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/%e7%b9%81%e9%ab%94%e4%b8%ad%e6%96%87/)

A *Iglesia Ni Cristo*ou a Igreja De Cristo é uma religião cristã cujo objetivo principal é adorar o Deus Todo-Poderoso de uma maneira ensinada pelo Senhor Jesus Cristo e os Seus apóstolos, conforme gravado na Bíblia.A Igreja De Cristo é uma igreja para todos as pessoas. É para todos que abraçarão a verdadeira fé, independentemente de raça, nacionalidade, origem cultural, posição social, status econômico e sucesso escolar.Até o momento, a *Iglesia Ni Cristo*tem uma membridade internacional composta por 152 origens raciais e étnicas. Mantém quase 7.000 congregações e missões agrupadas em mais de 178 distritos eclesiásticos em 166 países e territórios nos seis continentes habitados do mundo.

## Visão: Uma Igreja Gloriosa

Em Efésios 5:27, a Igreja De Cristo é descrita como uma “igreja gloriosa, sem mancha nem ruga ou coisa semelhante, mas santa e inculpável.” (Nova Versão Internacional).

Com base nisso, a Iglesia Ni Cristo é prevista como uma Igreja em perfeita união da fé e prática, em que cada membro é dedicado a uma vida de santidade fundada nos verdadeiros ensinamentos cristãos e é dedicada a todos os seus deveres cristãos rumo à maturidade espiritual.

## Missão: Uma Igreja que Compartilha

A respeito da missão da Igreja, Marcos 16:15-16 declara: “E disse-lhes: ‘Vão pelo mundo todo e preguem o evangelho a todas as pessoas. Quem crer e for batizado será salvo, mas quem não crer será condenado.’” (NVI) e Colossenses 1:28 afirma: “Nós o proclamamos, advertindo e ensinando a cada um com toda a sabedoria, para que apresentemos todo homem perfeito em Cristo.” (NVI).

Portanto, a Iglesia Ni Cristo irá pregar continuamente o evangelho da salvação escrito na Bíblia, propagando assim a Igreja e edificando os fiéis, orientando-os na adoração adequada à Deus e no modo de vida correto que leva à salvação.

Deutsch - Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)

## Über die Iglesia Ni Cristo

(Kirche Christi)

Deutsch

[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/about-us-francais/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/about-us-italiano/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/about-us-portugues/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/about-us-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/)
[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/espanol/)
[한국어](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/%ed%95%9c%ea%b5%ad%ec%96%b4/)
[繁體中文](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/%e7%b9%81%e9%ab%94%e4%b8%ad%e6%96%87/)

Die *Iglesia Ni Cristo*oder Kirche Christi ist eine christliche Religion, deren Hauptzweck darin besteht, Gott, den Allmächtigen, auf einer Art und Weise anzubeten, die vom Herrn Jesus Christus und Seinen Aposteln gelehrt wurde, wie es in der Bibel geschrieben steht.

Die Kirche Christi ist eine Kirche für alle Völker. Sie ist für alle, die den wahren Glauben annehmen, ungeachtet der ethnischen Zugehörigkeit, der Nationalität, des kulturellen Hintergrunds, der gesellschaftlichen sowie ökonomischen Stellung und des erreichten Bildungsstands.

Derzeit hat die *Iglesia Ni Cristo*eine internationale Mitgliedschaft, die aus 152 Volkszugehörigkeiten besteht. Sie hat knapp 7.000 Gemeinden und Missionen, die in mehr als 178 kirchlichen Bezirken in 166 Ländern und Territorien auf den sechs bewohnten Kontinenten der Welt gruppiert sind.

## Die Vision: Eine herrliche Kirche

In Epheser 5,27 wird die Kirche Christi als eine herrliche Kirche beschrieben, „ohne Flecken oder Falten oder andere Fehler; heilig soll sie sein und makellos“ (Einheitsübersetzung).

Darauf bauend stellt sich die *Iglesia Ni Cristo*als eine Kirche vor, die in vollkommener Einheit des Glaubens und der Religionsausübung ist, in der sich jedes Mitglied einem Leben der Heiligkeit widmet, das auf wahren christlichen Lehren beruht, und sich allen christlichen Pflichten zur spirituellen Reife widmet.

## Mission: Eine Kirche, die teilt

Über den Auftrag der Kirche heißt es in Markus 16,15-16: „Dann sagte er zu ihnen: „Geht hinaus in die ganze Welt und verkündet allen Menschen die rettende Botschaft. Wer glaubt und sich taufen lässt, der wird gerettet werden. Wer aber nicht glaubt, der wird verurteilt werden“ (Hoffnung für Alle. Die Bibel). In Kolosser 1,28 wird bekräftigt: „Ihn verkündigen wir, indem wir jeden Menschen ermahnen und jeden Menschen lehren in aller Weisheit, um jeden Menschen vollkommen in Christus Jesus darzustellen.“ (Schlachter Bibel)

Deshalb wird die *Iglesia Ni Cristo*ununterbrochen das in der Bibel niedergeschriebene Evangelium der Errettung predigen, und dadurch die Kirche verbreiten, die Gläubigen erbauen und sie in der angemessenen Anbetung Gottes und einer gerechten Lebensweise, die zur Errettung führt, leiten.

[Geschichte](https://iglesianicristo.net/history-deutsch/)[Der Gottesdienst](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-deutsch/)[Die Mitglieder erziehen](https://iglesianicristo.net/edifying-the-members-deutsch/)[Den Glauben teilen](https://iglesianicristo.net/sharing-the-faith-deutsch/)[Sozialer Dienst](https://iglesianicristo.net/socio-civic-deutsch/)![](https://21prd-incnet.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/15144614/sealforweb-01.png)

## Acerca de la Iglesia Ni Cristo

(Church Of Christ)

Español

[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/about-us-francais/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/about-us-italiano/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/about-us-portugues/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/about-us-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/deutsch/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/)
[한국어](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/%ed%95%9c%ea%b5%ad%ec%96%b4/)
[繁體中文](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/%e7%b9%81%e9%ab%94%e4%b8%ad%e6%96%87/)

La Iglesia De Cristo es una religión cristiana cuyo principal propósito es adorar al Dios Todopoderoso de una manera enseñada por el Señor Jesucristo y Sus apóstoles tal como está escrito en la Biblia.

La Iglesia De Cristo es una iglesia para todas las personas. Es para todos los que abrazarán la verdadera fe, independientemente de su raza, nacionalidad, circunstancias culturales, posición social, situación económica y nivel educativo.

Hasta ahora, la Iglesia De Cristo tiene una membresía internacional que se comprende de 152 orígenes raciales y étnicos. Mantiene cerca de 7.000 congregaciones y misiones agrupadas en más de 178 distritos eclesiásticos en 166 países y territorios en los seis continentes habitados del mundo.

## Visión: Una Iglesia Radiante

En Efesios 5:27, la Iglesia De Cristo se describe como una “iglesia radiante, sin mancha ni arruga ni ninguna otra imperfección, sino santa e intachable.” ( *Nueva Versión Internacional*).

En base a esto, la Iglesia De Cristo se concibe como una Iglesia que está en perfecta unidad de fe y práctica, donde cada miembro se dedica a una vida en santidad fundada en las verdaderas enseñanzas cristianas y se dedica a todos sus deberes cristianos hacia la madurez espiritual.

## Misión: Una Iglesia que Comparte

Con respecto a la misión de la Iglesia, Marcos 16:15-16 declara: “Les dijo: “Vayan por todo el mundo y anuncien las buenas nuevas a toda criatura. El que crea y sea bautizado será salvo, pero el que no crea será condenado. ”   ( *NVI*) y Colosenses 1:28 afirma: “A este Cristo proclamamos, aconsejando y enseñando con toda sabiduría a todos los seres humanos, para presentarlos a todos perfectos en él. ” *(NVI*).

Por lo tanto, la Iglesia De Cristo predicará continuamente el evangelio de salvación escrito en la Biblia, propagando así la Iglesia y edificando a los fieles, guiándoles en la adoración correcta a Dios y en la forma justa de vivir que conduce a la salvación.

History - Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)[About Us / History](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/)

## History

ENGLISH

[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/history/francais/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/history/italiano/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/history-portugues/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/history-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/history-deutsch/)
[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/history-espanol/)
[한국어](https://iglesianicristo.net/history-%ed%95%9c%ea%b5%ad%ec%96%b4/)
[繁體中文](https://iglesianicristo.net/history-%e7%b9%81%e9%ab%94%e4%b8%ad%e6%96%87/)

Previous slide Next slide

The *Iglesia Ni Cristo*was preached by Brother Felix Y. Manalo, God’s Messenger in these last days, and was registered in the Philippines on July 27, 1914.

From its first local congregation in Punta, Sta. Ana, Manila, the Church quickly spread not only throughout the metropolis but also to the neighboring provinces in Luzon and across the islands of Visayas and Mindanao.

![](https://iglesianicristo.net/img/2018-04/history/FYM_Grand_Evangelical_Rally_Dagupan.jpg)When Brother Felix Manalo passed away on April 12, 1963, the Church had already established ecclesiastical districts in more than half of all the provinces in the country.

In 1968, the Church, led by Brother Eraño G. Manalo, the Executive Minister then, successively established the first two local congregations outside the Philippines—Honolulu, Hawaii and San Francisco, California in the USA.

Thus began the Church’s expansion in the Far West and eventually around the world.

From then up to the end of the ‘70s, the Church went on to spread throughout the continents of North America (establishing local congregations and group worship services [GWS] in other states and territories, such as New York and Guam in 1969, and Canada in 1971); Europe (the first local congregation, London [now Battersea], was established in 1972); Australia, mid-‘70s; Asia (China, by way of Hong Kong in 1974; Thailand in 1976; and Japan in 1977); and Africa (Nigeria and South Africa in 1978). By the end of the ‘80s, there were local congregations and GWS in the Scandinavian countries and their neighbors.

The first local congregation in Latin America was established in Guantanamo Bay, Cuba in 1990. Congregations were also established in world cities that are of great relevance to the history of Christianity— Rome, Italy on July 27, 1994; Jerusalem, Israel on March 31, 1996; and Athens, Greece on May 10, 1997.

At the dawn of the new millenium, the Church’s mission reached South America with the establishment of GWS in Brazil and Peru. Before Brother Eraño passed away on August 31, 2009, the Church had been spreading continuously in different parts of the world.

Through the leadership of its present Executive Minister, Brother Eduardo V. Manalo, the Church continues to progress and succeed. Its membership has been constantly increasing.

Thousands of ministers and Church officers are being added worldwide. The construction and renovation of houses of worship, Church edifices, and other structures also continue, not only in the Philippines but also in other countries.

The houses of worship in Washington, DC; Barcelona, Spain; and Amsterdam, The Netherlands are just a few of those outside the Philippines that were dedicated to God in recent years, thus strengthening the Church’s presence in other countries worldwide.

On July 21, 2014, the *Iglesia Ni Cristo*inaugurated the Philippine Arena, currently the world’s “largest mixed-use indoor theatre.” This megastructure that sits in Ciudad de Victoria, Bocaue, Bulacan was the venue of the Church’s centennial celebration held on July 27, 2014, which was attended by millions of its members from all over the world.

## For more about the Church's history, visit:

Français - Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)[À Propos De Nous / L’Histoire](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/)

## L’Histoire

Français

[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/history/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/history/italiano/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/history-portugues/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/history-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/history-deutsch/)
[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/history-espanol/)
[한국어](https://iglesianicristo.net/history-%ed%95%9c%ea%b5%ad%ec%96%b4/)
[繁體中文](https://iglesianicristo.net/history-%e7%b9%81%e9%ab%94%e4%b8%ad%e6%96%87/)

![history-sub2](https://21prd-incnet.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/11020132/history-sub2-scaled.jpg)

L’Iglesia Ni Cristo a été prêchée par Frère Felix Y. Manalo, le Messager de Dieu dans ces derniers jours, et a été enregistrée aux Philippines le 27 juillet 1914.

Depuis sa première congrégation locale à Punta, Sta. Ana, Manille, l’Église s’est rapidement répandue non seulement dans toute la métropole, mais aussi dans les provinces voisines de Luzon et à travers les îles de Visayas et Mindanao.

Lorsque Frère Felix Manalo fut décédé en avril 1963, l’Église avait déjà établi des districts ecclésiastiques dans plus de la moitié de toutes les provinces du pays.

En 1968, l’Église, menée par Frère Eraño G. Manalo, alors Ministre Exécutif, a successivement créé les deux premières congrégations locales en dehors des Philippines – Honolulu, Hawaï et San Francisco, Californie aux États-Unis.

Ainsi commença l’expansion de l’Église dans le Extrême-Occident et éventuellement dans le monde.

À partir de là, jusqu’à la fin des années 70, l’Église s’est répandue sur les continents nord-américain (établissant des congrégations locales et des services d’adoration de groupe [group worship services ou GWS] dans d’autres états et territoires, comme New York et Guam en 1969, et Canada en 1971); européen (la première congrégation locale, Londres [aujourd’hui Battersea], a été établie en 1972); australien, milieu des années 70; asiatique (Chine, via Hong Kong en 1974; Thaïlande en 1976; et Japon en 1977); et africain (Nigéria et Afrique du Sud en 1978). À la fin des années 80, il y avait des congrégations locales et des GWS dans les pays scandinaves et leurs voisins.

La première congrégation locale en Amérique latine a été établie à Guantanamo Bay, Cuba en 1990. Des congrégations ont également été établies dans des villes du monde qui sont d’une grande importance pour l’histoire du christianisme – Rome, Italie le 27 juillet 1994 ; Jérusalem, Israël, le 31 mars 1996 ; et Athènes, Grèce, le 10 mai 1997.

À l’aube du nouveau millénaire, la mission de l’Église a atteint l’Amérique du Sud avec la création de GWS au Brésil et au Pérou. Avant le décès de Frère Eraño le 31 août 2009, l’Église ne cessait de se répandre dans différentes parties du monde.

Sous la direction de son Ministre Exécutif actuel, Frère Eduardo V. Manalo, l’Église continue de progresser et de réussir. Ses membres sont en constante augmentation.

Des milliers de ministres et d’officiers de l’Église sont ajoutés dans le monde entier. La construction et la rénovation de maisons d’adoration, d’édifices de l’Église et d’autres structures se poursuivent également, non seulement aux Philippines mais aussi dans d’autres pays.

Les maisons d’adoration à Washington, DC ; Barcelone, Espagne ; et Amsterdam, Pays-Bas ne sont que quelques-unes de celles en dehors des Philippines qui ont été dédiées à Dieu ces dernières années, renforçant ainsi la présence de l’Église dans d’autres pays du monde.

Le 21 juillet 2014, l’Iglesia Ni Cristo a inauguré la Philippine Arena, actuellement le «plus grand théâtre intérieur à usage mixte du monde». Cette mégastructure qui se trouve à Ciudad de Victoria, Bocaue, Bulacan a été le lieu de la célébration du centenaire de l’Église qui s’est tenue le 27 juillet 2014, à laquelle ont participé des millions de ses membres du monde entier.

![](https://21prd-incnet.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/15144614/sealforweb-01.png)

Italiano - Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)[Chi siamo / Storia](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/)

## Storia

Italiano

[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/history/francais/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/history/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/history-portugues/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/history-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/history-deutsch/)
[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/history-espanol/)
[한국어](https://iglesianicristo.net/%ec%9a%b0%eb%a6%ac%ec%97%90-%eb%8c%80%ed%95%b4/)
[繁體中文](https://iglesianicristo.net/history-%e7%b9%81%e9%ab%94%e4%b8%ad%e6%96%87/)

Previous slide Next slide

La *Iglesia Ni Cristo*(Chiesa Di Cristo) è stata predicata dal Fratello Felix Y. Manalo, il Messaggero di Dio in questi ultimi giorni, e venne registrata nelle Filippine il 27 Luglio 1914.

Dalla prima congregazione a Punta, Sta. Ana, Manila, la Chiesa non si è solo diffusa nella metropoli, ma anche nelle provincie vicine di Luzon e nelle le isole di Visayas e Mindanao.

Quando il Fratello Felix Manalo morì il 1° Aprile 1963, la Chiesa aveva già stabilito distretti ecclesiastici in più della metà delle provincie di Luzon e nelle isole di Visayas e Mindanao.

Nel 1968, la Chiesa, guidata dal Fratello Eraño G. Manalo, il Ministro Esecutivo di allora, stabilì con successo le prime due congregazioni al di fuori delle Filippine: Honolulu nelle Hawaii e San Francisco, California negli USA.

Dopodiché, cominciò l\’espansione della Chiesa nel Lontano Occidente e successivamente nel resto del mondo.

Da allora, fino alla fine degli anni 70, la Chiesa si diffuse in tutto il continente del Nord America (stabilendo congregazioni e gruppi per il servizi di adorazione (GSA) in altri stati e territori, come New York  e Guam nel 1969; il Canada nel 1971; l\’Australia, a metà degli anni 70\’; L\’Asia (Cina ed Hong Kong nel 1974); la Thailandia nel 1976; il Giappone nel 1977; e l\’Africa (Nigeria e Sud Africa) nel 1978. Verso la fine degli anni 80\’vi erano congregazioni locali e GSA anche nei paesi Scandinavi e limitrofi.

La prima congregazione nell\’America Latina venne stabilita nella Baia di Guantanamo, a Cuba, nel 1990. Poi vennero stabilite delle congregazioni anche in città che hanno avuto un grande impatto nella storia del Cristianesimo: Roma, in Italia, il 27 Luglio 1994; Gerusalemme, in Israele, il 31 Marzo 1996 e Atene, in Grecia, il 10 Maggio 1997.

All\’alba del nuovo millennio, la missione della Chiesa raggiunse il Sud America con lo stabilimento di un Gruppo per il Servizio di Adorazione in Brasile e in Perù. Prima che il Fratello Eraño morisse il 31 Agosto 2009, la Chiesa ha continuato ad espandersi in diverse parti del mondo.

Attraverso la guida del Ministro Esecutivo, il Fratello Eduardo V. Manalo, la Chiesa continua a progredire e a trionfare. Il numero dei membri è sempre stato in costante crescita.

I ministri ufficiali della Chiesa aumentano a migliaia in tutto il mondo. Inoltre proseguono sia la costruzione che il restauro di case di adorazione, edifici della Chiesa ed altre strutture, non solamente nelle Filippine ma anche in altri paesi.

Le case di adorazione a Washington DC, Barcellona, in Spagna, e Amsterdam, Nei Paesi Bassi, sono solamente alcuni esempi di quelle al di fuori delle Filippine e che sono state dedicate a Dio negli anni recenti, rafforzando in questo modo la presenza della Chiesa negli altri paesi del mondo.

Il 21 Luglio 2014, la *Iglesia Ni Cristo*(Chiesa Di Cristo) ha inaugurato la Philippine Arena, che attualmente è “il più grande teatro multiuso al chiuso” in tutto il mondo. Questa mega-struttura situata a Ciudad de Victoria, Bocaue, Bulacan, è stata il luogo in cui è stato celebrato il centenario della Chiesa, tenutosi il 27 Luglio 2014, a cui hanno partecipato milioni di membri provenienti da diverse parti del mondo.

![](https://21prd-incnet.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/15144614/sealforweb-01.png)

Baptism-日本語 - Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)[信じている教え / 洗礼](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## 洗礼

日本語

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-deutsch/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/baptism-2/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-portugues/)

私たちは、使徒たちが宣べ伝え、キリストがお命じになった洗礼は（ マタイ28:19）、浸礼だと信じている（ローマ6:4; ヨハネ3:23; 使徒8:36-38）。

洗礼を受ける資格があるのは、神の御言葉を教わり、それを信じ、悔い改め、生き方を改めた人（マ ルコ16:15-16; 使徒2:38）。幼子はこれらをすることができないの で、キリストの教会では幼児洗礼 をしない。小さな子は、神にささ げられるべきだ。天の国はこのよ うな者のためであるからだ（マタイ19:13-15）。洗礼を受けるに適す るまでは、子供に洗礼を授けない。

## Baptism and ‘Welcome, My Brethren’ conducted in Edmonton

By ANTONIO G. CAÑAVERAL JR.

Posted: January 24, 2026

Previous slide Next slide

Prospective members from the [Ecclesiastical District of Edmonton](https://directory.iglesianicristo.net/districts/canada-vi), Canada, received the holy [baptism](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/baptism-2/), then attended a “Welcome, My Brethren” activity, respectively held at the [Eastwood](https://directory.iglesianicristo.net/locales/eastwood)house of worship and the Northmount Community Centre in Edmonton on January 11, 2026.

During the baptismal gathering, district supervising minister Brother Rolando E. Gaviola taught the would-be members about the importance of receiving baptism inside the true [Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ)](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/)to be certain of salvation on [Judgment Day](https://www.pasugo.com.ph/will-judgment-day-come/). After the study of God’s words, assistant district supervising minister Brother Felmar Serreno administered the candidates’ taking oath of membership before proceeding to the baptismal pool for their actual immersion led by ministers of the gospel Brothers John Joseph De Jesus and Jason Bodnarczuk.

Among the brethren instrumental in the new members’ conversion was Alma Dimayuga from [Sherwook Park Congregation](https://directory.iglesianicristo.net/locales/sherwood-park-alberta), who shared, “God is good. He is the one Who calls people into His fold. I’m glad that He willed my father to join the Church. To God be all the praises.”

“I’m truly blessed to become a member of the Church Of Christ,” said newly baptized Alberto Dimayuga. “I and my daughter will encourage more of our family members to enter the Church.”

Right after the baptism, all in attendance, led by Brothers Gaviola and Serreno, had an almost 10-minute-ride going to the venue of their next event, the “Welcome, My Brethren” activity. After a prayer by district Light Of Salvation overseer Brother Pol Manicdo, district [Christian Family Organizations](https://www.pasugo.com.ph/?s=Christian+Family+Organizations)(CFO) overseer Brother Brian Justin Tacneng introduced the newly baptized brethren to the CFO they respectively belong.

On their part, the CFO officers warmly welcomed and congratulated their brethren,  even handing out souvenirs and dedicating to them musical performances featuring [INC original music](https://www.youtube.com/@INCOriginalMusic). — With assistance from District Multimedia

For more news, visit INC News and Updates

Menu Search Search Close this search box. [Die Glaubensrichtungen / Die Taufe](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## Die Taufe

Deutsch

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-filipino/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/baptism-2/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-portugues/)

Wir glauben, dass die Taufe, die von Christus geboten (Mt. 28,19) und von den Aposteln gelehrt wurde, durch die Immersion abgehalten wird (Röm. 6,4; Joh. 3,23; Apg. 8,36-38).

Um die Taufe erhalten zu können, muss einem zuerst die Worte Gottes gelehrt werden, man sollte an diese glauben, sich von seinen Sünden abkehren und ein neues Leben führen (Mk. 16,15-16; Apg. 2,36). Da Säuglinge diese Dinge nicht machen können, wird aus diesem Grund die Taufe von Säuglingen in der Kirche Christi nicht abgehalten. Säuglinge und Kleinkinder sollten Gott geopfert werden, denn ihnen gehört das Himmelreich (Mt. 19,13-15). Ihre Taufe geschieht erst, sobald sie dafür geeignet sind.

Menu Search Search Close this search box. [Creencias / Acerca El Bautismo](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## Acerca El Bautismo

Español

[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/baptism-2/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-portugues/)

Creemos que el bautismo mandado por Cristo (Mat. 28:19) y predicado por los Apóstoles se lleva a cabo mediante la inmersión (Rom. 6:4; Juan 3:23; Hch. 8:36-38).

Para que una persona sea apta de recibir el bautismo, se le debe enseñar las palabras de Dios, creer en ellas, arrepentirse y renovar su vida (Mar. 16:15-16; Hch. 2:38). Ya que un niño no puede hacer estas cosas, el bautismo de niños y bebés no se lleva a cabo en la Iglesia De Cristo. Los niños son entregados a Dios para el reino de los cielos porque les pertenece (Mat. 19:13-15). El bautismo viene después de ser aptos para ello.

Baptism-Filipino - Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)[Mga aral na sinasampalatayanan / Tungkol sa bautismo](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## Tungkol sa bautismo

Filipino

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-espanol/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/baptism-2/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-portugues/)

Sumasampalataya kami na ang bautismong ipinag-utos ni Cristo (Mat. 28:19) at ipinangaral ng mga apostol ay isinasagawa sa pamamagitan ng paglulubog (Roma 6:4; Juan 3:23; Gawa 8:36-38). Upang ariing karapatdapat ang tao sa bautismo, kailangang siya’y naturuan ng mga salita ng Diyos, sumasampalataya sa mga ito, nagsisi sa kasalanan, at nagbabagong-buhay (Mar. 16:15-16; Gawa 2:38). Hindi magagawa ng isang sanggol ang mga ito kaya hindi nagbabautismo ng sanggol sa *Iglesia Ni Cristo*. Ang mga sanggol o maliliit na bata ay dapat ihandog sa Diyos, sapagkat sa kanila ang kaharian ng langit (Mat. 19:13-15). Sila ay babautismuhan kapag nakatugon na sila sa katangian ng karapatdapat nang bautismuhan.

Baptism-Français - Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)[Croyances / Sur le Baptême](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## Sur le Baptême

Français

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-italiano/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/baptism-2/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-portugues/)

Nous croyons que le baptême commandé par le Christ (Mt 28:19) et prêché par les Apôtres se fait par le moyen d’«immersion» (Rm 6:4; Jn 3:23; Ac 8:36-38).

Pour être qualifié pour le baptême, il faut recevoir la prédication des paroles de Dieu, y croire, se repentir et renouveler sa vie (Mc 16:15-16; Ac 2:38). Puisqu’un nourrisson n’en est pas capable, le baptême des nourrissons n’est donc pas pratiqué au sein de l’Église Du Christ. Les nourrissons ou les petits enfants devraient êt re offerts à Dieu car le royaume des cieux leur appartient (Mt 19:13-15). Leur baptême vient après qu’ils en soient qualifiés.

Baptism-Italiano - Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)[Credenza / Riguardo Al Battesimo](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## Riguardo Al Battesimo

Italiano

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/baptism-2/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-portugues/)

Crediamo che il battesimo comandato da Cristo (Mat. 28:19) e predicato dagli Apostoli venga fatto attraverso l’immersione (Rom. 6:4; Gio. 3:23; Att. 8:36-38).

Per essere qualificati al battesimo, è necessario imparare le parole di Dio, credere in esse, e rinnovare la vita (Mar. 16:15-16; Att. 2:38). Dato che un neonato non può fare queste cose, è questo il motivo per cui, nella Chiesa Di Cristo, non si pratica il battesimo ai neonati. I neonati o i bambini piccoli devono essere offerti a Dio, poiché il regno dei cieli appartiene ad essi (Mat. 19:13-15). Il loro battesimo arriverà quando saranno qualificati per riceverlo.

Baptism-Português - Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)[Crenças / Sobre o Batismo](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## Sobre o Batismo

Português

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-francais/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/baptism-2/)

Acreditamos que o bat ismo comandado por Cristo (Mat. 28:19) e ensinado pelos apóstolos é feito através de imersão (Rom. 6:4; João 3:23; Atos 8:36-38).

Para alguém ser qualificado ao batismo, ele deve ser ensinado pelas palavras de Deus, acreditálas, se arrepender, e renovar sua vida (Mar. 16:15-16; Atos 2:38). Pelo fato de que um bebê não pode fazer essas coisas, a prática do batismo em bebês não é realizado na Igreja De Cristo. Bebês ou crianças de menor idade devem ser oferecidas à Deus pois o reino do céu pertence à elas (Mat. 19:13-15). Elas podem ser batizadas somente quando estiverem qualificadas para isso.

Beliefs - Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)

## What We Believe

ENGLISH

[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-filipino/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-francais/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-italiano/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-portugues/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-deutsch/)
[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-espanol/)

“WHAT’S THE DIFFERENCE?” is the usual remark we hear from some people who have come across the *Iglesia Ni Cristo*(Church Of Christ). And we don’t blame them because it is a perfectly sound and legitimate question to ask how this Church differs from other religions.

The set of beliefs upheld by a religious organization says a lot about its true character. The religion that God deems worthy is that which adheres to His teachings written in the Holy Scriptures.

This is what distinguishes the *Iglesia Ni Cristo*from other religious groups. It faithfully upholds the teachings of the Bible, which lead to the right spiritual path. What follows are brief explanations of the fundamental beliefs of the *Iglesia Ni Cristo*as classified into these topics:

[The Holy Scriptures](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/the-holy-scriptures/)[The Holy Spirit](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/the-holy-spirit/)[The Church and Salvation](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/the-church-and-salvation/)[Worship of God](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/worship-of-god/)[The Resurrectionof the Dead](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/the-resurrection-of-the-dead/)[One God, the Father](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father/)[The Messengers of God](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/the-messengers-of-god/)[Baptism](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/baptism/)[The Brotherhood](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/the-brotherhood/)[Judgment Day](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/judgment-day/)[The Lord Jesus Christ](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/the-lord-jesus-christ/)[God's Election](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/gods-election/)[The Church Administration](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/the-church-administration/)[The Christian Unity](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/the-christian-unity/)[The Holy City,New Jerusalem](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/the-holy-city-new-jerusalem/)![](https://21prd-incnet.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/15144614/sealforweb-01.png)

## Baptism

ENGLISH

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-portugues/)

We believe that the baptism commanded by Christ (Matt. 28:19) and preached by the Apostles is done by means of immersion (Rom. 6:4; John 3:23; Acts 8:36-38).

To qualify for baptism, one should be taught the words of God, believe in them, repent, and renew his life (Mark 16:15-16; Acts 2:38). Since an infant cannot do these things, therefore infant baptism is not practiced in the Church Of Christ. Infants or little children should be dedicated to God for the kingdom of heaven belongs to such as these (Matt. 19:13-15). Their baptism comes after they shall have qualified for it.

日本語 - Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)

## 私たちが信じていること

日本語

[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-filipino/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-francais/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-italiano/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-portugues/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-deutsch/)
[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-espanol/)

「何がちがうの？」これが、イグレシア・ニ・キリスト(キリストの教会)についての一般的な質問である。私たちはこのような質問を正当なものだと考えている。なぜなら、この教会が他の宗教とどう違うのかを知ることはとても重要だからだ。

一つの宗教組織が守っている信条は、その宗教の真の姿を多く語る。神が相応しいとお認めになる宗教は、聖書に書かれている神の教えに従うのだ。

これがキリストの教会と他の宗教との決定的な違いだ。この教会は、霊的で正しい道へと導く、聖書の教えを忠実に守っているのだ。ここにキリストの教会が信じている教えについて、各トピックごとに記した:

[聖書](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-holy-scritpures-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)[聖霊](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-holy-spirit-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)[教会と救い](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-and-salvation-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)[神への礼拝](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)[死からの復活](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-resurrection-of-the-dead-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)[唯一の神、父](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)[神の御使い](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-messengers-of-god-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)[洗礼](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)[兄弟愛](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)[キリストの再来と裁きの日](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)[主イエス・キリスト](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-lord-jesus-christ-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)[神の召し](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)[教会管理](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administration-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)[クリスチャンとしての団結](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)[聖なる都、新しいエルサレム](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-holy-city-new-jerusalem-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)![](https://21prd-incnet.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/15144614/sealforweb-01.png)

Deutsch - Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)

## Was Wir Glauben

Deutsch

[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-francais/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-italiano/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-portugues/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)
[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-filipino/)

WORIN LIEGT DER UNTERSCHIED?“ Dies ist die übliche Bemerkung **,**die wir von anderen Leuten hören, die der *Iglesia Ni Cristo*(Kirche Christi) begegnet sind. Und das können wir ihnen nicht verdenken, weil es eine völlig berechtigte Frage ist, nämlich sich zu erkunden, wie sich diese Kirche von anderen Religionen unterscheidet.

Die Glaubensrichtungen, welche von einer religiösen Organisation aufrechterhalten werden, sagen viel über ihren wahren Charakter aus. Die Religion, die Gott für würdig erklärt, ist jene, die Seine Gebote, die in den Heiligen Schriften geschrieben stehen, einhält.

Das ist es, was die *Iglesia Ni Cristo*von anderen religiösen Gruppen unterscheidet. Sie hält die Lehren der Bibel treu aufrecht, die den Menschen auf dem richtigen geistlichen Pfad führen. Was folgt, sind kurze Erklärungen der grundlegenden Glaubensrichtungen der *Iglesia Ni Cristo*, welche in folgende Themenbereiche eingeordnet sind:

[Die Heiligen Schriften](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-holy-scriptures-deutsch/)[Der Heilige Geist](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-holy-spirit-deutsch/)[Die Kirche und die Errettung](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-and-salvation-deutsch/)[Die Verehrung zu Gott](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-deutsch/)[Die Auferstehung der Toten](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-resurrection-of-the-dead-deutsch/)[Ein Gott, der Vater](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-deutsch/)[Die Boten oder die Gesandten Gottes](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-messengers-of-god-deutsch/)[Die Taufe](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-deutsch/)[Die Brüderlichkeit](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-deutsch/)[Tag des Jüngsten Gerichts](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-deutsch/)[Der Herr Jesus Christus](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-lord-jesus-christ-deutsch/)[Gottes Erwählung](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-deutsch/)[Die Kirchenverwaltung](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administration-deutsch/)[Die christliche Einheit](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-deutsch/)[Die Heilige Stadt, das neue Jerusalem](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-holy-city-new-jerusalem-deutsch/)![](https://21prd-incnet.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/15144614/sealforweb-01.png)

Español - Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)

## Lo que creemos

Español

[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-francais/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-italiano/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-portugues/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-deutsch/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-filipino/)

“¿CUÁL ES LA DIFERENCIA?”  Esto es lo que comúnmente pregunta la gente sobre la Iglesia De Cristo. Y no les culpamos, porque es perfectamente comprensible y legítimo preguntar sobre la diferencia de la Iglesia De Cristo de otras religiones.

El conjunto de creencias que sostiene una organización religiosa dice mucho sobre la clase de religión que es. La religión que Dios reconoce como digna es la que se adhiere a Sus enseñanzas escritas en las Sagradas Escrituras.

Esto es lo que distingue a la Iglesia De Cristo de otros grupos religiosos. Sostiene fielmente las enseñanzas de la Biblia que conduce a la gente al camino correcto. A continuación, están unas breves explicaciones de las creencias fundamentales de la Iglesia De Cristo clasificadas en estos temas:

[Las Sagradas Escrituras](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-holy-scriptures-espanol/)[El Espíritu Santo](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-holy-spirit-espanol/)[La Iglesia Y La Salvación](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-and-salvation-espanol/)[La adoración a Dios](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-espanol/)[La Resurrección De Los Muertos](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-resurrection-of-the-dead-espanol/)[Un Dios, el Padre](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-espanol/)[Los Mensajeros De Dios](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-messengers-of-god-espanol/)[Acerca El Bautismo](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-espanol/)[La Hermandad](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-espanol/)[Día del juicio](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-espanol/)[El Señor Jesucristo](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-lord-jesus-christ-espanol/)[La Elección de Dios](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-espanol/)[Acerca La Administración De La Iglesia](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administrastion-espanol/)[La Unidad Cristiana](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-espanol/)[La Ciudad Santa, La Nueva Jerusalén](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-holy-city-new-jerusalem-espanol/)![](https://21prd-incnet.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/15144614/sealforweb-01.png)

Filipino - Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)

## Ang Aming Sinasampalatayanan

Filipino

[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-francais/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-italiano/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-portugues/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-deutsch/)
[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-espanol/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

“ANO ANG KAIBAHAN niyan?” Ito ang karaniwang itinatanong ng iba patungkol sa *Iglesia Ni Cristo*. At hindi naman natin sila masisisi sapagkat talagang makatuwiran na itanong kung ano ang ikinaiiba ng *Iglesia Ni Cristo*sa ibang mga relihiyon.

Ang kalipunan ng mga aral na itinataguyod ng isang organisasyong pangrelihiyon ay napakahalaga sa pagsukat kung anong uring relihiyon ito. Ang relihiyong itinuturing ng Diyos na karapat-dapat ay ang sumusunod sa Kaniyang mga aral na nakasulat sa mga Banal na Kasulatan.

Ito ang ikinatatangi ng Iglesia Ni Cristo sa ibang mga relihiyon. Matapat nitong pinanghahawakan ang mga aral ng Biblia na naghahatid sa tao sa tamang daan. Narito ang isang maikling paglalahad ng mga pangunahing aral na sinasampalatayanan ng Iglesia Ni Cristo tungkol sa mga sumusunod na paksa:

[Ang Banal na Kasulatan](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-holy-scriptures-filipino/)[Ang Espiritu Santo](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-holy-spirit-filipino/)[Ang Iglesia at ang kaligtasan](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-and-salvation-filipino/)[Pagsamba sa Diyos](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-filipino/)[Ang pagkabuhay na mag-uli](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-resurrection-of-the-dead-filipino/)[Isang Diyos, ang Ama](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-holy-scriptures-filipino/)[Ang mga sugo ng Diyos](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-messengers-of-god-filipino/)[Tungkol sa bautismo](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-filipino/)[Ang kapatiran](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-filipino/)[Ang Araw ng Paghuhukom](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-filipino/)[Ang Panginoong Jesucristo](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-holy-scriptures-filipino/)[Ang kahalalang mula sa Diyos](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-filipino/)[Tungkol sa Pamamahala](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administration-filipino/)[Ang pagkakaisang Cristiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-filipino/)[Ang Bayang Banal, Bagong Jerusalem](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-holy-city-new-jerusalem-filipino/)![](https://21prd-incnet.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/15144614/sealforweb-01.png)

Français - Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)

## Ce que nous croyons

Français

[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-italiano/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-portugues/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-deutsch/)
[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-filipino/)

“QUELLE EST LA DIFFERENCE?” est la remarque que nous entendons souvent chez certains personnes découvrant l’Iglesia Ni Cristo (Église Du Christ). Et nous ne leur faisons aucun reproche car c’est une question légitime et sensée à poser: En quoi cette Église est-elle différente des autres religions?

Les croyances adoptées par une organisation religieuse en dit long sur sa véritable nature. La religion que Dieu juge digne est celle qui est en accord avec Ses enseignements écrits dans les Saintes Écritures.

C’est ce qui différentie l’Iglesia Ni Cristo des autres groupes religieux. Elle suit fidèlement les enseignements de la Bible, qui mènent sur la voie spirituelle juste. Voici de brèves explications sur les croyances fondamentales de l’Iglesia Ni Cristo, selon les thèmes suivants:

[Les Saintes Écritures](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-holy-scriptures-francais/)[Le Saint-Esprit](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-holy-spirit-francais/)[L’Église Et le Salut](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-and-salvation-francais/)[L’Adoration de Dieu](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-francais/)[La Résurrection Des Morts](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-resurrection-of-the-dead-francais/)[Un Dieu, le Père](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-francais/)[Les Messagers de Dieu](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-messengers-of-god-francais/)[Sur le Baptême](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-francais/)[La Fraternité](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-francais/)[Jour du jugement dernier](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-francais/)[Le Seigneur Jésus-Christ](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-lord-jesus-christ-francais/)[L’Élection de Dieu](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-francais/)[Sur l’Administration de l’Église](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administration-francais/)[L’Unité Chrétienne](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-francais/)[La Ville Sainte, La Nouvelle Jérusalem](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-holy-city-new-jerusalem-francais/)![](https://21prd-incnet.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/15144614/sealforweb-01.png)

Italiano - Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)

## Ciò in cui crediamo

Italiano

[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-francais/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-portugues/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-deutsch/)
[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-filipino/)

“QUAL È LA DIFFERENZA?” Questa è la solita domanda che pongono le persone riguardo alla *Iglesia Ni Cristo (*Chiesa Di Cristo). E non possiamo dar loro torto, poiché è giusto e lecito domandare in che modo la Chiesa Di Cristo differisce dalle altre religioni.

L’insieme delle dottrine che un’organizzazione religiosa sostiene ci dice molto riguardo alla sua vera natura. La religione che Dio considera degna è quella che è conforme ai Suoi insegnamenti scritti nelle Sacre Scritture.

Questo è ció che distingue la Chiesa Di Cristo dagli altri gruppi religiosi. Essa sostiene fedelmente gli insegnamenti della Bibbia, che guidano l’uomo verso la retta via spirituale. Ecco di seguito una breve spiegazione degli insegnamenti principali in cui ha fede la *Iglesia Ni Cristo*, riguardanti i seguenti temi:

[Le Sacre Scritture](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-holy-scriptures-italiano/)[Lo Spirito Santo](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-holy-spirit-italiano/)[La Chiesa E La Salvezza](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-and-salvation-italiano/)[L’Adorazione di Dio](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-italiano/)[La Risurrezione Dei Morti](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-resurrection-of-the-dead-italiano/)[Un Dio, Il Padre](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-italiano/)[Il Messaggero Di Dio](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-messengers-of-god-italiano/)[Riguardo Al Battesimo](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-italiano/)[La Fratellanza](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-italiano/)[Giorno del Giudizio](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-italiano/)[Il Signore Gesù Cristo](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-lord-jesus-christ-italiano/)[L’Elezione Di Dio](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-italiano/)[Riguardo All’Amministrazione Della Chiesa](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administration-italiano/)[L’Unità Cristiana](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-italiano/)[La Città Santa, La Nuova Gerusalemme](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-holy-city-new-jerusalem-italiano/)![](https://21prd-incnet.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/15144614/sealforweb-01.png)

Português - Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)

## O que acreditamos

Português

[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-francais/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-italiano/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-deutsch/)
[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-filipino/)

QUAL É A DIFERENÇA”? é a pergunta que frequentemente ouvimos de algumas pessoas que se depararam com a Iglesia Ni Cristo (Igreja De Cristo). E não as culpamos porque é uma pergunta perfeitamente sólida e legítima perguntar como esta Igreja difere das outras religiões.

O conjunto das crenças sustentadas por uma organização religiosa diz muito sobre o seu verdadeiro caráter. A religião que Deus considera digna é aquela que segue os Seus ensinamentos escritos nas Sagradas Escrituras.

É isso que distingue a Iglesia Ni Cristo dos outros grupos religiosos. Ela sustenta fielmente os ensinamentos da Bíblia, que levam ao caminho espiritual correto. O que segue são breves explicações sobre as crenças fundamentais da Iglesia Ni Cristo conforme classificadas nestes tópicos:

[As Escrituras Sagradas](https://iglesianicristo.net/?elementor_library=the-holy-scriptures-2)[O Espírito Santo](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-holy-spirit-portugues/)[A Igreja e a Salvação](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-and-salvation-portugues/)[Adoração À Deus](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-portugues/)[A Ressurreição Dos Mortos](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-resurrection-of-the-dead-portugues/)[Um Deus, O Pai](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-portugues/)[Os Mensageiros de Deus](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-messengers-of-god-portugues/)[Sobre o Batismo](https://iglesianicristo.net/baptism-portugues/)[A Irmandade](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-portugues/)[Dia do Julgamento](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-portugues/)[O Senhor Jesus Cristo](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-lord-jesus-christ-portugues/)[Eleição De Deus](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-portugues/)[Sobre a Administração da Igreja](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administration-portugues/)[A União Cristã](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-portugues/)[A Cidade Santa, Nova Jerusalém](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-holy-city-new-jerusalem-portugues/)![](https://21prd-incnet.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/15144614/sealforweb-01.png)

## God's Election

ENGLISH

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-portugues/)

The *Iglesia Ni Cristo*believes that since ancient times, God has set apart His people to serve Him. Outside this election, man cannot render services acceptable to God (Ps. 4:3; Prov. 1:28).

Those whom God had chosen in the patriarchal times were Seth, Noah, and Abraham. Then He set apart the Israelites. But the Israelites did not remain faithful to the covenant of God (Gen. 17; Dan. 9:11).

After the fall of Israel, it was replaced with the Church Of Christ (I Pet. 2:9, 3-5; Matt. 16:18; Rom. 16:16; Acts 20:28, Lamsa Translation). Eventually, after the death of the Apostles, this Church which was established by Christ in the first century departed from the true faith. It was apostatized (Matt. 24:4, 11; Acts 20:29-30; I Tim. 4:1-3).

In these last days, God sent His messenger to administer man’s return to the true teachings of the Church. And it is in the Philippines (in the Far East) where God sent an angel or messenger to preach the true and pure Gospel of Christ to the people in order to bring them back to the true Church (Rev. 7:2-3; Isa. 43:5-7).

[The people whom God has set apart for His own](https://www.pasugo.com.ph/the-people-whom-god-has-set-apart-for-his-own/)

RELATED LINKS

[The war referred to in Revelation 7:1-3](https://www.pasugo.com.ph/the-war-referred-to-in-revelation-71-3/)[The Man Who established the Church that is of God](https://www.pasugo.com.ph/the-man-who-established-the-church-that-is-of-god/)![](https://21prd-incnet.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/15144614/sealforweb-01.png)

Menu Search Search Close this search box. [Beliefs / Judgment Day](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## Judgment Day

ENGLISH

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-portugues/)

We believe in the Lord Jesus Christ’s promise that He will return (John 14:1-3). This promise was echoed by the apostles (I Thess. 4:15-16). Members of the Church are commanded to prepare for [Christ](https://incmedia.org/when-is-jesus-coming-back/)’s return for no one knows exactly when that would be, except God, the Father (Matt. 24:36, 42, 44).

Christ, however, knew and told us the signs that herald His return and these are wars, famines, earthquakes in different places, as well as increasing hardships and wickedness, which will cause many people’s love for God to grow cold (Matt. 24:6-8, 12). The day of Christ’s return is the Day of Judgment and destruction of ungodly men.

On that day, the heavens will pass away with a loud noise, and the elements will be dissolved with fire and be burned up (II Pet. 3:7, 10). The cry on the day of the Lord will be bitter, for even the bravest of people will cry out in despair. Neither their silver nor gold will be able to save them on the day of the Lord’s wrath (Zeph. 1:14, 18).

## Link 1

RELATED LINK

[Judgment Day](https://incmedia.org/judgment-day/)

Menu Search Search Close this search box. [Beliefs / The Brotherhood](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## The Brotherhood

ENGLISH

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-portugues/)

The *Iglesia Ni Cristo*believes that members of the true Church Of Christ should uphold the love of brotherhood (I Pet. 2:17). Christ established a brotherhood inside the Church Of Christ (Matt. 23:8). That is why members of the Church address one another as brother and sister.

*Iglesia Ni Cristo*members should love one another as commanded by Christ and as taught by the Apostles. This shows that they are the true disciples of Christ (John 13:34-35; I Pet. 2:17).

It is evil to hate any brother or sister in the Church. Who does so is considered a murderer and shall not attain everlasting life (I John 3:15).

To maintain the love for brotherhood in the Church, members who have misunderstanding or disputes are commanded to reconcile (Matt. 5:23-25; Eph. 4:32).

## The Christian Unity

ENGLISH

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-portugues/)

The *Iglesia Ni Cristo*subscribes to sacred unity. This is absolute unity, for in this unity, [God, Christ, and the Church are joined together or united](https://incmedia.org/if-theres-one-bible-why-are-there-many-churches/)(John 17:23, 21).

We observe this unity in the name of Christ, to the glory of God (I Cor. 1:10; 10:31). Division or schism is strictly forbidden because Christ is not divided. Divisions and strife are earthly, sensual, and devilish (I Cor. 1:10, 13; James 3:14-15).

## The Church Administration

ENGLISH

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administrastion-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administration-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administration-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administration-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administration-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administration-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administration-portugues/)

The *Iglesia Ni Cristo*believes that every member is duty-bound to submit himself to the Church Administration because it is God’s commandment (Heb. 13:17). This is so because God entrusted to the Administration the message and the ministry of reconciliation (II Cor. 5:18-20). To submit to the Administration is to be bound by its instructions (Matt. 18:18). To abide by the decisions laid down by the Administration is to abide by the words of Christ (Acts 16:4; Luke 10:16).

## The Church and Salvation

ENGLISH

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-and-salvation-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-and-salvation-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-and-salvation-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-and-salvation-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-and-salvation-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-and-salvation-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-and-salvation-portugues/)

The *Iglesia Ni Cristo*believes that membership in the Church Of Christ is the only means for people to receive the salvation that the Savior Jesus Christ brings. All people need salvation, for all have sinned, hence, all of mankind are to die in the lake of fire, the wages of sins (Rom. 5:12; 6:23; Rev. 20:14). For people to be saved, he should enter in by Christ, by becoming a member of His body or Church (John 10:9; I Cor. 12:27; Col. 1:18) because it is His Church that Christ will save (Eph. 5:23).

Christ will not save anyone outside the Church Of Christ because it would be against the law of God. His law requires that sinners should pay for their own sin (Deut. 24:16; Rev. 20:14).

[Ang kinaroroonan ng kaligtasan](https://www.pasugo.com.ph/ang-kinaroroonan-ng-kaligtasan/)

## The Holy City, New Jerusalem

ENGLISH

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-holy-city-new-jerusalem-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-holy-city-new-jerusalem-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-holy-city-new-jerusalem-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-holy-city-new-jerusalem-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-holy-city-new-jerusalem-italiano)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-holy-city-new-jerusalem-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-holy-city-new-jerusalem-portugues/)

The *Iglesia Ni Cristo*believes that there is a Holy City being prepared by Christ and promised to His disciples to which He will bring them on His return (John 14:2-3). The Holy City is glorious, having the glory of God (Rev. 21:10-21). This is the future home of the members of the Church Of Christ who stay faithful up to the end. Life in the Holy City is perfect—no need for sun and moon and no night (Rev. 21:23-25; 22:5), no food and water shortages (Rev. 22:1-2), no more curse (Rev. 22:3), no hunger, thirst, sorrow, pain, death, evil (Rev. 7:15-17; 21:4).

Only those given [by the Father to Christ](https://incmedia.org/what-does-god-require-of-me-to-get-right-with-him/)can enter the New Jerusalem (John 17:12). And those given to Christ are called by God into the fellowship with Christ (I Cor. 1:9) and this calling is done by means of the Gospel as preached by God’s messengers (II Thess. 2:14; II Cor. 5:19-20). Those who are called are gathered in one body (Col. 3:15) which is the Church (Col. 1:18) called the Church Of Christ, *Iglesia Ni Cristo*in Filipino (Rom. 16:16; Acts 20:28, Lamsa Translation).
