## The Holy Scriptures

ENGLISH

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-holy-scriptures-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-holy-scriptures-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-holy-scriptures-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-holy-scritpures-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-holy-scriptures-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-holy-scriptures-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-holy-scriptures-portugues/)

We believe that the Bible is the sole basis of faith and service to God. The Gospel is the power of God unto salvation to those who believe, for in it the righteousness of God is revealed (Rom. 1:16-17). The Holy Scriptures is inspired by God and profitable for teaching, for doctrine, for reproof, for correction, and for instruction in righteousness, that the man of God may be perfect, thoroughly furnished for all good works (II Tim. 3:15-17).

God has purposely hidden His words in mystery (Rom. 16:25), so that men who strive to understand the Scripture through their own worldly knowledge can never come to know the truth (II Tim. 3:7). The gospel preached by those who are not sent by God is called by the Apostles “another gospel” (Gal. 1:6-7). And the use of the Gospel which deviates from the truth or from its true meaning will ineluctably lead to perdition (II Pet. 3:15-16).

[La Bible Est-Elle Un Fait ou Une Fiction?](https://youtu.be/EQ51HWitPQ0?si=EUpJEZp74tCbI7Ws)

Related links

[The Bible and the true faith](https://www.pasugo.com.ph/the-bible-and-the-true-faith/)[How Do We Know the Bible is God’s Word?](https://incmedia.org/how-do-we-know-the-bible-is-gods-word/)![](https://21prd-incnet.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/15144614/sealforweb-01.png)

## The Holy Spirit

ENGLISH

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-holy-spirit-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-holy-spirit-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-holy-spirit-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-holy-spirit-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-holy-spirit-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-holy-spirit-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-holy-spirit-portugues/)

We believe that the Holy Spirit is the power (Acts 1:8) sent by the Father in the name of Christ, to teach and remind His messengers of all things that Christ said (John 14:26).

Christ also sends the Holy Spirit to help us in our weaknesses and infirmities (John 15:26; Rom. 8:26). The Holy Spirit strengthens, edifies, and comforts the Church Of Christ (Eph. 3:16-17; John 14:26). And although the Holy Spirit is a spirit, never does the Scriptures refer to it as “God the Holy Spirit” because it is not God but one of the spirits being sent by God.

## The Lord Jesus Christ

ENGLISH

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-lord-jesus-christ-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-lord-jesus-christ-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-lord-jesus-christ-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-lord-jesus-christ-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-lord-jesus-christ-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-lord-jesus-christ-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-lord-jesus-christ-portugues/)

The *Iglesia Ni Cristo*believes that the Lord Jesus Christ, the Son of God (Matt. 3:17), is the one and only Savior given by God (Acts 13:23). Christ is the sole mediator between God and man (I Tim. 2:5) and the only way to God (John 14:6).

But we do not subscribe to the belief that Christ is a God-Man or both God and man. He is man in nature according to His own testimony (John 8:40) and the teachings of His Apostles (I Tim. 2:5; Matt. 1:18).

The attributes of a human being are found in Christ. He hungered (Matt. 4:2), thirsted (John 19:28), became weary or tired (John 4:6), slept (Matt. 8:24), and died (Matt. 27:50; I Cor. 15:3). However, Christ as distinct from all other men, is the only one Who did not sin (I Pet. 2:21-22; Heb. 4:15).

He has been exalted by God and given a name above all other names, that at the name of Christ every knee should bow, those in heaven, and those on earth (Phil. 2:9-11). He has been placed by God far above all principality, power, might and dominion, and every name that is named, and all things have been put under His feet (Eph. 1:21-22). Christ will eventually subject all His power and authority to the true God (I Cor. 15:27-28). He had in so many instances introduced Himself as the Son of God but never did He appropriate the title “God” nor “God the Son” for Himself because He is not God but a man.

## The Messengers of God

ENGLISH

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-messengers-of-god-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-messengers-of-god-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-messengers-of-god-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-messengers-of-god-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-messengers-of-god-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-messengers-of-god-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-messengers-of-god-portugues/)

The *Iglesia Ni Cristo*believes that the task of understanding God’s words in the Bible, and teaching them without any alteration, without adding or diminishing, is given exclusively to the messengers of God (Mark 4:11-12; Rom. 10:15; Deut. 12:32).

We believe that the late [Brother Felix Y. Manalo](https://incmedia.org/what-we-believe-about-brother-felix-y-manalo/)is God’s messenger in these last days; he was the fulfillment of the Biblical prophecies concerning the messenger from the Far East (Rev. 7:2-3) who would preach to God’s sons and daughters in our time (Isa. 43:5-6; 46:11; 41:9-11). God reveals the meaning of His words to His messengers by means of the Holy Spirit (II Pet. 1:20-21), and the proof that the messengers were inspired by the Holy Spirit is that their teachings never contradict one another (I Cor. 2:13).

[Why we firmly believe Brother Felix Y. Manalo is God’s Messenger](https://www.pasugo.com.ph/why-we-firmly-believe-brother-felix-y-manalo-is-gods-messenger/)

RELATED LINKS

[What We Believe About Brother Felix Y. Manalo](https://youtu.be/-8E4UzAGxqM?si=V9_rWO_M21ph8VrT)

## The Resurrection of the Dead

ENGLISH

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-resurrection-of-the-dead-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-resurrection-of-the-dead-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-resurrection-of-the-dead-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-resurrection-of-the-dead-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-resurrection-of-the-dead-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-resurrection-of-the-dead-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-resurrection-of-the-dead-portugues/)

The *Iglesia Ni Cristo*believes that the dead will be resurrected. Christ would not have been [resurrected](https://incmedia.org/why-did-jesus-die/)if there were no resurrection of the dead (I Cor. 15:12-13).

There are two kinds of resurrection: those who have done good [will rise and live](https://incmedia.org/getting-to-heaven/), and those who have done evil will rise and be condemned (John 5:28-29; Rev. 20:14).

Church Of Christ members who passed away will be resurrected on the day of Christ’s return (I Cor. 15:23) and the faithful who are alive shall, without dying, meet Christ in the air to be with Him in the dwelling place that He has prepared for them (I Thess. 4:16-17).

## Worship of God

ENGLISH

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-portugues/)

The *Iglesia Ni Cristo*believes that it is the [whole duty of man](https://incmedia.org/what-is-the-meaning-of-life/)to worship God and keep His commandments. Worship of God is man’s inherent obligation because He created us. Hence, we do not belong to ourselves but to God (Ps. 95:6-7; 100:3).

Worship of God should be done in spirit and in truth (John 4:23-24). God’s name should be worship—this is worship in spirit; and His will should be done by obeying His words—this is worship in truth (Matt. 6:9-10; John 17:17).

The Church Of Christ in these last days, or the *Iglesia Ni Cristo*, in Filipino (like the first-century Church Of Christ), observes the worship service which is characterized by psalms and hymn singing, prayers, studying the words of God, and offerings (I Cor. 14:26, 15; 16:2).

The *Iglesia Ni Cristo*performs offerings and contributions as God’s commandment that should not be forgotten and with which God is well pleased (Heb. 13:16). Every member of the Church Of Christ should give according to the dictates of the heart, for God loves a cheerful giver (II Cor. 9:7). The contributions should be prepared beforehand so that they may be voluntary and not compulsory. The faithful set aside and keep a certain sum proportionate to their gain or the blessings that God bestows on them (I Cor. 16:1-2; Deut. 16:16-17).

Christ Himself highly regards the assembling together of the Church Of Christ in congregational worship services, because every time His Church congregates, He is there in their midst by means of His Spirit (Matt. 18:20; Gal. 4:6).

Congregational worship service is of extreme importance in the Church Of Christ that is why members are strictly forbidden to forsake it. To willfully forsake it is a grave sin (Heb. 10:25-27).

## What We Believe

ENGLISH

[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-filipino/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-francais/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-italiano/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-portugues/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-deutsch/)
[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/beliefs-espanol/)

“WHAT’S THE DIFFERENCE?” is the usual remark we hear from some people who have come across the *Iglesia Ni Cristo*(Church Of Christ). And we don’t blame them because it is a perfectly sound and legitimate question to ask how this Church differs from other religions.

The set of beliefs upheld by a religious organization says a lot about its true character. The religion that God deems worthy is that which adheres to His teachings written in the Holy Scriptures.

This is what distinguishes the *Iglesia Ni Cristo*from other religious groups. It faithfully upholds the teachings of the Bible, which lead to the right spiritual path. What follows are brief explanations of the fundamental beliefs of the *Iglesia Ni Cristo*as classified into these topics:

[The Holy Scriptures](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/the-holy-scriptures/)[The Holy Spirit](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/the-holy-spirit/)[The Church and Salvation](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/the-church-and-salvation/)[Worship of God](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/worship-of-god/)[The Resurrectionof the Dead](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/the-resurrection-of-the-dead/)[One God, the Father](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father/)[The Messengers of God](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/the-messengers-of-god/)[Baptism](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/baptism/)[The Brotherhood](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/the-brotherhood/)[Judgment Day](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/judgment-day/)[The Lord Jesus Christ](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/the-lord-jesus-christ/)[God's Election](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/gods-election/)[The Church Administration](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/the-church-administration/)[The Christian Unity](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/the-christian-unity/)[The Holy City,New Jerusalem](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/the-holy-city-new-jerusalem/)![](https://21prd-incnet.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/15144614/sealforweb-01.png)

## Caloocan North hold simultaneous evangelical mission

By JOSE PRIMO RIVERA Jr.

Posted: January 19, 2026

Previous slide Next slide

Simultaneous evangelical missions in the [Ecclesiastical District of Caloocan North](https://directory.iglesianicristo.net/districts/caloocan-north)were held on January 9, 2026. The venues were the local congregations’ houses of worship. Ministers of the gospel were assigned to preach a Scripture-based lesson on how man can be saved on Judgment Day.

The district’s Light of Salvation office reported that more than 5,500 guests attended throughout the district.

On his part, district supervising minister Brother Ariel B. Barzaga led the evangelical mission that was held at the [Local Congregation of Bagong Silang 5](https://directory.iglesianicristo.net/locales/bagong-silang-v). In an interview afterwards, he said, “The best way to start the new year is for Christians to be seen ever zealous in the Church’s works. The brethren made effort to bring guests for them to know about biblical truths. This is in obedience to God’s will.”

Brother Barzaga exhorted the attendees to observe the extraordinary events in the world at present. He taught from the Bible that these are the signs of the nearing end. He then read from the Scriptures how one can secure their own salvation. Amid the large number of religions today, the Bible teaches that salvation can only be attained in the true Church Of Christ.

A guest in Bagong Silang 5, Charlita Bonifacio who is a Catholic said, “I truly believe that God’s words are written in the Bible. The one who taught preached purely from the Scriptures. I think this shows that this Church does what God wills.”

“It is true that people belong to various beliefs and churches. But as the minister read from the Bible, people can truly serve God inside the Church Of Christ. It was made clear how this Church is the only true Church taught in the Bible,” said Maribel Garcia, a guest who attended the proclamation of God’s words at the [Local Congregation of Saranay](https://directory.iglesianicristo.net/locales/saranay)which was officiated by assistant district supervising minister Brother Erman Bendicio.

Along with hundreds more, Garcia and Bonifacio expressed their desire to become Bible students in the Church. — With assistance from Bryan Langit and Alyssa Matarlo

For more news, visit INC News and Updates

## CAMANAVA evangelical missions draw thousands of guests

By VINCE T. BASCO

Posted: January 24, 2026

Previous slide Next slide

All 35 local congregations in the [Ecclesiastical District of CAMANAVA](https://directory.iglesianicristo.net/districts/metro-manila-north), in the Philippines, united in bringing more than 5,000 guests to attend [evangelical missions](https://iglesianicristo.net/evangelism/)held in their respective houses of worship on January 12, 2026.

More than 8,000 Church members took part in this propagation activity by inviting friends, loved ones, and neighbors to listen to the proclamation of the [God](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/one-god-the-father/)’s words.

Ministers assigned in the district led by the district supervising minister Brother Bedanio Ubaldo, who was in the [Local Congregation of Polo](https://directory.iglesianicristo.net/locales/polo), preached the pristine gospel for the sake of the guests. Through various Bible-based lessons, the ministers explained the importance of being members of Christ’s one and only Church, which is the [Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ)](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/).

“This evangelical mission is for the glory of the Lord God,” said Polo Congregation resident minister Brother Isagani Clemente Jr. as the activities’ primary goal. “We’ll continue to invite many guests in venues of Bible studies and worship services for them to further understand the [teachings of God](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)that we firmly believe in the Church Of Christ.”

“In response to the call of the [Executive Minister Brother Eduardo V. Manalo](https://www.pasugo.com.ph/brother-eduardo-v-manalo-edifying-and-leading-the-flock-towards-salvation/)to spread the true faith, we’re inspired in our local congregation to bring many guests to evangelical missions,” said deacon Mark Angelo Del Rosario from the Valenzuela Congregation. “The Executive Minister’s message deeply resonates in our hearts and minds. Thus, households in our congregation are joyfully and actively participating in this holy work.” — With assistance from Raul Batayola Jr. and Rosanna Ramos

For more news, visit INC News and Updates

Central Valley evangelical missions expound about the true Church [Skip to content](#content)

## Central Valley evangelical missions expound about the true Church

By VINCE T. BASCO

Posted: January 21, 2026

Previous slide Next slide

All local congregations in the [Ecclesiastical District of Central Valley, California](https://iglesianicristo.net/directory/districts/central-valley-california)held [evangelical missions](https://iglesianicristo.net/evangelism/)on January 10, 2026 in their respective houses of worship. Brethren brought many guests to listen to the preaching of God’s words about the true Church.

Each congregation’s resident minister or ministerial workers preached about the inevitability of joining the [Church Of Christ](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/), or *Iglesia Ni Cristo*. They proved through Bible verse that it is solely through this Church, being the only one founded by Christ, where people can conduct acceptable worship and services to [God](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/one-god-the-father/)towards receiving His promise of salvation on Judgment Day.

Guests expressed appreciation for the warm reception, with many describing the experience as both enlightening and uplifting.

“I’m inspired to know that God sent [Christ](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/the-lord-jesus-christ/)to establish the one true Church,” said guest Nina Rodriguez who attended at the [Orosi Congregation](https://iglesianicristo.net/directory/locales/orosi). After the Bible study, she enlisted herself as a Bible student. “I want to know more about the true Church,” she added.

“I’m happy and thankful to the Almighty God because my prayers, to help someone become a Bible student, have been answered,” said deaconess Estenely Acoba Aglipay who invited Rodriguez. “I always support this holy endeavor for I firmly believe that it’s my duty to bear fruits of holiness that give glory and honor to God.” — With assistance from Melissa Benedicto

For more news, visit INC News and Updates

Cristiano, hindi sa pangalan lamang [Skip to content](#content)

Menu Search Search Close this search box.

## Cristiano, hindi sa pangalan lamang

Maraming tao ang nagsasabi na sila’y Cristiano, subalit itinuturo ng Biblia na ang pagiging tunay na tagasunod ni Cristo ay higit pa sa pangalan.

Ni DENNIS C. LOVENDINO

HALOS IKATLONG bahagi ng populasyon ng mundo—tinatayang 2.38 bilyong katao—ang nagpapakilalang sila ay Cristiano ( *worldpopulationreview.com*). Subalit taliwas sa malaganap na paniniwalang sapat na ang pagsampalataya sa Panginoong Jesucristo at sa Kaniyang mga aral para maibilang na Kaniyang tagasunod o Cristiano, itinuro ni Apostol Juan, isa sa mga haligi ng *Iglesia Ni Cristo*noong unang siglo, na ang pagiging Cristiano ay may kaakibat na pananagutan:

> “Maaaring sabihin ng isang tao, ‘Ako ay isang Cristiano; Ako ay nasa daan patungo sa langit; Ako ay na kay Cristo.’ Ngunit kung hindi naman niya ginagawa ang iniuutos sa kaniya ni Cristo na gawin niya, siya’y isang sinungaling.” (I Juan 2:4 Living Bible*)**

Maliwanag na ang pagiging Cristiano ay hindi isang katawagan o designasyon lamang na maaaring ikapit ninuman sa kaniyang sarili. Maaaring ang buong akala ng isang tao ay siya’y Cristiano, subalit kung tumatanggi siya o hindi siya sumusunod sa ipinag-uutos ni Cristo, nahuhulog lamang siya sa pagpapanggap, at gaya ng tahasang pahayag ng Biblia—siya’y isang sinungaling.

Ito ay sa dahilang ang Tagapagligtas mismo ang naghahanap sa mga nagsasabing sila’y kumikilala sa Kaniya bilang Panginoon na gawin nila ang Kaniyang sinasabi:

> “At bakit tinatawag ninyo ako, Panginoon, Panginoon, at di ninyo ginagawa ang mga bagay na aking sinasabi?” (Lucas 6:46)

Kaya, kung hindi matutugunan ng tao ang pananagutang sumunod sa mga utos ni Cristo, ang kaniyang pagiging tagasunod diumano ni Cristo o pagiging Cristiano ay isang pag-aangkin lamang.

## “At bakit tinatawag ninyo ako, Panginoon, Panginoon, at di ninyo ginagawa ang mga bagay na aking sinasabi?”

## Lucas 6:46

Ang pagiging tunay na Cristiano ay kailangang may pagpapatotoo mismo mula sa Panginoong Jesucristo. Bilang Pastor ng mga tupa, kilala Niya kung sino ang tunay na sa Kaniya:

> “Ako ang mabuting pastor; at nakikilala ko ang sariling akin, at ang sariling akin ay nakikilala ako, … Dinirinig ng aking mga tupa ang aking tinig, at sila’y aking nakikilala, at sila’y nagsisisunod sa akin.” (Juan 10:14, 27*)

Ipinaliwanag ni Cristo na ang mga taong hindi kabilang sa Kaniyang mga tupa, bagama’t kumikilala diumano sa Kaniya, ay hindi tunay na mananampalataya:

> “Datapuwa’t hindi kayo nagsisampalataya, sapagka’t hindi kayo sa aking mga tupa.” (Juan 10:26*)

Itinuro ni Cristo kung paano makikilala ang Kaniyang mga tupa at kung saan sila matatagpuan. Sila ang mga taong dininig ang Kaniyang tinig o sinunod ang Kaniyang utos na pumasok sa loob ng kawan:

> “Kaya muling nagsalita si Jesus: Buong katotohanang sinasabi ko sa inyo. Ako ang pintuan ng kulungan ng mga tupa. … Ako ang pintuan; ang sinumang taong pumasok sa loob ng kawan sa pamamagitan ko ay maliligtas. …” (Juan 10:7, 9 Revised English Bible*)**

Ang kawan kung saan masusumpungan ang mga tunay na tupa o alagad ni Cristo ay ang Iglesia na Kaniyang itinayo (Mat. 16:18)—ang *Iglesia Ni Cristo*:

> “Ingatan ninyo kung gayon ang inyong sarili at ang buong kawan na rito’y hinirang kayo ng Espiritu Santo na mga katiwala, upang pakanin ang iglesia ni Cristo na binili niya ng kaniyang dugo.” (Gawa 20:28 Lamsa Translation*)**

Samakatuwid, ang mga taong wala sa loob, bagkus ay nasa labas ng *Iglesia Ni Cristo*, sa kabila ng kanilang pagpapahayag at pag-aangkin sa pagiging alagad ni Cristo, ay Cristiano sa katawagan lamang. Sila ay hindi tunay na Cristiano.

Bilang mga tunay na Cristiano, ang mga kaanib ng *Iglesia Ni Cristo*ay inaasahang magtataglay ng “pagiisip, na ito’y na kay Cristo Jesus din naman” (Filip. 2:5).

## “Ingatan ninyo kung gayon ang inyong sarili at ang buong kawan na rito’y hinirang kayo ng Espiritu Santo na mga katiwala, upang pakanin ang iglesia ni Cristo na binili niya ng kaniyang dugo.”

## Gawa 20:28

## Lamsa Translation**

Ang pag-iisip ni Cristo ay ang “kaniyang di-makasariling kababaang-loob” (Filip. 2:5 Amplified Version 2015).** Pinatunayan Niya iyon sa pamamagitan ng walang pasubaling pagsunod sa kalooban ng Diyos, at “siya’y nagpakababa at naging masunurin hanggang sa kamatayan” (Filip. 2:8 New Pilipino Version).

Bilang tao, hindi naging magaan sa kalooban ni Cristo na harapin ang Kaniyang napipintong kamatayan, gayunma’y buong giting Niya iyong tinanggap bilang pagpapasakop sa kalooban ng Diyos. Ang sabi ni Cristo, “Ama ko, kung baga maaari, ay lumampas sa akin ang sarong ito: gayon ma’y **huwag ang ayon sa ibig ko, kundi ang ayon sa ibig mo**” (Mat. 26:39).*

Kaya, ang mga tunay na Cristiano sa ating panahon o ang mga kaanib ng *Iglesia Ni Cristo*ay nag-uukol ng napakataas na pagkilala sa Panginoong Jesucristo bilang kanilang huwaran sa pagiging masunurin sa Panginoong Diyos. Sinisikap nilang tularan ang Kaniyang di-makasariling kababaang-loob sa pamamagitan ng pagpapasakop sa kalooban ng Ama, sukdulang magtanggi sila ng kanilang sarili at magsakripisyo.

Anuman ang mangyari, sinisikap nilang makapamuhay “nang naayon sa ebanghelyo ni Cristo” (Filip. 1:27 npv). Bagama’t sila ay nasa “gitna ng isang lahing liko at masama,” nagpupunyagi silang makapanatiling “walang malay at malinis bilang mga anak ng Dios, na walang kapintasan” upang “magliwanag … sa gitna nila, tulad ng nagniningning na bituin sa kalangitan” (Filip. 2:15 npv).

Ang pagiging mapanalanginin ni Cristo sa Panginoong Diyos ay isang katangiang itinuturo sa mga kaanib ng Iglesia na sikaping maisabuhay:

> “Noong si Jesus ay namumuhay rito sa lupa, siya’y dumalangin at lumuluhang sumamo sa Diyos na makapagliligtas sa kanya sa kamatayan. At dininig siya dahil sa lubusan siyang nagpakumbaba.” (Heb. 5:7 Magandang Balita Biblia)*

Sa pagharap sa mga tukso, tinutularan din ng mga kapatid ang halimbawa ni Cristo, na nang tuksuhin ng diablo, ay nanghawak sa “nasusulat” (Mat. 4:1–11)—mga salita ng Diyos na nakasulat sa mga Banal na Kasulatan. Kaya, nagagawa nilang pagtagumpayan ang mga pakana ng diablo sa pamamagitan ng mahigpit nilang panghahawak sa mga aral ng Diyos na itinuro sa kanila ng Kaniyang Sugo sa mga huling araw at ng Pamamahala sa Iglesia.

Tunay ngang ibinubuhay ng mga tapat na kaanib ng *Iglesia Ni Cristo*ang kanilang pagiging tagasunod ni Cristo. Sila ay Cristiano sa isip, sa salita, at sa gawa—hindi sa pangalan lamang. ❑

* *Idinagdag ang pagdiriin*
** *Isinalin mula sa Ingles*

For more articles, visit [www.pasugo.com.ph](https://www.pasugo.com.ph/)

Edifying the members [Skip to content](#content)[About Us / Edifying the members](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/)

## Edifying the members

ENGLISH

[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/edifying-the-members-francais/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/edifying-the-members-italiano/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/edifying-the-members-portugues/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/edifying-the-members-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/edifying-the-members-deutsch/)
[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/edifying-the-members-espanol/)
[한국어](https://iglesianicristo.net/edifying-the-members-%ed%95%9c%ea%b5%ad%ec%96%b4/)
[繁體中文](https://iglesianicristo.net/edifying-the-members-%e7%b9%81%e9%ab%94%e4%b8%ad%e6%96%87/)

![Bro. EVM-Africa](https://21prd-incnet.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/11020127/Bro.-EVM-Africa-scaled.jpg)

Administering a global Church—with its wide-ranging concerns such as propagation of the faith, edification of its members, selection and training of Church officers, construction of worship buildings and Church offices, among many others—is a great challenge and an enormous task; it is no ordinary undertaking.

#### Church Administration

Rising up to the challenge, the Executive Minister does not cease laboring for the sake of the brethren but responds with an inspired and dynamic leadership—always trusting in God—the welfare of the Church always in his heart and mind. In fact, love for the Church is what motivates him to share even his life for the brethren, as what Apostle Paul said: “Because of our love for you we were ready to share with you not only the Good News from God but even our own lives. You were so dear to us!” (I Thess. 2:8, *Today’**s English Version*).

In addition, God bestowed on the Church Administration the authority to preach God’s commandments: “I have become its minister, according to God’s administration that was given to me for you, to make God’s message fully known” (Col. 1:25, *Holman Christian Standard Bible*). Thus, the Church Administration, through the help of ministers and ministerial workers, thoroughly teach and counsel the members—primarily through worship service lessons—in order to present each one perfect before the Lord Jesus on His Second Advent (Col. 1:28-29).

The Church Administration has also constructed buildings to serve as offices for the effective and efficient supervision of the members in their services to God. Foremost of these are the Church’s Central Office and other administrative buildings within its vast complex in Quezon City, Philippines. It has two main offices for its ecclesiastical districts in the Americas, one in England for Europe, and one in Japan for Northeast Asia.

#### Christian Family Organizations

The CFOs aim to strengthen the brotherhood within the Church and make every *Iglesia Ni Cristo*household worthy of salvation by promoting among its members a vibrant spiritual life. Through various worthwhile activities, the CFOs help instill Christian values to strengthen family relations toward a peaceful, secure, and happy life together.

*Buklod*(“bond”), the organization for married members envisions a strong husband-and-wife relationship leading to a family that is steadfast in faith and active in serving God. For this, it conducts activities for the strengthening of the bond of the husband and wife. It also assists them to learn and engage in noble and gainful livelihoods and encourages them to help in Church activities.

*KADIWA*or *Kabataang may Diwang Wagas*(Youth with Noble Intent), the organization for single members 18 years old and above, aims to prepare them for a bright future as well as for a married life under God’s blessing. It encourages them to participate in the multifarious activities of the Church, especially in disseminating and edifying the faith.

*Binhi*(seedling), the organization for baptized members 12 to 17 years old, instills in the youth the importance of knowledge and education while guiding them in right living and proper conduct. It also assists in tapping and honing their talents and skills in various disciplines such as literature, music, and arts.

*Pagsamba ng Kabataan (PNK)*or *Children’s Worship Service (CWS)*caters to the members’ children, 4 to 11 years old. Through the guidance of CWS officers, the Church Administration trains the children the proper worship of God and teaches them His words using age-appropriate methods to make it easier for them to understand the biblical lessons. The organization also carries out activities that edify their faith.

Previous slide Next slide

*Christian Brotherhood International.*The CBI caters to the youth of the Church who are studying. Activities are geared toward assisting them in their studies, helping them face life’s challenges, become responsible citizens, and most importantly, become strong and faithful Church members who never depart from the commands of God.

*Christian Employees Association.*CEA aims to promote harmonious relationship among employees and laborers and raise their level of efficiency in their respective work, based upon the tenets of the Bible.

*Christian Medical Dental and Paramedical Society.*CMDPS aims to create a network of Church members from the allied health professions for organizing free medical-dental and other health missions in every ecclesiastical district as part of the Church’s Aid to Humanity project.

[Christian Society for the Deaf](https://signlanguage.iglesianicristo.net/), Through the CSD, the Church provides a safe environment for the deaf and other differently-abled persons, embracing them with brotherly love and acceptance for their spiritual growth and self-development.

*Society of Communicators and Networkers International.*SCAN consists of licensed radio communicators advocating the responsible use of amateur radio communication in helping save people’s lives by, among others, assisting in emergency response and rescue operations during disasters and the like.

#### Sports

The Church holds sports activities through the **INC Unity Games**. Promoting not only health awareness and physical fitness, this multi-district, multi-sport event nurtures the love of brotherhood and further solidifies their Christian unity, inspiring them to a heightened fervor in serving God. The **EVM Cup**caters to ministers, ministerial workers, and volunteer workers with the INC Central Office and in the ecclesiastical districts.

#### Arts and Music

The Church Of Christ helps its members polish their creative talents in music and the arts and encourages them to use their gifts in giving praise to God. The Church conducts competitions and presentations to showcase its members’ creative works that highlight the true Christian way of living such as the following:

*INCinema*, where brethren in the districts hone their cinematic talents by producing original low-budget but quality films and stage plays that promote genuine Christian values. In recognition of such efforts and talents, the **Excellence in Visual Media Awards (EVM Awards)**are given to participants who excelled in different aspects of filmmaking and stage play production.

*INConcert*, musical presentations highlighting the brethren’s strong faith in the Lord God and the Lord Jesus Christ through original and inspirational song compositions.

*INC Life*, an exhibit of photographs that show the history of the Church and depict its continued success.

*Essay and Poetry Writing Contest,*wherein the brethren are able to express in writing their firm conviction as members of the Church.

*Oratorio*, a musical narrative about the Church Of Christ in these last days told purely through overtures, solos, recitatives, and choruses.

*EVM Art*, a contest in painting, drawing, and sculpture expressing the vision and mission of the *Iglesia Ni Cristo.*

*INC International Piano Competition*, launched for brethren who love classical piano music and where compositions of some of the world’s greatest composers are interpreted.

*INC Voice Competition*, aims to advance and promote excellence in the art of singing arias and art songs by world-renowned composers.

*Songs of Faith, Love, and Hope*, a singing competition for the various family organizations in the Church that highlights contemporary Christian Music.

![](https://21prd-incnet.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/15144614/sealforweb-01.png)

Menu Search Search Close this search box. [About Us / Sharing the faith](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/)

## Sharing the faith

ENGLISH

[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/sharing-the-faith-francais/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/sharing-the-faith-italiano/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/sharing-the-faith-portugues/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/sharing-the-faith-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/sharing-the-faith-deutsch/)
[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/sharing-the-faith-espanol/)
[한국어](https://iglesianicristo.net/sharing-the-faith-%ed%95%9c%ea%b5%ad%ec%96%b4/)
[繁體中文](https://iglesianicristo.net/sharing-the-faith-%e7%b9%81%e9%ab%94%e4%b8%ad%e6%96%87/)

Members of the *Iglesia Ni Cristo*gladly fulfill their duty to share the faith. They invite all people to attend Bible study sessions in their homes and evangelical missions held in the houses of worship and in public venues.

The Church Of Christ also uses mass media in spreading its message of hope to a broader audience.

[Pasugo: God’s Message](https://www.pasugo.com.ph/about/), the monthly official magazine of the Church, carries mainly religious articles and Church news and features. Its maiden issue came out in February 1939 and was called “Ang Pasugo.” In 1978, it released its first international edition called “God’s Message.” Since 2004, the two editions have been merged. Its official website is at [pasugo.com.ph](https://www.pasugo.com.ph/). Aside from the magazine, the Church also has other publications such as books, pamphlets, leaflets, and fliers for worldwide distribution.

[INCRadio](https://incradio.iglesianicristo.net/)DZEM 954kH, an AM radio station, began its broadcast in February 1969. A year prior, the Church had begun its radio evangelism through its religious programs aired over DZEC. INCRadio maintains a wide media presence through relay stations in various provinces and its own website that features live-streaming; its channels in YouTube, Facebook, and other social media sites; and its own mobile application.

Previous slide Next slide

[INCTV](https://inctv.iglesianicristo.net/)is the flagship television station of the Church Of Christ. The Church first ventured in TV evangelism with the “Ang Iglesia Ni Cristo” program which premiered over a major TV network in the Philippines in February 1983. NET25 opened in 2000 and GEMTV 49 in 2005. In 2012, the Christian Era Broadcasting Service International Incorporated (CEBSI) rebranded the latter as INCTV, which features an all- *Iglesia Ni Cristo*program format. Through Cable TV stations, the Church’s programs are also available for viewers outside the Philippines.

Aside from the official websites of Pasugo: God’s Message magazine, [INCTV](https://inctv.iglesianicristo.net/), and [INC Radio](https://incradio.iglesianicristo.net/), the Church also maintains websites such as [incmedia.org](https://incmedia.org/)and [incgiving.org](http://incgiving.org/)and social media pages for its [Christian Family Organizations](https://www.facebook.com/ChristianFamilyOrganizations/), [Iglesia Ni Cristo News Updates](https://www.facebook.com/IglesiaNiCristoNewsandUpdates/), [Iglesia Ni Cristo Media](https://www.facebook.com/IglesiaNiCristoMedia/).

The Church has also been utilizing videoconferencing and live-streaming technology to host international evangelical missions on-air and online. Likewise, mobile apps for INCTV and INCRadio are now available to all for free at app stores.

## For more about how we share our faith, visit:

God's Election-日本語 - Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)[信じている教え / 神の召し](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## 神の召し

日本語

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-deutsch/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/gods-election/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-portugues/)

*Iglesia Ni Cristo*は、古代から、神は御自分に仕える人を聖別されていると信じている。神の召しがなければ、人は神の御前にふさわしく仕えることができない（詩篇4:3; 箴言1:28）。

神が先祖の時代にお選びになったのは、セトとノア、そしてアブラハム。その後、神はイスラエルを聖別された。しかし、イスラエルは神の契約に忠実にとどまらなかった（創世17; ダニエル9:11）。

イスラエル堕罪の後、キリストの教会が取って代わった（Iペトロ2:9, 3-5; マタイ16:18; ローマ16:16; 使徒20:28 Lamsa）。使徒たちの死後、徐々に、一世紀にキリストによって建てられたこの教会は、真の信仰から離れた。信仰を捨てたのである（マタイ24:4, 11; 使徒20:29-30; Iテ モテ4:1-3）。

この終わりの時代、神は真の教会の教えへと人々を立ち帰ら  せるために、御使いをお遣わしになった。神はフィリピン（遠い東） に、天使または御使いを遣わし、真の教会へと人々を再び立ち連 れ戻すために、キリストの真の福 音を宣べ伝えさせられたのである（黙示録7:2-3;  イザヤ43:5-7）。

[The people whom God has set apart for His own](https://www.pasugo.com.ph/the-people-whom-god-has-set-apart-for-his-own/)

God's Election-Deutsch - Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)[Die Glaubensrichtungen / Gottes Erwählung](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## Gottes Erwählung

Deutsch

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-filipino/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/gods-election/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-portugues/)

Die *Iglesia Ni Cristo*glaubt fest, dass Gott, seit den früheren Zeiten, Menschen für Sich erwählt hat, die Ihm dienen werden. Außerhalb dieser Erwählung kann ein Mensch keine akzeptable Verehrung zu Gott darbringen (Ps. 4,3; Spr. 1,28).

Diejenigen, die Gott zu der Zeit der Väter für Sich erwählt hat, waren Set, Noach und Abraham, danach die Israeliten. Aber die Israeliten waren dem Bund Gottes nicht treu (Gen. 17; Dan. 9,11).

Nach dem Fall Israels wurden sie von der Kirche Christi ersetzt (1 Petr. 2,9; 3-5; Mt. 16,18; Röm. 16,16; Apg. 20,28 Lamsa). Und eventuell ist diese Kirche, die von Christus im ersten Jahrhundert gegründet wurde, nach dem Tod der Apostel, vom Glauben abgefallen. Sie wurde abtrünnig (Mt. 24,4; 11; Apg. 20,29-30; 1 Tim. 4,1-3).

In diesen letzten Tagen sandte Gott Seinen Boten, um die Rückkehr des Menschen zu den wahren Lehren der Kirche zu leiten. Und es war auf den Philippinen (im Fernen Osten), wo Gott einen Engel oder Boten sandte, damit dieser das wahre und reine Evangelium von Christus an die Menschen predigen kann, sodass sie in die wahre Kirche zurückkehren können (Offb. 7,2-3; Jes. 43,5-7).

[The people whom God has set apart for His own](https://www.pasugo.com.ph/the-people-whom-god-has-set-apart-for-his-own/)

God's Election-Español - Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)[Creencias / La Elección de Dios](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)Español

[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/gods-election/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-portugues/)

## La Elección de Dios

La Iglesia De Cristo cree que desde los tiempos antiguos, Dios apartó a Su nación para servirle. Fuera de esta elección, el hombre no puede rendir servicios aceptables por Dios (Sal. 4:3; Prov. 1:28).

Los que Dios escogió en el tiempo de los patriarcas eran Set, Noé y Abraham. Después, Él apartó a los Israelitas. Pero los Israelitas no permanecieron fieles al pacto de Dios (Gen. 17; Dan. 9:11).

Después de la caída de Israel, fue reemplazada por la Iglesia De Cristo (1 Ped. 2:9; 3-5; Mat. 16:18; Rom. 16:16; Hch. 20:28). Al final, después de la muerte de los Apóstoles, esta Iglesia, que fue establecida por Cristo en el primer siglo, se apartó de la verdadera fe. Fue apostatada (Mat. 24:4, 11; Hch. 20:29-30; 1 Tim. 4:1-3).

En estos últimos días, Dios envió a Su mensajero para administrar el regreso del hombre a las verdaderas enseñanzas de la Iglesia. Y es en Filipinas (en el Lejano Este) donde Dios envió a un ángel o mensajero para predicar el verdadero y puro Evangelio de Cristo a la gente para llevarles de nuevo a la verdadera Iglesia (Apo. 7:2-3; Isa. 43: 5-7).

[The people whom God has set apart for His own](https://www.pasugo.com.ph/the-people-whom-god-has-set-apart-for-his-own/)

God's Election-Filipino - Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)[Mga aral na sinasampalatayanan / Ang kahalalang mula sa Diyos](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## Ang kahalalang mula sa Diyos

Filipino

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-espanol/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/gods-election/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-portugues/)

Sumasampalataya ang *Iglesia Ni Cristo*na mula pa noong unang panahon ay ibinubukod ng Diyos ang mga taong maglilingkod sa Kaniya. Sa labas ng kahalalang ito, hindi magagawa ng tao ang paglilingkod na katanggap-tanggap sa Diyos (Awit 4:3; Kaw. 1:28).

Sina Set, Noe, at Abraham ang mga pinili ng Diyos sa panahon ng mga patriarka. Pagkatapos ay ibinukod Niya ang mga Israelita. Subalit, hindi nanatiling tapat ang mga Israelita sa tipan ng Diyos (Gen. 17; Dan. 9:11).

Matapos tumalikod ang Israel, ang *Iglesia Ni Cristo*ang ipinalit ng Diyos (I Ped. 2:9, 3-5; Mat. 16:18; Roma 16:16; Gawa 20:28, *Lamsa Translation*). Subalit, nang mamatay na ang mga apostol, ang Iglesiang ito na itinatag ni Cristo noong unang siglo ay humiwalay sa tunay na pananampalataya. Ito ay natalikod (Mat. 24:4, 11; Gawa 20:29-30; I Tim. 4:1-3).

Sa mga huling araw na ito, nagsugo ang Diyos ng mangangasiwa ng pagbabalik ng tao sa tunay na mga aral ng Iglesia. At ang Pilipinas (Malayong Silangan) ang dako kung saan nagsugo ang Diyos upang ipangaral sa mga tao ang tunay at dalisay na ebanghelyo ni Cristo para ibalik sila sa tunay na Iglesia (Apoc. 7:2-3; Isa. 43:5-7).

[The people whom God has set apart for His own](https://www.pasugo.com.ph/the-people-whom-god-has-set-apart-for-his-own/)

God's Election-Français - Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)[Croyances / L’Élection de Dieu](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## L’Élection de Dieu

Français

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-italiano/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/gods-election/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-portugues/)

L’ *Iglesia Ni Cristo*croit que depuis les temps anciens, Dieu met à part Son peuple pour Le servir. Sans cette élection, l’homme ne peut pas rendre de services acceptables à Dieu (Ps 4:3; Pr 1:28).

Ceux que Dieu a choisis durant le temps des patriarches étaient Seth, Noé et Abraham. Puis Il a mis à part les Israélites. Mais les Israélites ne sont pas restés fidèles à l’alliance de Dieu (Gn 17; Dn 9:11).

Après la chute d’Israël, elle a été remplacée par l’Église Du Christ (1 P 2:9, 3-5; Mt 16:18; Rm 16:16; Ac 20:28, Lamsa). Eventuellement, après la mort des Apôtres, cette Église qui a été établie par le Christ au premier siècle s’est détournée de la vraie foi. Elle a été apostasiée (Mt 24:4, 11; Ac 20:29-30; 1 Tm 4:1-3).

Dans ces derniers jours, Dieu a envoyé Son messager pour administrer le retour de l’homme aux vrais enseignements de l’Église. Et c’est aux Philippines (dans l’Extrême-Orient) où Dieu a envoyé un ange ou un messager pour prêcher la vraie et pure Évangile du Christ au peuple afin de les ramener à la vraie Église (Ap 7:2-3; Es 43:5-7).

[The people whom God has set apart for His own](https://www.pasugo.com.ph/the-people-whom-god-has-set-apart-for-his-own/)

God's Election-Italiano - Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)[Credenza / L’Elezione Di Dio](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## L’Elezione Di Dio

Italiano

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/gods-election/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-portugues/)

La Iglesia Ni Cristo crede che fin dai tempi antichi, Dio abbia scelto il Suo popolo per servirlo. Senza questa elezione, l’uomo non può rendere servizi accettabili a Dio (Sal. 4:3; Pro. 1:28).

Coloro che Dio scelse al tempo dei patriarchi furono Set, Noè e Abramo. Poi, ha scelto gli Israeliti. Però, gli Israeliti non rimasero fedeli al patto di Dio (Gen. 17; Dan. 9:11).

Dopo la caduta di Israele, essa è stata sostituita dalla Chiesa Di Cristo (1 Pi. 2:9, 3-5; Mat. 16:18; Rom. 16:16; Att. 20:28, Lamsa). Alla fine, dopo la morte degli Apostoli, questa Chiesa, edificata da Cristo nel primo secolo, sviò dalla vera fede. Essa subì l’apostasia. (Mat. 24:4, 11; Att. 20:29-30; 1 Ti. 4:1-3).

In questi ultimi giorni, Dio ha mandato il Suo messaggero ad amministrare il ritorno dell’uomo ai veri insegnamenti della Chiesa. Ed è nelle Filippine (nel lontano Oriente) che Dio ha mandato un angelo o messaggero per predicare il vero e puro Vangelo di Cristo alle persone, per riportarle alla vera Chiesa (Apo. 7:2-3; Isa. 43:5-7).

[The people whom God has set apart for His own](https://www.pasugo.com.ph/the-people-whom-god-has-set-apart-for-his-own/)

God's Election-Português - Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)[Crenças / Eleição De Deus](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## Eleição De Deus

Português

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/gods-election-francais/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/gods-election/)

A *Iglesia Ni Cristo*acredita que desde os tempos antigos, Deus separou o Seu povo para serví-Lo. Fora dessa eleição, o homem não pode prestar serviços aceitáveis à Deus (Salmos 4:3; Prov. 1:28).

Aqueles quem Deus tinha escolhido no período patriarcal foram Sete, Noé e Abraão. Depois, Ele separou os Israelitas. Porém, estes não permaneceram fiéis à aliança de Deus (Gen. 17; Daniel 9:11).

Após a queda de Israel, veio sua substituição pela Igreja De Cristo (I Ped. 2:9, 3-5; Mat. 16:18; Rom. 16:16; Atos 20:28 Lamsa). Eventualmente, após a morte dos Apóstolos, essa Igreja, a qual foi estabelecida por Cristo no primeiro século, desviouse da verdadeira fé. Era chegada a sua apostasia. (Mat. 24:3, 11; Atos 20:29-30; I Tim. 4:1-3).

Nestes últimos dias, Deus enviou Seu mensageiro para administrar o retorno do homem aos verdadeiros ensinamentos da Igreja. E é nas Filipinas (no Extremo Oriente) onde Deus enviou um anjo ou mensageiro para pregar o puro e verdadeiro Evangelho de Cristo às pessoas a fim de trazê-las de volta para a verdadeira Igreja. (Apoc. 7:2-3; Isa. 43:5-7).

[The people whom God has set apart for His own](https://www.pasugo.com.ph/the-people-whom-god-has-set-apart-for-his-own/)

## Hundreds of Mayon evacuees receive aid from the INC

By MARK ANDRO T. MILAN and MELJUN B. ESTRELLADO

“We have pocket money but it’s still hard to adjust here at the evacuation center as days go by. We may already be here but still our health’s at risk,” said Lourdes Suige of Mariroc Congregation.

“Since my youth, my family evacuates every time there’s an eruption,” said head deacon Jilbert Mujar of [Camalig Congregation](https://iglesianicristo.net/directory/locales/camalig). “Praises be to God for despite this recent unrest I and my family are still able to fulfill our Church duties, including our devotional prayers, so that God may help us through it all.”

Having respectively received relief packages, all those interviewed were not remiss in saying their heartfelt thanks. On behalf of those gathered at the evacuation centers, Municipal Social Welfare and Development Office staff Christian Bilolo said, “We’re very thankful having private donors, such as the *Iglesia Ni Cristo*, whose donations have truly been a great help to our day-to-day living here.” – With research assistance from Genedriel Balceda and Faye Praga, photos from Marichar Ojano, Joel Copla, and Alma Mae Cas

For more news, visit INC News and Updates

![](https://21prd-incnet.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/15144614/sealforweb-01.png)

International Voice Competition 2025 guidelines [Skip to content](#content)![](https://iglesianicristo.net/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/4th-Intl-Voice-Competition-12025.jpg)[GUIDELINES](#)[ENTRY SUBMISSION](https://iglesianicristo.net/2025-inc-voice-competition-registration/)

## 2025 INC INTERNATIONAL VOICE COMPETITION

OFFICIAL GUIDELINES

- **ELIGIBILITY:**An active member of the Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) in good standing.
- **MUSIC TYPE:**The focus of this competition is the classical aria and art song. Thus, all performances will be limited to the classical/modern classical genre.
- **AGE RESTRICTIONS**: There will be only one category of **18 to 40 years of age.**The entrant must be at least 18 years of age or above, and not turn 41 in the year 2025.
- **PERFORMANCE FORMAT:**Each singer must have a piano accompanist. For the final competition (live), a piano accompanist will be provided.
- **VOICE CLASSIFICATIONS:**All voice ranges are welcome. All performers will compete in a single category regardless of gender or voice range.
- **VIDEO AUDITION REQUIREMENTS:**Each participant must provide one video recording of an art song or aria from the approved list of vocal classical repertoire.
- **SUBMISSION OF ENTRIES:**Begins on August 1, 2025 and ends on September 1, 2025.

**In addition:**

- Do not edit the video (no mixing, reverb, sound enhancement or distortion).
- Video and audio format: 720p video, 192 kbps AAC audio in mp4.
- The singer and the pianist must clearly appear throughout the recording. The camera should remain stationary.
- Each singer must have a piano accompanist. No organ or pre-recorded accompaniment is permitted. A digital piano is acceptable only for the audition.  One may not perform his/her own accompaniment.

- **CLASSICAL REPERTOIRE (FOR AUDITION ONLY):**For the audition, please select one aria or art song from the approved list of vocal classical repertoire below.  For doctrinal considerations, only pieces from this list may be performed both for the audition and for the final competition.
- **REGARDING NON-COMPLIANT ENTRIES:**Incomplete, non-compliant, and/or late submissions will not be considered.
- **REGARDING THE FINAL COMPETITION:**If selected for the final competition, the vocalist will perform selected INC original art songs or arias (not audition pieces).

## LIST OF VOCAL CLASSICAL REPERTOIRE FOR AUDITION

**FILIPINO ART SONGS**

- Ang Aking Bayan (Nicanor Abelardo)
- Ang Maya (Jose Estrella)
- Ang Tangi Kong Pag-ibig (Constancio De Guzman)
- Ano Kaya Ang Kapalaran (Francisco Santiago)

- Hayun ang Bituin (Lucio D. San Pedro)
- Kundiman (Anak Dalita) (Francisco Santiago)
- Kundiman ng Luha (Nicanor Abelardo)
- Kung Hindi Man (Nicanor Abelardo)
- Madaling Araw (Francisco Santiago)
- Magbalik Ka Hirang (Nicanor Abelardo)
- Malungkot na Maya (Jose Estrella)
- Mutya Ng Pasig (Nicanor Abelardo)
- Nasaan Ang Aking Puso (Nicanor Abelardo)
- Nasaan ka Irog? (Nicanor Abelardo
- Nasaan Ngayon ang Sumpa Mo Sa Akin? (Constancio de Guzman)

- Ouvre ton Coeur (Georges Bizet)
- Chanson triste *Dans ton cœur dort un clair de lune*(Henri Duparc)
- Les berceaux *Le long du**Quai,**les**grands**vaisseaux*(Gabriel Fauré)
- Fleur Jetée (Gabriel Fauré)
- Villanelle *Quand**viendra**la**saison**nouvelle*(Hector Berlioz)
- Villanelle (Eva Dell’acqua)
- L’Absence (Hector Berlioz)
- Claire de lune *Votre**âme est un**paysage**choisi*(Gabriel Fauré)
- Le secret (Gabriel Fauré)
- Chevaux de Bois *Tournez,**tournez,**bons**chevaux**de**bois*(Claude Debussy)
- La balcon (Claude Debussy)

**ORATORIO ARIAS**

*SOPRANO*

- Und Gott sprach… Auf starkem Fittige (Auf starkem Fittiche schwinget sich) from Die Schöfung (Franz Joseph Haydn)
- Und Gott sprach… Nun beut die Flur (Nun beut die Flur das frische Grün) from Die Schöpfung (Franz Joseph Haydn)
- Let the bright Seraphim from Samson (George Frideric Handel)

**OPERA ARIAS**

*SOPRANO*

- Stizzoso, mio stizzoso from La Serva Padrona (W.A. Mozart)
- Giunse alfin il momento…Deh vieni non tardar from Le Nozze di Figaro (W.A. Mozart)
- Bester Jüngling from Der Schauspieldirektor (W.A. Mozart)
- O war’ ich schon mit dir vereint from Fidelio (Ludwig van Beethoven)
- Quel guard oil cavaliere…So anch’io la virtu magica from Don Pasquale (Quel guardo il cavaliere…So anch’io la virtu magica) (Gaetano Donizetti)
- Chacun le sait from le Fillet du Regiment (Gaetano Donizetti)
- Mein Herr Marquis from Die Fledermaus Mein Herr Marquis, ein Mann wie Sie (Johann Strauss)
- Summertime from Porgy and Bess (George Gershwin)

*MEZZO-SOPRANO/ALTO*

- Agitata da due venti from La Griselda (Antonio Vivaldi)
- Son qual nave ch’agitata from Artaserse (Riccardo Broschi)
- Lascia ch’io pianga from Rinaldo (George Frideric Handel)
- Una voce poco fa from Il Barbiere di Siviglia (Gioacchino Antonio Rossini)

*TENOR*

- Che gelida manina from la Boheme (Giacomo Puccini)
- A mes amis from Le Fillet du Regiment (Gaetano Donizetti)
- Ecco ridente in cielo from Il Barbiere di Siviglia (Gioacchino Antonio Rossini)
- O wie ängstlich from Die Entführung aus dem Serail (O wie ängstlich o wie feurig) (W.A. Mozart)
- Frisch zum Kampfe! from Die Entführung aus dem Serail (W.A. Mozart)
- Una furtiva lagrima from L’elisir d’amore (Gaetano Donizetti)
- Quanto è bella, quanto è cara from L’elisir d’amore (Gaetano Donizetti)

*BARITONE/BASS*

- Largo al factotum from Il Barbiere di Siviglia (Gioacchino Antonio Rossini)
- Ah! Che bella vita from Il Barbiere di Siviglia (Gioacchino Antonio Rossini)
- Non piu andrai from Le Nozze di Figaro (W.A. Mozart)
- Vedro mentr’io sospiro from Le Nozze di Figaro (W.A. Mozart)
- Ach wir arme arme Leute from Hänsel und Gretel (Engelbert Humperdinck)

Judgment Day-日本語 - Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)[信じている教え / 審判の日](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## 審判の日

日本語

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-deutsch/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/judgment-day/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-portugues/)

私たちは、キリストの再来の日を 信じている。キリストご自身がそのことを約束された（ヨハネ14:1-3）。この約束は使徒たちも同調している（Iテサロニケ4:15-16）。教会のメンバーは、キリストの再来の日に備えるように命じられている。父なる神のほか、その正確な日や時を誰も知らないからだ（マタイ24:36, 42, 44）。

しかし、キリストは、ご自分の再来の日が近い時に起こるしるしを知っておられ、私たちに言われた。各地で起こる戦争や飢饉や地震、また多くの人の神への愛が冷めるために起こる苦しみや悪などだ（マタイ2 4: 6 – 8 , 12）。

キリストの再来の日とは、罪深い人が滅ぼされ、裁かれる日のこと。その日、天は大音響をたてて消え失せ、地とそこにあるものはすべて火で焼き尽くされる（IIペトロ3:7, 10）。主の日にあがる声は苦く、勇士でさえも苦しみの叫びをあげる。金も銀も、主の憤りの日から誰も救い出すことはできない（ ゼファニヤ1:14, 18）。

Judgment Day-Deutsch - Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)[Die Glaubensrichtungen / Tag des Jüngsten Gerichts](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## Tag des Jüngsten Gerichts

Deutsch

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-filipino/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/judgment-day/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-portugues/)

Wir glauben, dass Christus wiederkommen wird. Christus Selbst versprach, dass Er wiederkommen wird (Joh. 14,1-3). Dieses Versprechen wurde von den Aposteln wiederholt (1 Thess. 4,15-16).

Es wird den Mitgliedern der Kirche befohlen, sich auf die zweite Ankunft Christi vorzubereiten, weil keiner, außer Gott, der Vater, den genauen Tag und die genaue Stunde der Rückkehr Christi kennt (Mt. 24,36; 42; 44). Christus aber wusste und erzählte uns von den Zeichen, die Seine zweite Ankunft ankündigen werden. Diese sind Kriege, Hungersnöte, Erdbeben an verschiedenen Orten, sowie zunehmende Armut und Übel, welches zum Erkalten der Liebe Gottes führen wird (Mt. 24,6-8; 12).

Die zweite Ankunft Christi ist der Tag des Gerichts und die Zerstörung der Gottlosen. An diesem Tag werden die Himmel mit einem gewaltigen Geräusch vergehen und die Elemente verbrannt und aufgelöst werden (2 Petr. 3,7; 10). Der Schrei am Tag des Herrn ist bitter, selbst ein Held wird an diesem Tag weinen. Weder Gold noch Silber kann den Menschen am Tag des Zornes des Herrn retten (Zef. 1,14; 18).

Menu Search Search Close this search box. [Creencias / Día del juicio](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## Día del juicio

Español

[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/judgment-day/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-portugues/)

Creemos que Cristo volverá. Cristo mismo prometió que Él regresaría (Juan 14:1-3). Los Apóstoles hicieron eco de esta promesa (I Tes. 4:15-16).

Se les ordena, a los miembros de la Iglesia De Cristo, prepararse para la segunda venida de Cristo porque nadie sabe el día ni la hora exacta de Su venida, excepto Dios, el Padre (Mat. 24:36, 42, 44).

Cristo, sin embargo, sabe y nos dijo las señales que anunciarían Su segunda venida, estas son las guerras, la hambruna, los terremotos en diferentes lugares, también el incremento de la pobreza y la maldad las cuales causarían que el amor a Dios de muchos se enfríe (Mat. 24:6-8, 12).

La segunda venida de Cristo es el día del Juicio y destrucción de los impíos. En este día, los cielos pasarán con un gran estruendo, y los elementos se disolverán con fuego y se quemarán (2 Ped. 3:7, 10). El llanto en el día del Señor será desagradable, incluso los hombres valientes llorarán con fuerza. Ni la plata ni el oro podrán salvar al hombre en el día de la ira del Señor (Sof. 1:14, 18).

Judgment Day-Filipino - Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)[Mga aral na sinasampalatayanan / Ang araw ng Paghuhukom](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## Ang araw ng Paghuhukom

Filipino

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-espanol/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/judgment-day/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-portugues/)

Sinasampalatayanan namin na muling paririto si Cristo. Siya mismo ang nangako na Siya ay magbabalik (Juan 14:1-3). Ang pangakong ito ay ipinahayag din ng mga apostol (I Tes. 4:15-16). Iniuutos sa mga kaanib sa Iglesia na paghandaan ang ikalawang pagparito ni Cristo sapagkat walang nakaaalam ng tiyak na araw at oras ng Kaniyang pagbabalik—maliban sa Diyos, ang Ama (Mat. 24:36, 42, 44).

Subalit, nagbigay si Cristo ng mga palatandaan na naghahayag na malapit na ang Kaniyang muling pagparito at ito ay mga digmaan, kagutom, lindol sa iba’t ibang dako, at gayundin ang paglaganap ng kahirapan at kasamaan na magiging dahilan ng panlalamig ng pag-ibig sa Diyos ng marami (Mat. 24:6-8, 12).

Ang ikalawang pagparito ni Cristo ang siyang Araw ng Paghuhukom at paglipol sa mga taong masama. Sa araw na iyon, ang kalangitan ay mapaparam kasabay ng malaking ugong at ang mga gawang nasa lupa ay mapupugnaw at masusunog (II Ped. 3:7, 10). Magiging napakapait ng pagtangis ng mga tao sa araw na iyon ng Panginoon, na anupa’t maging ang matatapang ay tatangis. Ang pilak o ginto man ay hindi makapagliligtas sa tao sa araw ngkapootan ng Panginoon (Zef. 1:14, 18).

Judgment Day-Français - Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)[Croyances / Jour du jugement dernier](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## Jour du jugement dernier

Français

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-italiano/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/judgment-day/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-portugues/)

Nous croyons que le Christ reviendra. Le Christ Lui-même a promis qu’Il reviendra (Jn 14:1-3). Cette promesse a été répétée par les Apôtres (1 Th 4:15-16). Il est commandé aux membres de l’Église de se préparer pour le second avènement du Christ car personne ne sait le jour et l’heure exacte de Son retour, à l’exception de Dieu, le Père (Mt 24:36, 42, 44).

Cependant , le Christ savait et nous a dit les signes qui annonceraient Son second avènement et ceux-ci sont des guerres, des famines, des t remblements de terre dans différents endroits, ainsi que les méchancetés et les difficultés croissantes ce qui causeraient l’amour pour Dieu de certains de se refroidir (Mt 24:6-8, 12).

Le second avènement du Christ est le jour du Jugement ainsi que la destruction d’hommes impies. Durant ce jour, les cieux passeront avec fracas, les éléments se dissoudront brûlés par le feu (2 P 3:7, 10). Le cri au jour de l’Eternel sera amer, l’homme vaillant poussera là de grands cris. Ni l’argent, ni l’or ne pourra délivrer l’homme au jour de la fureur de l’Eternel (So 1:14, 18).

Judgment Day-Italiano - Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)[Credenza / Giorno del Giudizio](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## Giorno del Giudizio

Italiano

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/judgment-day/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-portugues/)

Crediamo che Cristo tornerà. Cristo Stesso ha promesso che ritornerà (Gio. 14:1-3). Questa promessa fu proclamata dagli Apostoli (1 Te. 4:15-16). Ai membri della Chiesa viene comandato di prepararsi per il secondo avvento di Cristo, poiché nessuno sa il giorno e l’ora esatta del Suo avvento, ad eccezione di Dio, il Padre (Mat. 24:36, 42, 44).

Cristo, tuttavia, sapeva e ci ha detto quali sono i segni che preannunciano il Suo secondo avvento e questi sono le guerre, la carestia, i terremoti in diversi luoghi, così come l’aumento delle difficoltà e della malvagità, per cui l’amore di molti per Dio si raffredderà (Mat. 24:6-8, 12).

Il secondo avvento di Cristo è il giorno del Giudizio e la distruzione degli uomini empi. In questo giorno, i cieli passeranno stridendo, gli elementi si dissolveranno consumati dal fuoco e saranno bruciati (2 Pi. 3:7, 10). Anche il più valoroso griderà amaramente nel giorno del Signore. Né l’argento né l’oro potranno liberare l’uomo nel giorno dell’ira del Signore (Sof. 1:14, 18).

Menu Search Search Close this search box. [Crenças / Dia do Julgamento](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## Dia do Julgamento

Português

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/judgment-day-francais/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/judgment-day/)

Nós acreditamos que Cristo irá vir novamente. Cristo mesmo prometeu que Ele voltaria (João 14:1-3). Essa promessa foi repercutida pelos Apóstolos (I Tes. 4:15-16).

Os membros da Igreja são instruídos a se prepararem para a segunda vinda de Cristo porque ninguém sabe exatamente o dia e a hora da Sua vinda, exceto Deus, o Pai (Mat. 24:36, 42, 44).

Cristo, entretanto, sabia e nos disse sobre os sinais que indicariam a Sua segunda vinda, tais sinais são guerras, fomes, terremotos em vários lugares assim como o aumento das dificuldades e maldades que farão o amor de muitas pessoas por Deus se esfriar (Mat. 24:6-8,12).

A segunda vinda de Jesus Cristo é o Dia do Julgamento e destruição dos homens ímpios. Neste dia, os céus irão desaparecer com um grande estrondo, e os elementos serão derretidos com o fogo e queimados (II Ped. 3:7, 10). O choro no dia do Senhor será amargo, até os homens mais poderosos e corajosos irão chorar nesse dia. Nem prata, nem o ouro serão capazes de salvar o homem ímpio no dia da ira do Senhor (Zef. 1:14, 18).

## La Paz Congregation celebrates 95th anniversary

By KYLE RONUALD M. ARELLANO and GERALDINE D. DISCIPULO

Posted: January 23, 2026

Previous slide Next slide

In celebration of their 95th anniversary, *Iglesia Ni Cristo*(Church Of Christ) members from the [Local Congregation of La Paz](https://directory.iglesianicristo.net/locales/la-paz-6)in the [Ecclesiastical District of Capas, Tarlac](https://directory.iglesianicristo.net/districts/tarlac), Philippines, conducted a series of activities filled with fun and faith from January 11 to 18, 2026.

**Fun Walk**

To kick off the series of activities, a fun walk was held in the afternoon of January 11. Led by resident ministerial worker Brother Ryan Pasuquin, hundreds of brethren joyously walked from Soliman Street in San Isidro to Caramutan Evacuation Center (CEC) compound.

Afterwards, a Zumba session was conducted. “It’s a good way to promote physical health while further [strengthening camaraderie](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/the-brotherhood/)through this activity,” said Brother Pasuquin.

**Pasugo****Distribution**

Next off was the [Pasugo: God’s Message](https://www.pasugo.com.ph/where-salvation-dwells/)magazine distribution the day after. The brethren met with random people more than half a kilometer away from around their house of worship to Macabulos Park.

According to the district Light of Salvation (LOS) office, more than 150 people received copies of the Church’s official magazine. This drive also paved the way for the brethren to invite many nonmembers to attend the evangelical mission that would be held four days later, on January 16.

**Clean-up Drive**

Being of help to the community was also an integral part of the La Paz Congregation’s anniversary celebration. On the morning of January 13, a clean-up drive was conducted, spanning from the congregation’s surroundings to the town market and Macabulos Park, led mainly by [Buklod](https://iglesianicristo.net/edification/)officers and members.

**Basketball matches**

By night, also on January 13, male *KADIWA*and *Binhi*members grouped themselves into four teams engaged in friendly basketball competitions at the CEC basketball court. Their competitiveness was still evident on the second night, January 14, when they further tested their mettle leading to the finals game. “Everyone’s all smiles as we played,” shared ministerial worker Brother Vense Marctin Fragata. “We certainly achieved stronger [unity](https://www.pasugo.com.ph/nagkakaisa-ng-puso-at-layunin-ang-bayan-ng-diyos/)and brotherhood among those who took part,” he further stated.

**Special worship service**

On January 15, the very day of La Paz Congregation’s 95th anniversary, a special [worship service](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/worship-of-god/)was held at their house of worship. Capas, Tarlac District supervising minister Brother Amor Mallari officiated the holy occasion, accompanied by ministers composing the district leadership.

After a prayer by district Church officers overseer Brother Freddie Marcelo, Brother Mallari then taught the biblical lesson detailing what [God](https://www.pasugo.com.ph/the-attributes-of-the-true-god-the-father/)seeks from those who draw near to Him: remain trusting in Him, always give Him glory, and uphold their promise of [obedience](https://www.pasugo.com.ph/persistent-obedience-amid-all-circumstances/)all the days of their life.

**Evangelical Mission**

The evangelical mission on January 16 at La Paz house of worship was led by Brother Pasuquin. He highlighted from the [Bible](https://www.pasugo.com.ph/the-bible-and-the-true-faith/)that while there is benefit in toiling for material wealth, it is even more valuable that people work for their soul’s welfare—salvation on Judgment Day—by joining the [Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ)](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/).

Church members brought with them nearly a hundred nonmembers, most of whom expressed their desire to continue listening to the Church’s biblical teachings. Among them was guest Maricel Del Rosario, who said, “I learned that this Church is what will be saved by God because this is Christ’s redeemed.”

**Blood Donation**

A blood donation drive was held on January 17 at PAGCOR Evacuation Center and Multipurpose Hall. [Christian Medical Dental and Paramedical Society](https://iglesianicristo.net/edification/)(CMDPS) volunteers spearheaded the [socio-civic](https://iglesianicristo.net/socio-civic/)activity, in partnership with Tarlac Provincial Hospital and Jose B. Lingad Memorial Hospital.

More than 100 blood bags were collected from about 600 volunteer brethren. Dr. Bethany Joy Ramos expressed her gratitude to the *Iglesia Ni Cristo*members: “Their contribution has increased our blood supply. It will help many people in need of urgent blood transfusions.”

**Anniversary Concert**

On January 18, the last day of La Paz’s 95th anniversary celebration, brethren are still by the hundreds, ever eager, this time to witness an INConcert at the CEC basketball court.

Spearheaded by the local congregation’s Christian Family Organizations (CFO), the anniversary concert commenced with a prayer led by ministerial worker Brother Xenen Culili followed by Brother Pasuquin’s welcome remarks. Right after, talented brethren showcased various performances featuring [INC original songs](https://www.youtube.com/@INCOriginalMusic). The district music team performed in quartet songs such as [Ako Ngayon Ay Iglesia Ni Cristo](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YEYgnHPvFWI&list=RDYEYgnHPvFWI&start_radio=1)(I am Now A Member Of The Church Of Christ), [Ngayon Na](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hPBghOQj4ms&list=RDhPBghOQj4ms&start_radio=1)(Now Is The Time), and [Ang Tungkuling Itiniwala, Puspusan Naming Magawa](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Fxm2WVc4Sqg&list=RDFxm2WVc4Sqg&start_radio=1)(The Entrusted Duty We Will Fully Fulfill).

Meanwhile, a choir composed of Children’s Worship Service members performed [Ako Ay Kabataang Cristiano](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gFijb5q_m-o&list=RDgFijb5q_m-o&start_radio=1)(I am A Young Christian) and [Hanggang Wakas Kaming Magtatapat](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Zq7p79r2znY&list=RDZq7p79r2znY&start_radio=1)(We Will Be Loyal Until The End). Selected deacons and deaconesses performed [Salamat Po Sa Iyong Pagyakap](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5cobjyXAIus&list=RD5cobjyXAIus&start_radio=1)(Thank You For Your Embrace). The duo of Noriel and Noreen Bonifacio, both *KADIWA*and choir members, sang [Landas Ng Buhay](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rJ5wdPAKdxg&list=RDrJ5wdPAKdxg&start_radio=1)(Way Of Life) while *Buklod*member Chantal Pizarro serenaded the brethren with her rendition of [Ako’y Maghihintay Sa Iyong Pagliligtas](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=86cyOBPdaZA&list=RD86cyOBPdaZA&start_radio=1)(I Will Wait For Your Salvation).

In between the performances, video greetings from Church officers enlisted then in La Paz, and previously assigned ministers and ministerial workers, were shown, along with feature stories of some brethren. And before the program’s conclusion, choir members performed [Tapat Hanggang Wakas](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=86cY6gnaOv8&list=RD86cY6gnaOv8&start_radio=1)(Loyal Until The End), followed by a district CFO overseer Brother Michael Pelaez’ closing prayer.

**Reactions**

“Through God’s help, the Church here in La Paz was able to brave different storms of life which made us even stronger especially in performing our duties. Reaching this milestone while being able to uphold evangelistic works, edification efforts, and unity among us brethren filled our hearts with delight,” narrated deaconess Leonida Mañebog.

“My family and I were so glad to have been able to join the activities,” said *Buklod*member Argil Muhi.

On behalf of the brethren, Brother Pasuquin said, “We thank the Church Administration and, above all, the Almighty God for allowing us to hold these activities. We will remain in our zealous service to God until we receive salvation.” — With assistance from Capas, Tarlac District Multimedia

For more news, visit INC News and Updates

## Malatab brethren joyful for a new house of worship

By IVAN FELIX BUSMEON and ANTONIO CAÑAVERAL JR.

Posted: January 20, 2026

Previous slide Next slide

The brethren from the [Local Congregation of Malatab](https://directory.iglesianicristo.net/locales/malatab), [Ecclesiastical District of Cotabato North](https://directory.iglesianicristo.net/districts/cotabato-north), welcomed the New Year with joy as their newly built 120-seater house of worship was dedicated to the Lord God through a worship service on January 9, 2026.

The newly dedicated house of worship stands at Purok 2, Malatab, Antipas, Cotabato, Philippines, which is approximately 42 kilometers from the district office.

District supervising minister Brother Generico Gamboa officiated at the sacred occasion. In his Bible-based lesson, he emphasized how important the house of worship is in the lives of [God’s chosen people](https://www.pasugo.com.ph/gods-watchman-who-strives-for-the-welfare-of-his-people-day-and-night/)being the place designated by God where His servants go to worship and pray, especially in times of hardships and trials.

“My heart is truly delighted. I’m deeply thankful for having a beautiful, magnificent, and spacious [house of worship](https://www.pasugo.com.ph/inc-builds-acquires-more-houses-of-worship-for-growing-membership/),” enthused head deacon Napoleon Castro. “All glory belongs to God.”

“I’m overjoyed. I sincerely thank the [Church Administration](https://www.pasugo.com.ph/the-vita%c9%a9-ro%c9%a9e-of-the-church-administration-in-ensuring-our-sa%c9%a9vation/), and above all, our Lord God,” added deaconess and finance officer Liezel Ferrer.

A pastoral house and a guardhouse were likewise constructed adjacent to the house of worship, which was equipped with a new organ.

On behalf of the brethren, resident ministerial worker Brother Emmanuel Manuel said, “We will cherish and carefully maintain our new house of worship, especially because this is where we conduct our worship services and offer praises to God. This is also where we fervently pray to seek the help of the [Almighty Father](https://www.pasugo.com.ph/the-attributes-of-the-true-god-the-father/).”

Established on March 14, 1982, the Malatab Congregation’s having a new house of worship was a timely gift for its 44th anniversary this year. — With assistance from Norvin Enrique

For more news, visit INC News and Updates

One God, the Father [Skip to content](#content)
- [About Us](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/)

- [News](https://iglesianicristo.net/newsmedia/)
