Menu Search Search Close this search box. [Beliefs / One God, the Father](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## One God, the Father

ENGLISH

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-portugues/)

We believe that the one and only true God is the Father, the Creator. We hold this belief because this is the doctrine taught by our Lord Jesus Christ and His Apostles (John 17:3, 1; I Cor. 8:6). God is a spirit (John 4:24), and, therefore, He has no flesh and bones (Luke 24:39).

There is no trinity of persons in God. Though the Bible speaks of the Father, the Son, and the Holy Spirit, never does it refer to all of them as gods nor as three persons in one God; rather, it points to the Father alone as the true God. The Son Himself emphasized that only the Father is the true God (John 17:3, 1) and that He Christ Himself is a man telling the truth which He received from God (John 8:40). The prophets also taught that we have only one Father who created us (Mal. 2:10; Isa. 64:8). He alone is God, there is no other God and no one is like Him (Isa. 46:9).

God is from everlasting to everlasting, with no beginning or end (Ps. 90:2), immortal (I Tim. 1:17), and does not tire or become weary (Isa. 40:28).

He alone is the Creator of heaven, the heaven of heavens, with all their host, the earth and all things therein, and the seas and all that is in them (Neh. 9:6).

[Who is the Creator and how can one prove one's faith in Him?](https://www.pasugo.com.ph/who-is-the-creator-and-how-can-one-prove-ones-faith-in-him/)

Menu Search Search Close this search box. [信じている教え / 唯一の神、父](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## 唯一の神、父

日本語

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-deutsch/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-portugues/)

私たちは、創造主である父が、唯一の真の神だと信じている。そう信じるのは、これが主イエス・キリストと使徒たちの教えだからである（ヨハネ17:3, 1; Iコリント8:6）。神は 霊であり（ヨハネ4:24）、それゆえ、肉や骨がない（ルカ24:39）。

神は三位一体ではない。聖書 が、父と子と聖霊のことを話していても、それらが神々であるとは言っておらず、三位一体であるとも言っていない。むしろ、父だけが真の神だということを示している。御子ご自身が、父だけが真の神であり（ヨハネ17:3, 1）、御子ご自身は神から聞いた真理を語る人 だと（ヨハネ8:40 NKJV）、宗教が本物であるかを見極めるには、その宗教が掲げる信仰を されている。預言者たちもまた、私たちを創造された唯一の父を持っており（マラキ2:10; イザヤ64:8）、父のほかには神はおられないと言っている（イザヤ46:9）。

神はとこしえからとこしえまで いせられ、初まりもなければ終わ りもなく（詩篇90:2）、不滅であり （Iテモテ1:17）、倦むことなく、疲 れることがない（イザヤ40:28）。

父のみが、天とその高き極みを、そのすべての軍勢を、地とその上にあるすべてのものを、海とその中にある ものを創造された（ネヘミヤ9:6）。

[Who is the Creator and how can one prove one's faith in Him?](https://www.pasugo.com.ph/who-is-the-creator-and-how-can-one-prove-ones-faith-in-him/)

Menu Search Search Close this search box. [Die Glaubensrichtungen / Einen Gott, der Vater](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## Einen Gott, der Vater

Deutsch

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-filipino/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-portugues/)

Wir glauben, dass der eine und wahre Gott, der Vater, der Schöpfer ist. Wir halten diese Doktrin fest, weil sie von unserem Herrn Jesus Christus und Seinen Aposteln gelehrt wurde (Joh. 17,3;1; 1 Kor. 8,6). Gott ist Geist (Joh. 4,24) und hat folglich kein Fleisch und keine Knochen (Luk. 24,39).

Es gibt keine Dreieinigkeit von Personen in Gott. Obwohl die Bibel von dem Vater, dem Sohn, und dem Heiligen Geist spricht, bezeichnet sie alle drei gemeinsam weder als Götter noch als drei Personen in einem Gott. Sie weist jedoch auf den Vater als den einzigen wahren Gott. Der Sohn Selbst betont, dass nur der Vater, der wahre Gott ist (Joh. 17,3;1) und Er Selbst ein Mensch sei, der diese Wahrheit von Gott erhalten hat (Joh. 8,40). Die Propheten lehrten auch, dass wir nur einen Vater haben, der uns geschaffen hat (Mal. 2,10; Jes. 64,8). Er allein ist Gott und niemand ist wie Er (Jes. 46,9).

Gott ist von Ewigkeit zu Ewigkeit, ohne Anfang und Ende (Ps. 90,2), unsterblich (1 Tim. 1,17) und wird weder müde noch kraftlos (Jes. 40,28).

Er allein hat den Himmel geschaffen und den Himmel der Himmel und Sein ganzes Heer, die Erde und alles, was auf ihr ist, die Meere und alles, was darin lebt (Neh. 9,6).

[Who is the Creator and how can one prove one's faith in Him?](https://www.pasugo.com.ph/who-is-the-creator-and-how-can-one-prove-ones-faith-in-him/)

One God, the Father-Español - Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)[Creencias / Un Dios, el Padre](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## Un Dios, el Padre

Español

[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-portugues/)

Creemos que el único y verdadero Dios es el Padre, el Creador. Sostenemos esta creencia porque esta es la doctrina enseñada por nuestro Señor Jesucristo y Sus Apóstoles (Juan 17:3, 1; 1 Cor. 8:6). Dios es espíritu (Juan 4:24) y, por tanto, Él no tiene carne ni huesos (Luc. 24:39).

No hay trinidad de personas en Dios. Aunque la Biblia habla del Padre, del Hijo, y del Espíritu Santo, nunca se refiere a todos ellos como dioses ni como tres personas en un Dios; sino que, indica únicamente al Padre como el verdadero Dios. El Hijo mismo enfatizó que solamente el Padre es el verdadero Dios (Juan 17: 3, 1) y que Él mismo es un hombre que dice la verdad la cual ha recibido de Dios (Juan 8:40). Los profetas también enseñaron que solamente tenemos un Padre quien nos creó (Mal. 2:10; Isa. 64:8). Solamente Él es Dios, no hay otro Dios y nadie es como Él (Isa. 46:9).

Dios es desde la eternidad hasta la eternidad, sin comienzo ni fin (Sal. 90:2), inmortal (1 Tim. 1:17), y no se fatiga o se cansa (Isa. 40:28).

Tan solo Él es el Creador del cielo, los cielos de los cielos, con todo lo que alberga en ello, la tierra y todo lo que hay en ella, y los mares y todo lo que hay en ellos (Neh. 9:6).

[Who is the Creator and how can one prove one's faith in Him?](https://www.pasugo.com.ph/who-is-the-creator-and-how-can-one-prove-ones-faith-in-him/)

One God, the Father-Filipino - Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)[Mga aral na sinasampalatayanan / Isang Diyos, ang Ama](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## Isang Diyos, ang Ama

Filipino

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-espanol/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-portugues/)

Sumasampalataya kami na ang nag-iisang tunay na Diyos ay ang Ama, ang Manlalalang. Tinitindigan namin ang paniniwalang ito dahil ito ang itinuro ng ating Panginoong Jesucristo at ng Kaniyang mga apostol (Juan 17:3, 1; I Cor. 8:6). Ang Diyos ay espiritu (Juan 4:24) kaya Siya’y walang laman at mga buto (Lucas 24:39).

Ang Diyos ay hindi Trinidad—walang tatlong persona. Bagaman itinuturo ng Biblia ang tungkol sa Ama, sa Anak, at sa Espiritu Santo, subalit hindi kailanman nito tinukoy na silang lahat ay mga diyos o kaya’y tatlong persona sa iisang Diyos; sa halip, itinuturo nito na ang Ama lamang ang nag-iisang tunay na Diyos. Binigyang diin mismo ng Anak na ang Ama ang iisang tunay na Diyos (Juan 17:3, 1) at Siya, ang Anak, ay taong nagsasabi ng katotohanang narinig Niya sa Diyos (Juan 8:40). Itinuro rin ng mga propeta na ang Ama lamang ang lumalang sa atin (Mal. 2:10; Isa. 64:8). Siya lamang ang Diyos at wala nang ibang Diyos ni mayroon mang gaya Niya (Isa. 46:9).

Ang Diyos ay walang pasimula at walang hanggan (Awit 90:2), walang kamatayan (I Tim. 1:17), at hindi nanlalata o napapagod man (Isa. 40:28).

Siya lamang ang lumalang ng langit, ng langit ng mga langit at lahat ng naroon, ng lupa at lahat ng naroon, at ng dagat at lahat ng naroon (Neh. 9:6).

[Who is the Creator and how can one prove one's faith in Him?](https://www.pasugo.com.ph/who-is-the-creator-and-how-can-one-prove-ones-faith-in-him/)

One God, the Father-Français - Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)[Croyances / Un Dieu, le Père](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## Un Dieu, le Père

Français

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-italiano/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-portugues/)

Nous croyons que le seul et vrai Dieu est le Père, le Créateur. Nous tenons cette croyance parce que c’est la doctrine enseignée par notre Seigneur Jésus-Christ et Ses apôtres (Jean 17:3, 1; 1 Co 8:6). Dieu est esprit (Jean 4:24), par conséquent, Il n’a ni chair ni os (Luc 24:39).

Il n’y a pas de trinité de personnes en Dieu. Bien que la Bible parle du Père, du Fils et du Saint- Esprit, elle ne fait jamais référence à eux comme dieux ni en tant que trois personnes en un Dieu; par contre, elle désigne le Père seul comme étant le vrai Dieu. Le Fils Lui-même a souligné que seul le Père est le vrai Dieu (Jean 17:3, 1) et que Lui-même est un homme disant la vérité qu’Il a entendue de Dieu (Jean 8:40). Les prophètes aussi ont enseigné que nous avons un seul Père qui nous a créés (Mal 2:10; Es 64:8). Il est le seul Dieu, il n’y a pas d’autre Dieu et personne n’est comme Lui (Es 46:9).

Dieu est d’éternité en éternité, sans commencement ni fin (Ps 90:2), immortel (1 Tm 1:17), et ne se fatigue ou ne s’épuise pas (Es 40:28).

Il est le seul Créateur du ciel, des cieux des cieux, et toute leur armée, la terre et tout ce qui est sur elle et les mers et tout ce qui est en elles. (Ne 9:6).

[Who is the Creator and how can one prove one's faith in Him?](https://www.pasugo.com.ph/who-is-the-creator-and-how-can-one-prove-ones-faith-in-him/)

## Un Dio, Il Padre

Italiano

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-portugues/)

Noi crediamo che l’unico vero Dio è il Padre, il Creatore. Crediamo in questo perché questa è la dottrina insegnata dal nostro Signore Gesù Cristo e dai Suoi Apostoli (Gio. 17:3, 1; 1 Co. 8:6). Dio è uno spirito (Gio. 4:24), e quindi, non ha carne né ossa (Luc. 24:39).

Non c’è una trinità di persone in Dio. Sebbene la Bibbia parli del Padre, del Figlio e dello Spirito Santo, non si è mai riferita a tutti loro come degli dèi, né come tre entità di un Dio; piuttosto, essa indica soltanto il Padre come il vero Dio. Il Figlio Stesso sottolinea che solamente il Padre è il vero Dio (Gio. 17:3, 1) e che Lui Stesso è un uomo che dice la verità che ha ricevuto da Dio (Gio. 8:40). Anche i profeti hanno insegnato che abbiamo un solo Padre, che ci ha creato (Mal. 2:10; Isa. 64:8). Soltanto Lui è Dio, non c’è nessun altro Dio e nessuno è come Lui (Isa. 46:9).

Dio è dall’eternità in eternità, senza un inizio né una fine (Sal. 90:2), è immortale (1 Ti. 1:17) e non si affatica né si stanca (Isa. 40:28).

Soltanto Lui è il Creatore dei cieli, i cieli dei cieli con tutto il loro esercito, la terra e tutto ciò che è in essa, e i mari e tutto ciò che è in essi (Nee. 9:6).

[Who is the Creator and how can one prove one's faith in Him?](https://www.pasugo.com.ph/who-is-the-creator-and-how-can-one-prove-ones-faith-in-him/)

RELATED LINKS

## Um Deus, o Pai

Português

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father-francais/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father/)

Nós acreditamos que o único Deus verdadeiro é o Pai, o Criador. Nós defendemos essa crença porque esta é a doutrina ensinada pelo nosso Senhor Jesus Cristo e seus apóstolos (João 17:3, 1; I Cor. 8:6). Deus é um espírito (João 4:24), e, portanto, não tem carne nem ossos (Lucas 24:39).

Não há trindade de pessoas em Deus. Embora há menções na Bíblia sobre o Pai, o Filho e o Espírito Santo, ela nunca se refere a todos eles como deuses nem como três pessoas em um só Deus; pelo contrário, ela afirma que somente o Pai é o Deus verdadeiro. O próprio Filho enfatizou que somente o Pai é o Deus verdadeiro (João 17:3, 1) e que Ele (Cristo) é um homem que proclama as verdades que Ele recebeu de Deus (João 8:40). Os profetas também ensinaram que nós temos somente um Pai que nos criou (Mal. 2:10; Isa. 64:8). Ele sozinho é Deus, não há outro Deus além Dele, e ninguém é igual à Ele (Isa. 46:9).

Deus é de eternidade a eternidade, sem começo ou fim (Salmos 90:2), imortal (I Tim. 1:17), e não Se fatiga ou fica cansado (Isa. 40:28).

Ele sozinho é o criador do céu, do céu dos céus, e de tudo o que há neles, da terra e de todas as coisas que nela existem, e dos mares e de tudo o que há neles (Nee. 9:6).

[Who is the Creator and how can one prove one's faith in Him?](https://www.pasugo.com.ph/who-is-the-creator-and-how-can-one-prove-ones-faith-in-him/)

## Terms of Use

Please read the following rules (Terms’) that govern your use of our website. These rules constitute a binding legal agreement between you and the Christian Era Broadcasting Services International (‘CEBSI’), the operator of this website.

By using this website, you (the ‘user’) are taken to have understood and accepted the Terms of Use and Privacy Policy below, and have agreed to be bound by it.

**1. RESTRICTIONS OF USE.**

1.1. For the purposes of this Agreement, ‘Website Material’ refers to any content that has been uploaded to, provided as part of, or otherwise visible in the website. These include, but are not limited to, videos, photographs, audio recordings, literary works, comments and testimonials, news articles, details of Worship Services, program scheduling, program names, press releases, contact information, logos, designs, word marks, service marks, and other materials that are visible on the website.

1.2. In the absence of written and express permission from CEBSI, you are prohibited from:

1.2.1. Reproducing and publishing any Website material in other media, including, but not limited to, online, satellite, digital, analogue, cable, terrestrial, and in other media now known or developed in the future.

1.2.2. Selling, sublicensing and/or otherwise commercializing any Website material;

1.2.3. Publicly performing and/or showing any Website material;

1.2.4. Using this Website in any way that is, or may be, damaging to this Website;

1.2.5. Using this Website in any way that impacts others users’ access to this Website;

1.2.6. Using this Website contrary to applicable laws and regulations, or in a way that causes, or may cause, harm to the Website, or to any person or business entity;

1.2.7. Engaging in any data mining, data harvesting, data extracting or any other similar activity in relation to this Website, or while using this Website;

1.2.8. Using this Website to engage in any advertising or marketing;

1.3. Certain areas of this Website are restricted from user access. Furthermore, CEBSI may, without notice to you, further restrict access by you to any areas of this Website.

**2. LIMITATION OF LIABILITY AND INDEMNIFICATION**

2.1. In no event shall CEBSI or any of its affiliates, officers, directors and employees, be liable to you for anything arising out of or in connection with your use of this Website. This indemnity extends, without limitation, to liability under contract, tort, privacy, Intellectual Property Infringement, media law, data privacy law, and other personal and property rights.

2.2. CEBSI, including its affiliates, licensees, officers, directors and employees shall not be liable for any indirect, consequential or special liability arising out of or in any way related to your use of this Website.

2.3. The user shall fully indemnify CEBSI from and against any and all liabilities, costs, demands, causes of action, damages and expenses (including reasonable attorney’s fees) arising out of or in any way related to the breach of any of the provisions of these Terms.

**3. COPYRIGHT OWNERSHIP**

3.1. CEBSI owns all intellectual property rights to all Website materials.

3.2. The user is granted a limited license to view the materials in the Website. This license is subject to the restrictions provided in these Terms, and to all prevailing laws and

regulations.

**4. WARRANTIES**

4.1. This Website is provided on an “as is” basis. CEBSI makes no express or implied representations or warranties of any kind related to this Website or the materials contained in it.

4.2. Additionally, nothing contained on this Website shall be construed as providing consult or advice to you.

4.3. Children’s use of the website. If you, the user, is under 18 years of age, you warrant and assure CEBSI that you are visiting the website under the supervision of your parent or legal guardian.

4.3.1. Additionally, both the user and their parent/guardian accept that it would be beneficial for and in the best interest of the minor to view the materials in this website. Despite any obligations attached thereto, including the disclosure of personal information, the minor’s participation in the aforementioned activities, taken as a whole, is manifestly to his advantage.

**5. GOVERNING LAW**

**6. MODIFICATION**

6.2. It is your responsibility as the user to read this document from time to time to ensure that your use of the Service remains compliant with this Agreement.

**PRIVACY POLICY**

Christian Era Broadcasting Service International (‘CEBSI’) is the data controller and processor for all information collected as part of your use of the website (the ‘Service’). This page informs you (the ‘user’) of our policies regarding the collection, use, and disclosure of personal data when you use our Service. We use your data to provide and improve the Service. By using the website, you voluntarily consent to and agree with the collection and use of your information in accordance with this policy.

**1. INFORMATION COLLECTION**

1.1. We collect several different types of information for various purposes to provide and improve our Service to you.

1.2. Personal information. While using our website, you may be disclosing to CEBSI certain personally identifiable information that can be used to contact or identify you (“Personal Data”). Personally identifiable information may include, but is not limited to:

1.2.1. Email address

1.2.2. First name and last name

1.2.3. Phone number

1.2.4. Address, State, Province, ZIP/Postal code, City

1.2.5. Cookies and Usage Data

1.2.6. We may also collect information on how the Service is accessed and used (“Usage Data”). This Usage Data may include information such as your computer’s Internet Protocol address (e.g. IP address), browser type, browser version, the pages of our Service that you visit, the time and date of your visit, the time spent on those pages, unique device identifiers and other diagnostic data.

1.3. Collection of Personal Information. CEBSI collects your personal information through the website in various ways:

1.3.1. When you provide us with these information, for example, when signing up in our mailing list; or

1.3.2. Through a variety of built-in technologies, such tracking and cookies data, application program interfaces, or use of a third-party application in our website.

1.4. We will only hold your personal information while it is necessary for the provision of our services to you, or that we have a valid reason to keep it for a maximum of three years. Valid reasons may include that we must keep it to avoid breaking the law.

**2. DATA BEING SHARED WITH THIRD PARTIES**

2.1. We may share your data with other organisations that provide services on our behalf to operate the website. Examples of when we may share your data with service providers include sharing with:

2.1.1. Internet and cloud hosting services providers, such as Amazon Web Services (AWS), Cloudflare, Bunny CDN, and other content-delivery networks, to help accommodate the traffic on the website without compromising the bandwidth;

2.1.2. Third-party webpage components and assets, such as Google Fonts, in order to style and design the website;

2.1.3. Social Media Platforms, such as Facebook and Twitter, in order to make it easier to view and share the contents of the website;

2.1 .4. Third-party analytic services, such as Google Analytics, which sends your session statistics, IP address, geolocation, and browser and device information, in order to optimize your experience of the website.

2.1.5. YouTube, given that we use their unbranded embedded player to provide video content on our websites and apps. The embedded player relies on the YouTube API, which is a type of software that allows data to be communicated between our website and apps and the YouTube player.

**3. TRACKING & COOKIES DATA**

3.1. Definition of ‘Cookies’. Cookies are small text files which a website may place on your computer or device when you visit a site. The cookie will help the website to recognize your device the next time you visit. Web beacons, pixels or other similar files can also do the same thing. We use the term “cookies” in this policy to refer to all files that collect information in this way.

3.1.1. The majority of websites use cookies to collect and retain personal information about their visitors. Most cookies collect general information, such as how visitors arrive at and use our Sites, the device they are using, their internet protocol address (IP address), what pages they are viewing and their approximate location.

3.1.2.You can instruct your browser to refuse all cookies or to indicate when a cookie is being sent. However, if you do not accept cookies, you may not be able to use some portions of our website.

3.2. Examples of Cookies we use. We use, without limitation, the following types of cookies:

3.2.1. Session Cookies. We use Session Cookies to operate our Service.

3.2.2. Preference Cookies. We use Preference Cookies to remember your preferences and various settings. For example, we use technology on our Sites, which records user movements, including page scrolling, clicks and text entered. This helps us to identify usability issues and improve the assistance we can provide to users and is also used for aggregated and statistical reporting purposes.

3.2.3. Security Cookies. We use Security Cookies for security purposes.

3.2.4. Third party cookies. These are cookies created by domains other than this website. For example, social-media plugins that enable you to log in and share website materials on Facebook, Twitter, Instagram and the like will place cookies on your device.

**4. LAWFUL BASIS FOR PROCESSING**

4.1. We only process personal information where we have a lawful basis for doing so. This includes, but is not limited to, the following

4.1.1. User consent. This is where you have given us explicit permission to process personal information for a given purpose. For example, if you sign up to our mailing list, we would ask for your consent to use your personal information (such as contact details) to send you the materials in our website.

4.1.2. Legitimate organizational purposes. This is where we have a legitimate interest, an organization, to process personal information. For example, where we are aware of copyright infringements on our Site, it is in our legitimate interests to identify those responsible. We take due care to balance our interests against your right to privacy.

4.1.3. Legal obligation. This is where we have to process personal information in order to comply with the law. For example, we process and retain customer access information to comply with data privacy regulations.

**5. USE OF DATA**

5.1. Purpose of Collection. We use the collected data for various purposes:

5.1.1. To provide additional contact information in order to provide more information with regards to CEBSI and its affiliates;

5.1.2. To provide and maintain the Service;

5.1.3. To notify you about changes to our Service;

5.1.4. To allow you to participate in interactive features of our Service when you choose to do so;

5.1.5. To provide customer care and support;

5.1.6. To provide analysis or valuable information so that we can improve the Service;

5.1. 7. To monitor the usage of the Service;

5.1.8. To detect, prevent and address technical issues.

5.2. Third-party cookies. We also use third party cookies for the following reasons:

5.2.1. To help us monitor traffic on our Sites (like many companies, we use Google Analytics to do this);

5.2.2. To identify fraudulent or non-human traffic;

5.2.3. To assist with market research;

5.2.4. To improve Site functionality;

5.2.5. To monitor compliance with our terms and conditions and copyright policy;

5.2.6. We also use third party submission of “cookies-like” and robotic crawl data to optimize search results in Google. Bing, and other search engine companies.

**6. DATA CONTROLLER AND PROCESSOR.**

6.1. All personal data collected as part of your use of our website are controlled and processed by CEBSI in its offices in the Philippines, located at 1 Central Ave, Quezon City, Philippines 1107.

6.2. Your consent to this Privacy Policy followed by your submission of such information represents your agreement to that transfer, acknowledging the presence of risks given the absence of any Standard Contractual Clauses, adequacy decisions. and similar privacy provisions.

6.3. CEBSI will take all steps it considers reasonable to ensure that your data is treated securely and in accordance with this Privacy Policy.

6.4. Locale Representative. For the purposes of the GDPR, CEBSI’s locale representative in the EU is:

**7. DISCLOSURE OF DATA**

7.1. Legal Requirements. We may disclose your Personal Data in the good faith belief that such action is necessary to:

7 .1. 1. To comply with a legal obligation;

7.1.2. To protect and defend our rights or property;

7.1.3. To prevent or investigate possible wrongdoing in connection with the Service;

7.1.4. To protect the personal safety of users of the Service or the public; and

7.1.5. To protect against legal liability.

7.2. Security Of Data Disclosed. The security of your data is important to us, but remember that no method of transmission over the Internet, or method of electronic storage is completely secure. While we strive to use commercially acceptable means to protect your Personal Data, we cannot guarantee its absolute security.

7.3. Service Providers. We may also employ third party companies and individuals to facilitate our Service (“Service Providers”), to provide the Service on our behalf, to perform website-related services or to assist us in analyzing how our Service is used. These third parties have access to your Personal Data only to perform these tasks on our behalf and are obligated not to disclose or use it for any other purpose.

**8. LINKS TO OTHER SITES**

8.1. Our Website may contain links to other sites that are not operated by us. If you click on a third-party link, you will be directed to that third party’s site. We strongly advise you to review the Privacy Policy of every site you visit.

8.2. CEBSI has no control over and assume no responsibility for the content, privacy policies or practices of any third-party sites or services.

**9. CHILDREN’S PRIVACY**

9.1. When visiting the website, you warrant and assure CEBSI that you are over the age of consent. If you are under the age of consent, you warrant and assure CEBSI that any personal information you provide has been provided under the consent and supervision of a parent/guardian.

9.2. We do not knowingly collect personally identifiable information from anyone under the age of consent without parental supervision. If you are a parent or guardian and you are aware that your Children has provided us with Personal Data without your consent, please contact us.

**10. YOUR RIGHTS**

10.1. Under data protection laws, you have rights as an individual in relation to the personal data we hold about you. These rights include:

10.1.1. The right to object to direct marketing;

10.1.2. The right to access the personal data that we process about you;

10.1.3. The right to request the deletion of your personal data;

10.1.4. The right to request the rectification of your personal data – you can manage some of this information in your account.

10.2. You can exercise these rights by contacting us through the inquiries page on our website.

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/socio-civic-espanol/)

[繁體中文](https://iglesianicristo.net/socio-civic-%e7%b9%81%e9%ab%94%e4%b8%ad%e6%96%87/)

Previous slide Next slide

Concerned with the welfare not only of its members but also of society in general, the *Iglesia Ni Cristo*(Church Of Christ) undertakes programs and projects in its various fields of endeavor, which are guided by and at the same time promote Christian values.

#### Care for Humanity

The Care for Humanity ( *Lingap sa Mamamayan*) outreach program has provided immediate assistance to multitudes of people, from calamity victims to indigents and indigenous peoples, and all others who are in need. Through its implementing arm, the Felix Y. Manalo Foundation, the Church seeks to give aid to the needy in all parts of the world.

#### New Era General Hospital

The [New Era General Hospital](https://negh.com.ph/)in the Philippines not only caters to the health concerns, mostly of its ministers and members, but also helps in mobilizing volunteers for the Church’s medical missions. Together with the Social Services Office, it conducts free medical-dental missions, blood donations drives, health seminars, and other related campaigns.

#### New Era University

The [New Era University](https://neu.edu.ph/main/)(NEU) offers basic to post-graduate programs in its various campuses throughout the Philippines. It also promotes the Alternative Learning Systems (ALS) program for out-of-school youths, and offers free Summer Pre-Kindergarten Program.

**Community/Housing projects**

Resettlement communities commonly consist of housing units, livelihood sites, and a house of worship. The first one, Barrio Maligaya in Laur, Nueva Ecija, Philippines, was developed to provide refuge for victims of religious persecution. Barangay Bagong Buhay, in Palayan City, Nueva Ecija, was established for displaced survivors of the Mount Pinatubo eruption in 1991. Sitio New Era in Barangay Langit, Alangalang, Leyte was established for the benefit of the victims of Typhoon Haiyan (local name: Yolanda).

Proper and safe shelter is provided for the Church’s volunteer workers, and even to their widows and children. Some of these are the housing projects in the vicinity of the Church’s Central Office in Quezon City; in Rodriguez, Rizal; Dasmariñas, Cavite; and Tagaytay City, Cavite.

## Special worship service marks Maharlika Congregation’s 90th anniversary

By KYLE RONUALD M. ARELLANO

Posted: January 18, 2026

Previous slide Next slide

Marking its ninth decade of establishment, the [Local Congregation of Maharlika](https://directory.iglesianicristo.net/locales/maharlika-2)in the [Ecclesiastical District of Quezon West](https://directory.iglesianicristo.net/districts/quezon-west-1), Philippines, held a special worship service to God on January 10, 2026 at their house of worship.

Brother Rene J. Panoncillo, the Church’s General Secretary, was sent by the Church Administration to lead this memorable occasion. He taught the brethren in his [Bible](https://www.pasugo.com.ph/the-bible-and-the-true-faith/)-based homily that although life becomes increasingly difficult every passing day, the [Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ)](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/)members’ sacrifices in upholding obedience to all of God’s commandments are never in vain, for their salvation is rest assured by the Almighty God Himself.

“The brethren were all so happy, me included,” enthused head deacon Jose A. Domogma Jr. “It’s because we were remembered by the [Church Administration](https://www.pasugo.com.ph/the-essential-role-of-the-church-administration/)in this very significant day of our congregation. That’s something we will always treasure in our hearts and minds,” he further expressed.

Choir leader Lydia C. Grit was likewise spiritually renewed through the [worship gathering](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/worship-of-god/). “God has given me strength and hope to keep moving forward despite myriad [trials](https://www.pasugo.com.ph/god-is-our-refuge-strength-and-protection/), such as losing someone dear to me,” she shared.

On behalf of the congregation, resident ministerial worker Brother Jedric Ivan Eleazar thanked the Executive Minister Brother Eduardo V. Manalo for “sending one of his primary helpers to lead us in a special worship service” that has “further strengthened and inspired us to keep serving [God](https://www.pasugo.com.ph/the-attributes-of-the-true-god-the-father/)no matter what to receive [salvation](https://www.pasugo.com.ph/where-salvation-dwells/).” — With research assistance from Junel Jabrica and Hansley John Rivera

For more news, visit INC News and Updates

## Terms of Use

Please read the following rules (Terms’) that govern your use of our website. These rules constitute a binding legal agreement between you and the Christian Era Broadcasting Services International (‘CEBSI’), the operator of this website.

By using this website, you (the ‘user’) are taken to have understood and accepted the Terms of Use and Privacy Policy below, and have agreed to be bound by it.

1. RESTRICTIONS OF USE.

1.1. For the purposes of this Agreement, ‘Website Material’ refers to any content that has been uploaded to, provided as part of, or otherwise visible in the website. These include, but are not limited to, videos, photographs, audio recordings, literary works, comments and testimonials, news articles, details of Worship Services, program scheduling, program names, press releases, contact information, logos, designs, word marks, service marks, and other materials that are visible on the website.

1.2. In the absence of written and express permission from CEBSI, you are prohibited from:

1.2.1. Reproducing and publishing any Website material in other media, including, but not limited to, online, satellite, digital, analogue, cable, terrestrial, and in other media now known or developed in the future.

1.2.2. Selling, sublicensing and/or otherwise commercializing any Website material;

1.2.3. Publicly performing and/or showing any Website material;

1.2.4. Using this Website in any way that is, or may be, damaging to this Website;

1.2.5. Using this Website in any way that impacts others users’ access to this Website;

1.2.6. Using this Website contrary to applicable laws and regulations, or in a way that causes, or may cause, harm to the Website, or to any person or business entity;

1.2.7. Engaging in any data mining, data harvesting, data extracting or any other similar activity in relation to this Website, or while using this Website;

1.2.8. Using this Website to engage in any advertising or marketing;

1.3. Certain areas of this Website are restricted from user access. Furthermore, CEBSI may, without notice to you, further restrict access by you to any areas of this Website.

2. LIMITATION OF LIABILITY AND INDEMNIFICATION

2.1. In no event shall CEBSI or any of its affiliates, officers, directors and employees, be liable to you for anything arising out of or in connection with your use of this Website. This indemnity extends, without limitation, to liability under contract, tort, privacy, Intellectual Property Infringement, media law, data privacy law, and other personal and property rights.

2.2. CEBSI, including its affiliates, licensees, officers, directors and employees shall not be liable for any indirect, consequential or special liability arising out of or in any way related to your use of this Website.

2.3. The user shall fully indemnify CEBSI from and against any and all liabilities, costs, demands, causes of action, damages and expenses (including reasonable attorney’s fees) arising out of or in any way related to the breach of any of the provisions of these Terms.

3. COPYRIGHT OWNERSHIP

3.1. CEBSI owns all intellectual property rights to all Website materials.

3.2. The user is granted a limited license to view the materials in the Website. This license is subject to the restrictions provided in these Terms, and to all prevailing laws and regulations.

4. WARRANTIES

4.1. This Website is provided on an “as is” basis. CEBSI makes no express or implied representations or warranties of any kind related to this Website or the materials contained in it.

4.2. Additionally, nothing contained on this Website shall be construed as providing consult or advice to you.

4.3. Children’s use of the website. If you, the user, is under 18 years of age, you warrant and assure CEBSI that you are visiting the website under the supervision of your parent or legal guardian.

4.3.1. Additionally, both the user and their parent/guardian accept that it would be beneficial for and in the best interest of the minor to view the materials in this website. Despite any obligations attached thereto, including the disclosure of personal information, the minor’s participation in the aforementioned activities, taken as a whole, is manifestly to his advantage.

5. GOVERNING LAW

6. MODIFICATION

6.2. It is your responsibility as the user to read this document from time to time to ensure that your use of the Service remains compliant with this Agreement.

## Privacy Policy

Christian Era Broadcasting Service International (‘CEBSI’) is the data controller and processor for all information collected as part of your use of the website (the ‘Service’). This page informs you (the ‘user’) of our policies regarding the collection, use, and disclosure of personal data when you use our Service. We use your data to provide and improve the Service. By using the website, you voluntarily consent to and agree with the collection and use of your information in accordance with this policy.

1. INFORMATION COLLECTION

1.1. We collect several different types of information for various purposes to provide and improve our Service to you.

1.2. Personal information. While using our website, you may be disclosing to CEBSI certain personally identifiable information that can be used to contact or identify you (“Personal Data”). Personally identifiable information may include, but is not limited to:

1.2.1. Email address

1.2.2. First name and last name

1.2.3. Phone number

1.2.4. Address, State, Province, ZIP/Postal code, City

1.2.5. Cookies and Usage Data

1.2.6. We may also collect information on how the Service is accessed and used (“Usage Data”). This Usage Data may include information such as your computer’s Internet Protocol address (e.g. IP address), browser type, browser version, the pages of our Service that you visit, the time and date of your visit, the time spent on those pages, unique device identifiers and other diagnostic data.

1.3. Collection of Personal Information. CEBSI collects your personal information through the website in various ways:

1.3.1. When you provide us with these information, for example, when signing up in our mailing list; or

1.3.2. Through a variety of built-in technologies, such tracking and cookies data, application program interfaces, or use of a third-party application in our website.

1.4. We will only hold your personal information while it is necessary for the provision of our services to you, or that we have a valid reason to keep it for a maximum of three years. Valid reasons may include that we must keep it to avoid breaking the law.

2. DATA BEING SHARED WITH THIRD PARTIES

2.1. We may share your data with other organisations that provide services on our behalf to operate the website. Examples of when we may share your data with service providers include sharing with:

2.1.1. Internet and cloud hosting services providers, such as Amazon Web Services (AWS), Cloudflare, Bunny CDN, and other content-delivery networks, to help accommodate the traffic on the website without compromising the bandwidth;

2.1.2. Third-party webpage components and assets, such as Google Fonts, in order to style and design the website;

2.1.3. Social Media Platforms, such as Facebook and Twitter, in order to make it easier to view and share the contents of the website;

2.1 .4. Third-party analytic services, such as Google Analytics, which sends your session statistics, IP address, geolocation, and browser and device information, in order to optimize your experience of the website.

2.1.5. YouTube, given that we use their unbranded embedded player to provide video content on our websites and apps. The embedded player relies on the YouTube API, which is a type of software that allows data to be communicated between our website and apps and the YouTube player.

3. TRACKING & COOKIES DATA

3.1. Definition of ‘Cookies’. Cookies are small text files which a website may place on your computer or device when you visit a site. The cookie will help the website to recognize your device the next time you visit. Web beacons, pixels or other similar files can also do the same thing. We use the term “cookies” in this policy to refer to all files that collect information in this way.

3.1.1. The majority of websites use cookies to collect and retain personal information about their visitors. Most cookies collect general information, such as how visitors arrive at and use our Sites, the device they are using, their internet protocol address (IP address), what pages they are viewing and their approximate location.

3.1.2.You can instruct your browser to refuse all cookies or to indicate when a cookie is being sent. However, if you do not accept cookies, you may not be able to use some portions of our website.

3.2. Examples of Cookies we use. We use, without limitation, the following types of cookies:

3.2.1. Session Cookies. We use Session Cookies to operate our Service.

3.2.2. Preference Cookies. We use Preference Cookies to remember your preferences and various settings. For example, we use technology on our Sites, which records user movements, including page scrolling, clicks and text entered. This helps us to identify usability issues and improve the assistance we can provide to users and is also used for aggregated and statistical reporting purposes.

3.2.3. Security Cookies. We use Security Cookies for security purposes.

3.2.4. Third party cookies. These are cookies created by domains other than this website. For example, social-media plugins that enable you to log in and share website materials on Facebook, Twitter, Instagram and the like will place cookies on your device.

4. LAWFUL BASIS FOR PROCESSING

4.1. We only process personal information where we have a lawful basis for doing so. This includes, but is not limited to, the following

4.1.1. User consent. This is where you have given us explicit permission to process personal information for a given purpose. For example, if you sign up to our mailing list, we would ask for your consent to use your personal information (such as contact details) to send you the materials in our website.

4.1.2. Legitimate organizational purposes. This is where we have a legitimate interest, an organization, to process personal information. For example, where we are aware of copyright infringements on our Site, it is in our legitimate interests to identify those responsible. We take due care to balance our interests against your right to privacy.

4.1.3. Legal obligation. This is where we have to process personal information in order to comply with the law. For example, we process and retain customer access information to comply with data privacy regulations.

5. USE OF DATA

5.1. Purpose of Collection. We use the collected data for various purposes:

5.1.1. To provide additional contact information in order to provide more information with regards to CEBSI and its affiliates;

5.1.2. To provide and maintain the Service;

5.1.3. To notify you about changes to our Service;

5.1.4. To allow you to participate in interactive features of our Service when you choose to do so;

5.1.5. To provide customer care and support;

5.1.6. To provide analysis or valuable information so that we can improve the Service;

5.1. 7. To monitor the usage of the Service;

5.1.8. To detect, prevent and address technical issues.

5.2. Third-party cookies. We also use third party cookies for the following reasons:

5.2.1. To help us monitor traffic on our Sites (like many companies, we use Google Analytics to do this);

5.2.2. To identify fraudulent or non-human traffic;

5.2.3. To assist with market research;

5.2.4. To improve Site functionality;

5.2.5. To monitor compliance with our terms and conditions and copyright policy;

5.2.6. We also use third party submission of “cookies-like” and robotic crawl data to optimize search results in Google. Bing, and other search engine companies.

6. DATA CONTROLLER AND PROCESSOR.

6.1. All personal data collected as part of your use of our website are controlled and processed by CEBSI in its offices in the Philippines, located at 1 Central Ave, Quezon City, Philippines 1107.

6.2. Your consent to this Privacy Policy followed by your submission of such information represents your agreement to that transfer, acknowledging the presence of risks given the absence of any Standard Contractual Clauses, adequacy decisions. and similar privacy provisions.

6.3. CEBSI will take all steps it considers reasonable to ensure that your data is treated securely and in accordance with this Privacy Policy.

6.4. Locale Representative. For the purposes of the GDPR, CEBSI’s locale representative in the EU is:

7. DISCLOSURE OF DATA

7.1. Legal Requirements. We may disclose your Personal Data in the good faith belief that such action is necessary to:

7 .1. 1. To comply with a legal obligation;

7.1.2. To protect and defend our rights or property;

7.1.3. To prevent or investigate possible wrongdoing in connection with the Service;

7.1.4. To protect the personal safety of users of the Service or the public; and

7.1.5. To protect against legal liability.

7.2. Security Of Data Disclosed. The security of your data is important to us, but remember that no method of transmission over the Internet, or method of electronic storage is completely secure. While we strive to use commercially acceptable means to protect your Personal Data, we cannot guarantee its absolute security.

7.3. Service Providers. We may also employ third party companies and individuals to facilitate our Service (“Service Providers”), to provide the Service on our behalf, to perform website-related services or to assist us in analyzing how our Service is used. These third parties have access to your Personal Data only to perform these tasks on our behalf and are obligated not to disclose or use it for any other purpose.

8. LINKS TO OTHER SITES

8.1. Our Website may contain links to other sites that are not operated by us. If you click on a third-party link, you will be directed to that third party’s site. We strongly advise you to review the Privacy Policy of every site you visit.

8.2. CEBSI has no control over and assume no responsibility for the content, privacy policies or practices of any third-party sites or services.

9. CHILDREN'S PRIVACY

9.1. When visiting the website, you warrant and assure CEBSI that you are over the age of consent. If you are under the age of consent, you warrant and assure CEBSI that any personal information you provide has been provided under the consent and supervision of a parent/guardian.

9.2. We do not knowingly collect personally identifiable information from anyone under the age of consent without parental supervision. If you are a parent or guardian and you are aware that your Children has provided us with Personal Data without your consent, please contact us.

10. YOUR RIGHTS

10.1. Under data protection laws, you have rights as an individual in relation to the personal data we hold about you. These rights include:

10.1.1. The right to object to direct marketing;

10.1.2. The right to access the personal data that we process about you;

10.1.3. The right to request the deletion of your personal data;

10.1.4. The right to request the rectification of your personal data – you can manage some of this information in your account.

10.2. You can exercise these rights by contacting us through the inquiries page on our website.

## 兄弟愛

日本語

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-deutsch/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/the-brotherhood/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-portugues/)

*Iglesia Ni Cristo*は、キリストの教会の一員は兄弟愛を守らなくてはならないと信じている。キリストが、キリストの教会の中に兄弟愛を定められた（マタイ23:8）。だから、教会の一員は、お互いに兄弟または姉妹と呼び合う。

Iglesia Ni Cristoのメンバーは、キリストの命令と使徒たちの教えにあるように、互いを愛さなければならない。これによって、真のキリストの弟子であると示すことができる（ヨハネ13:34-35; Iペトロ2:17）。

教会の兄弟姉妹を憎むことは悪いことで、そのような者は人殺 しと同じであり、永遠の命を受けることができない（Iヨハネ3:15）。

教会内の兄弟愛を守るために、メンバー同士がもめ事を起こしたら、和解するように命じられている（マタイ5:23-25; エフェソ4:32）。

## Die Brüderlichkeit

Deutsch

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-filipino/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/the-brotherhood/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-portugues/)

Die *Iglesia Ni Cristo*glaubt, dass die Mitglieder der wahren Kirche Christi die Brüderlichkeit aufrechterhalten sollen. Christus errichtete die Brüderlichkeit innerhalb der Kirche Christi (Mt. 23,8). Das ist der Grund, warum die Mitglieder der Kirche sich gegenseitig als „Bruder“ und „Schwester“ ansprechen.

Die Mitglieder der Iglesia Ni Cristo sollten einander lieben, wie es von Christus und den Aposteln gelehrt wurde. Dies zeigt, dass sie die wahren Jünger Christi sind (Joh. 13,34-35; 1 Petr. 2,17).

Es ist böse, einen Bruder in der Kirche zu hassen. Wer seinen Bruder im Glauben hasst, wird als ein Mörder betrachtet und das ewige Leben nicht erhalten (1 Joh. 3,15).

Um die Liebe der Brüderlichkeit in der Kirche aufrechtzuerhalten, wird den Mitgliedern, die Missverständnisse oder Streitigkeiten haben, befohlen, sich zu versöhnen (Mt. 5,23-25; Eph. 4,32).

## La Hermandad

Español

[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/the-brotherhood/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-portugues/)

La Iglesia De Cristo cree que los miembros de la verdadera Iglesia De Cristo deben observar la hermandad. Cristo estableció la hermandad dentro de la Iglesia De Cristo (Mat. 23:8). Esta es la razón por qué los miembros de la Iglesia se dirigen los unos a los otros como hermanos y hermanas.

Los miembros de la Iglesia De Cristo deben amarse los unos a los otros tal y como mandó Cristo y enseñaron los Apóstoles. Esto demuestra que son verdaderos discípulos de Cristo (Juan 13:34-35; 1 Ped. 2:17).

Es malo odiar a un hermano en la Iglesia. Cualquiera que odie a su hermano en la fe es considerado un asesino y no recibirá la vida eterna (1 Juan 3:15).

Para mantener el amor fraternal en la Iglesia, se les manda reconciliarse a los miembros que tienen malentendidos y disputas (Mat. 5:23-25; Efe. 5:32).

## Ang kapatiran

Filipino

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-espanol/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/the-brotherhood/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-portugues/)

Sumasampalataya ang *Iglesia Ni Cristo*na dapat itaguyod ng mga kaanib sa tunay na Iglesia ang kanilang kapatiran. Si Cristo ang nagtatag ng kapatiran sa loob ng Kaniyang Iglesia (Mat. 23:8). Ito ang dahilan kung bakit “kapatid” ang tawagan sa isa’t isa ng mga kaanib sa Iglesia.

Ang mga kaanib sa Iglesia ay dapat mag-ibigan bilang tunay na magkakapatid gaya ng iniutos ni Cristo at gaya ng itinuro ng mga apostol. Ito ang katunayan na sila ang mga tunay na alagad ni Cristo (Juan 13:34-35; I Ped. 2:17).

Masama na mapoot sa sinumang kapatid sa Iglesia. Ang sinumang mapoot sa kaniyang kapatid sa pananampalataya ay itinuturing na mamamatay-tao at hindi magmamana ng buhay na walang hanggan (I Juan 3:15).

Upang mapanatili ang pagiibigang magkakapatid sa loob ng Iglesia, ang mga kaanib na may di-pagkakaunawaan o pagtatalo ay inuutusang magkasundo (Mat. 5:23-25; Efe. 4:32).

## La Fraternité

Français

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-italiano/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/the-brotherhood/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-portugues/)

L’ *Iglesia Ni Cristo*croit que les membres de la vraie Église Du Christ devraient observés la fraternité. Le Christ a établi une fraternité dans l’Église Du Christ (Mt 23:8). C’est pourquoi les membres de l’Église s’adressent les uns aux autres comme frère et soeur.

Les membres de l’Iglesia Ni Cristo devraient s’aimer les uns les autres comme étant commandé par le Christ et enseigné par les Apôtres. Cela Pasugo: God’s Message Édition Spéciale 7 montre qu’ils sont les vrais disciples du Christ (Jn 13:34-35; 1 P 2:17).

Il est mal d’haïr ses frères et soeurs au sein de l ’Église. Quiconque hait son frère ou sa soeur dans la foi est considéré comme un meurtrier et n’atteindra pas la vie éternelle (1 Jn 3:15).

Afin de maintenir l’amour pour la fraternité dans l’Église, les membres qui ont un malentendu ou des disputes sont commandés de se réconcilier (Mt 5:23-25; Ep 4:32).

## La Fratellanza

Italiano

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/the-brotherhood/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-portugues/)

La *Iglesia Ni Cristo*crede che i membri della vera Chiesa Di Cristo devono osservare la fratellanza. Cristo ha stabilito la fratellanza nella Chiesa Di Cristo (Mat. 23:8). Questo è il motivo per cui i membri della Chiesa, tra loro, si chiamano fratello o sorella.

Ai membri della Iglesia Ni Cristo viene comandato di amarsi reciprocamente, come comandato da Cristo e come insegnato dagli Apostoli. Questo dimostra che sono i veri discepoli di Cristo (Gio. 13:34- 35; 1 Pi. 2:17).

È un male odiare qualunque fratello nella Chiesa. Chiunque odia suo fratello nella fede è considerato un omicida e non otterrà la vita eterna (1 Gi. 3:15).

Per mantenere l’amore per la fratellanza nella Chiesa, ai membri che hanno delle incomprensioni o delle discussioni, viene comandato di fare pace (Mat. 5:23-25; Efe. 4:32).

Menu Search Search Close this search box. [Crenças / A Irmandade](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## A Irmandade

Português

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-brotherhood-francais/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/the-brotherhood/)

A *Iglesia Ni Cristo*acredita que os membros da verdadeira Igreja De Cristo devem observar irmandade. Cristo estabeleceu a irmandade dentro da Igreja De Cristo (Mat. 23:8). Esta é a razão pelo qual os membros da Igreja se referem um ao outro como irmão ou irmã.

Membros da Iglesia Ni Cristo devem amar um ao outro como é mandado por Cristo e ensinado pelos Apóstolos. Isso demonstra que eles são, verdadeiramente, discípulos de Cristo (João 13:34-35; I Ped. 2:17).

É mal s entirmos raiva por qualquer irmão na Igreja. Quem odeia o seu irmão na fé é considerado como um assassino e, certamente, não alcançará a vida eterna (I João 3:15).

Para mantermos o amor pela irmandade na Igreja, os membros que tiverem algum mal entendido ent re si são mandados a se reconciliarem. (Mat. 5:23-25; Efe. 4:32).

The Christian Unity-日本語 - Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)[信じている教え / クリスチャンの団結](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## クリスチャンの団結

日本語

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-deutsch/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/the-christian-unity/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-portugues/)

*Iglesia Ni Cristo*は、神聖なる団結を支持する。これは完全なる団 結と言える。神とキリストと教会のメンバーが共に一つとなって団結するからだ（ヨハネ17:23, 21）。

私たちは、神の栄光 のために、キリストの御名においてこの団結を守っている（Iコリント1:10; 10:31）。分裂行為は厳しく禁じられている。キリストは分裂されないからだ。分裂や争いは、地上のもの、この世のもの、悪魔から出たもの（Iコリント1:10. 13; ヤコブ 3:14-15）。

The Christian Unity-Deutsch - Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)[Die Glaubensrichtungen / Die christliche Einigkeit](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## Die christliche Einigkeit

Deutsch

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-filipino/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/the-christian-unity/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-portugues/)

Die Iglesia Ni Cristo verpflichtet sich zu der heiligen Einigkeit. Dies ist die absolute Einigkeit, denn in dieser Gemeinschaft sind Gott, Christus und die Kirche vereint (Joh. 17,23;21).

Wir halten diese Einigkeit im Namen Christi zur Herrlichkeit Gottes ein (1 Kor. 1,10; 10,31). Ab- oder Kirchenspaltungen sind strengstens verboten, weil Christus nicht gespalten ist. Spaltungen und Streit sind irdisch, eigennützig und teuflisch (1 Kor. 1,10;13; Jak. 3,14-15).

The Christian Unity-Español - Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)[Creencias / La Unidad Cristiana](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## La Unidad Cristiana

Español

[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/the-christian-unity/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-portugues/)

La *Iglesia De Cristo*sostiene la sagrada unidad. Esta es una unidad absoluta, ya que en esta unidad, Dios, Cristo y la Iglesia están juntos o unidos (Juan 17: 23, 21).

Nosotros observamos esta unidad en el nombre de Cristo, para la gloria de Dios (1 Cor. 1:10; 10:31). La división está estrictamente prohibida porque Cristo no está dividido. Las divisiones y disensiones son terrenales, sensuales y diabólicas. (1 Cor. 1:10, 13; Sant. 3:14-15).

## Ang pagkakaisang Cristiano

Filipino

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-espanol/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/the-christian-unity/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-portugues/)

Ang *Iglesia Ni Cristo*ay naninindigan sa banal na kaisahan. Ito ay lubos na pagkakaisa dahil ang nagkakaisa ay ang Diyos, si Cristo, at ang Iglesia (Juan 17:23, 21).

Tinutupad namin ang kaisahang ito sa pangalan ni Cristo, sa kaluwalhatian ng Diyos (I Cor. 1:10; 10:31). Ang pagkakabaha-bahagi o pagkakampi-kampi ay mahigpit na ipinagbabawal sapagkat si Cristo ay hindi nahahati. Ang pagkakampi-kampi at pagkakabaha-bahagi ay nauukol sa lupa, sa laman, at sa diablo (I Cor. 1:10, 13; Sant. 3:14-15).

The Christian Unity-Français - Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)[Croyances / L’Unité Chrétienne](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## L’Unité Chrétienne

Français

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-italiano/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/the-christian-unity/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-portugues/)

L’ *Iglesia Ni Cristo*se conforme à l’unité sacrée. C’est l’unité absolue, car en cette unité, Dieu, le Christ et l’Église sont rassemblés ou réunis (Jean 17:23, 21).

Nous observons cette unité au nom du Christ, à la gloire de Dieu (1 Co 1:10; 10:31). La division ou le schisme est strictement interdit car le Christ n’est pas divisé. Les divisions et les conflits sont terrestres, humaines et démoniaques (1 Co 1:10, 13; Jc 3:14-15).

The Christian Unity-Italiano - Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)[Credenza / L’Unità Cristiana](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## L’Unità Cristiana

Italiano

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/the-christian-unity/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-portugues/)

La Iglesia Ni Cristo si sottomette alla sacra unità. Questa unità è assoluta, poiché in questa unità, Dio, Cristo e la Chiesa sono uniti insieme (Gio. 17:23, 21).

Osserviamo questa unità nel nome di Cristo, per la gloria di Dio (1 Co. 1:10; 10:31). La divisione o lo scisma è severamente proibito, perché Cristo non è diviso. Le divisioni e le contese sono terrene, materiali e diaboliche (1 Cor. 1:10, 13; Gia. 3:14-15).

The Christian Unity-Português - Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)[Crenças / A União Cristã](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## A União Cristã

Português

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-christian-unity-francais/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/the-christian-unity/)

A Iglesia Ni Cristo é a favor da sagrada união. Isto é, união absoluta, pois nessa união, Deus, Cristo, e a Igreja estão todos juntos ou unidos. (João 17:23, 21).

Observamos essa união em nome de Cristo, para a glória de Deus (I Cor. 1:10; 10:31). É proíbida, rigorosamente, a divisão porque Cristo não é dividido. Divisões são mundanas, carnais e demoníacas (I Cor. 1:10, 13; Tiago 3:14-15).

The Church Administrastion-Español - Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)[Creencias / Acerca La Administración De La Iglesia](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## Acerca La Administración De La Iglesia

Español

[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/the-church-administration/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administration-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administration-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administration-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administration-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administration-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administration-portugues/)

La Iglesia De Cristo cree que cada miembro está obligado a someterse a la Administración de la Iglesia porque es el mandamiento de Dios (Heb. 13:17). Esto es porque Dios le confió a la Administración el mensaje y ministerio de la reconciliación (2 Cor. 5:18-20). Someterse a la Administración es estar atado a sus instrucciones (Mat. 18:18). Obedecer las decisiones establecidas por la Administración es obedecer las palabras de Cristo (Hch. 16:4; Luc. 10:16).

The Church Administration-日本語 - Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)[信じている教え / 教会管理](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## 教会管理

日本語

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administrastion-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administration-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administration-deutsch/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/the-church-administration/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administration-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administration-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administration-portugues/)

*Iglesia Ni Cristo*は、各メンバーは教会管理に服従しなければならないと信じている。神の命令だからである（ヘブライ13:17）。これは、神が教会管理に御言葉と和解の務めを託されたからだ（II コリント5:18-20）。教会管理に服従するとは、その指示に従うこと（マタイ18:18）。教会管理が下した決定に従うとは、キリストの言葉に従うこと（使徒16:4; ルカ10:16）。

The Church Administration-Deutsch - Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)[Die Glaubensrichtungen / Die Kirchenverwaltung](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## Die Kirchenverwaltung

Deutsch

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administrastion-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administration-filipino/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/the-church-administration/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administration-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administration-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administration-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administration-portugues/)

Die Iglesia Ni Cristo glaubt, dass jedes Mitglied verpflichtet ist, sich der Kirchenverwaltung unterzuordnen, weil dies das Gebot Gottes ist (Hebr. 13,17). Gott hat der Kirchenverwaltung die Botschaft und das Amt der Versöhnung anvertraut (2 Kor. 5,18-20). Sich der Verwaltung unterzuordnen, heißt, sich an die Anweisungen zu binden (Mt. 18,18). Sich an die Entscheidungen zu halten, die von der Verwaltung getroffen werden, heißt, die Worte Christi zu befolgen (Apg. 16,4; Lk. 10,16).

The Church Administration-Filipino - Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)[Mga sinasampalatayanan / Tungkol sa Pamamahala](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## Tungkol sa Pamamahala

Filipino

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administrastion-espanol/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/the-church-administration/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administration-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administration-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administration-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administration-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administration-portugues/)

Ang *Iglesia Ni Cristo*ay sumasampalataya na tungkulin ng bawat kaanib nito na magpasakop sa Pamamahala ng Iglesia sapagkat ito’y utos ng Diyos (Heb. 13:17). Ito’y dahil sa Pamamahala ipinagkatiwala ng Diyos ang salita at ministeryo ng pagkakasundo (II Cor. 5:18-20). Ang pagpapasakop sa Pamamahala ay sa pamamagitan ng pagsunod sa kanilang mga pasiya (Mat. 18:18). Ang pagsunod sa mga pasiyang inilalagda ng Pamamahala ay pagsunod sa iniutos ni Cristo (Gawa 16:4; Lucas 10:16).

The Church Administration-Français - Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)[Croyances / Sur l’Administration de l’Église](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## Sur l’Administration de l’Église

Français

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administrastion-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administration-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administration-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administration-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administration-italiano/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/the-church-administration/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administration-portugues/)

L’Iglesia Ni Cristo croit que chaque membre est tenu à se soumettre à l’Administration de l’Église car c’est le commandement de Dieu (Hé 13:17). C’est ainsi car Dieu a confié à l’Administration le message et le ministère de la réconciliation (2 Co 5:18-20). Se soumettre à l’Administration est de se lier par Ses instructions (Mt 18:18). Se conformer aux décisions placées par l’Administration est se conformer aux paroles du Christ (Ac 16:4; Lc 10:16).

The Church Administration-Italiano - Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)[Credenze / L'amministrazione della Chiesa](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## L'amministrazione della Chiesa

Italiano

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administrastion-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administration-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administration-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administration-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/the-church-administration/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administration-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administration-portugues/)

La *Iglesia Ni Cristo*crede che ogni membro abbia il dovere di sottomettersi all’amministrazione della Chiesa perché è il comandamento di Dio (Ebrei 13:17). Questo perché Dio ha affidato all’Amministrazione il messaggio e il ministero della riconciliazione (2 Cor 5,18-20). Sottomettersi all’Amministrazione significa essere vincolati alle sue istruzioni (Matteo 18:18). Rispettare le decisioni stabilite dall’Amministrazione significa rispettare le parole di Cristo (Atti 16:4; Luca 10:16).

Menu Search Search Close this search box. [Crenças / Sobre a Administração da Igreja](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## Sobre a Administração da Igreja

Português

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administrastion-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administration-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administration-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administration-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administration-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-administration-francais/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/the-church-administration/)

A *Iglesia Ni Cristo*acredita que cada membro tem o dever de se submeter a Administração da Igreja porque isso é mandamento de Deus (Heb. 13:17). Isto ocorre porque Deus confiou à Administração, a mensagem e o ministério da reconciliação (II Cor. 5:18-20). Se submeter à Administração da Igreja é obedecer às Suas instruções (Mat. 18:18). Obedecer às decisões tomadas pela Administração é aceitar as palavras de Cristo (Atos 16:4; Lucas 10:16).

Menu Search Search Close this search box. [信じている教え / 教会と救い](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## 教会と救い

日本語

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-and-salvation-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-and-salvation-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-and-salvation-deutsch/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/the-church-and-salvation/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-and-salvation-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-and-salvation-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-and-salvation-portugues/)

*Iglesia Ni Cristo*は、キリストの教会の一員になることが、こ のクリスチャンの時代、人が救 いを得るための唯一の方法だと信じている。人はすべて救いが必要だ。人はすべて罪を犯し、その報酬として、火の池で死なな ければならないからである（ローマ5:12; 6:23; 黙示録20:14）。人が救われるためには、キリストを通って入る、キリストの体の一部となる、またはキリストの教会の一員とならなければならない（ヨハネ10:9; Iコリント15:27; コロサイ1:18）。キリストがお救いになるのは、御自分の教会だからである（エフェソ5:23）。

キリストは、キリストの教会の外にいる人を誰もお救いにならない。神の律法に反するからである。神の律法には、自分の罪は自分で払わなくてはならないとある（申命2 4:16; 黙示録20:14）。

[Ang kinaroroonan ng kaligtasan](https://www.pasugo.com.ph/ang-kinaroroonan-ng-kaligtasan/)

Menu Search Search Close this search box. [Die Glaubensrichtungen / Die Kirche und die Errettung](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## Die Kirche und die Errettung

Deutsch

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-and-salvation-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-and-salvation-filipino/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/the-church-and-salvation/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-and-salvation-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-and-salvation-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-and-salvation-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/the-church-and-salvation-portugues/)

Die Iglesia Ni Cristo glaubt, dass die Mitgliedschaft in der Kirche Christi der einzige Weg für den Menschen ist, um im christlichen Zeitalter gerettet zu werden. Alle Menschen brauchen die Errettung, weil alle sündigten, und folglich alle im Feuersee sterben werden. Das ist der Lohn der Sünde (Röm. 5,12; 6,23; Offb. 20,14). Sodass ein Mensch gerettet werden kann, muss er in Christus hineingehen, indem er ein Mitglied Seines Leibes oder Seiner Kirche wird (Joh. 10,9; 1 Kor. 12,27; Kol. 1,18). Denn es ist Seine Kirche, die Christus retten wird (Eph. 5,23).

Christus wird keinen außerhalb der Kirche Christi retten, weil dies gegen das Gesetz Gottes verstößt. Sein Gesetz verlangt, dass Sünder für ihre eigenen Sünden bezahlen müssen (Dtn. 24,16; Offb. 20,14).

[Ang kinaroroonan ng kaligtasan](https://www.pasugo.com.ph/ang-kinaroroonan-ng-kaligtasan/)
