## Time is running out, time to get ready

“So always be ready, alert, and prepared, because at an hour when you’re not expecting him, the Son of Man will come.”

By JOHNNY J. MARTIN

> “YOU KNOW HOW LATE IT IS; time is running out. Wake up, for the coming of the Lord is nearer now than when we first believed. The night is far gone, the day of his return will soon be here. …” (Rom. 13:11–12 Living Bible)

If the believers who lived during the time of the apostles were taught that the day of Christ’s return was already near, how much nearer then is that day to us who live in these last days? Since we do not know the exact day and hour of His return, our Lord Jesus Christ teaches:

> “So always be ready, alert, and prepared, because at an hour when you’re not expecting him, the Son of Man will come.” (Matt. 24:44 The Passion Translation)

So, dear friends, are we ready?

## Christ will return

One of the teachings of the Bible is that the Lord Jesus Christ will return:

> “My Father’s house has room to spare. If that weren’t the case, would I have told you that I’m going to prepare a place for you? When I go to prepare a place for you, I will return and take you to be with me so that where I am you will be too.” (John 14:2–3 Common English Bible)

Before the Lord Jesus Christ ascended to heaven, He told His followers that He would prepare a place for them in His Father’s house. Christ also promised, “I will return.” On the day when He returns, He will take His followers to be with Him, so that they will be where He is too.

## Christ has given signs

Not only will Christ return but also that it is so near. This is because the events He Himself specified that would signify that His return is near have been fulfilled and continue being fulfilled. His disciples asked about those signs as can be read in Matthew 24:3 and 33:

> “‘When will this happen?’ the disciples asked him later, as he sat on the slopes of the Mount of Olives. ‘What events will signal your return and the end of the world?’ …  ‘Just so, when you see all these things beginning to happen, you can know that my return is near, even at the doors’.” (lb)

In Matthew 24:6−8, the Lord Jesus Christ told them what those things are that would signal that His return is near:

> “You will hear about wars and reports of wars. Don’t be alarmed. These things must happen, but this isn’t the end yet. Nations and kingdoms will fight against each other, and there will be famines and earthquakes in all sorts of places.  But all these things are just the beginningof the sufferings associated with the end.” (ceb)

When did these signs given by our Lord Jesus Christ begin to be fulfilled? They started with the outbreak of World War I in 1914. This is concurred by the translators of *The Last Days Bible*as can be read in the footnote for chapter 24 of Matthew, on page 54:

> “Jesus now tells His followers how they could discern when the world was actually entering into the beginning of the birth pangs … The approach of the end of the age would see several phenomena on the earth occurring at the same time. Those phenomena, would be: 1. Many nations rising up against many other nations 2. Kingdoms rising against kingdoms 3. Famines 4. Disease epidemics 5. Earthquakes in various places. In Mark 13 the word troubles is used by our Lord instead of disease epidemics. … Wars between nations, or even between kingdoms, is and has been a common occurrence. History has recorded famines at various times. There have been times of great disease epidemics. There have been earthquakes in the past, but increasingly so in the present day. Jesus tells His disciples, however, to be awaiting a specific time during which all of these phenomena would be in evidence at the same time. The first such time in world history occurred during the years of World War I (1914−1918) …”

Since all these signs given by Christ have already been fulfilled, His return is truly very near. It will be in a very little while and will not delay (Heb. 10:37 International Standard Version). It will not be long now.

## “So always be ready, alert, and prepared, because at an hour when you’re not expecting him, the Son of Man will come.”

## Matthew 24:44

## The Passion Translation

Though we know that Christ’s return is very near, yet we do not know its exact day and hour. The angels of heaven do not have that knowledge, and neither does our Lord Jesus Christ Himself. The only One Who knows is the Father in heaven (Matt. 24:36, 44).

## Christ will bring a reward

Apostle Peter described Judgment Day, when the Lord Jesus Christ returns from heaven:

> “But the day of the Lord will come like a thief in the night, in which the heavens will pass away with a loud noise, and the elements will be destroyed with intense heat. The earth also and the works that are in it will be burned up. … But by the same word, the heavens and the earth that now exist are being reserved for fire, kept for the Day of Judgment and destruction of the ungodly.” (II Pet. 3:10, 7 Modern English Version)

Though fiery destruction is coming to the earth on the day that our Lord Jesus Christ returns, yet He will bring with Him His reward to people based on their own actions in life. In Revelation 22:12, He says:

> “Look! I’m coming soon. My reward is with me, to repay all people as their actions deserve.” (ceb)

Therefore, while waiting for the Lord Jesus Christ to return, what people should focus on is doing what will result in their being granted the reward, and avoiding what will result in their destruction on that day.

The reward that Christ brings with Him on His return is salvation (Heb. 9:28) from the fiery destruction on the Day of Judgment. Along with salvation, the blessed ones will receive the crown of righteousness (II Tim. 4:8). The crown of righteousness is also the crown of life, that is, the eternal life (Rev. 2:10) that will be enjoyed by those who will enter the new heaven and new earth, the Holy City.

## “Look! I’m coming soon. My reward is with me, to repay all people as their actions deserve.”

## Revelation 22:12

## Common English Bible

## The blessed ones

A lot of people are waiting for the day of Christ’s return, for they are hoping to be counted among those whom Christ will reward with salvation and eternal life. It is good to hope for that blessing, but not everyone who is hoping for it will actually receive it. In fact, our Lord Jesus Christ teaches that though many call Him “Lord” and render services in His name, they will be driven away on Judgment Day:

> “On the Judgment Day, many people will say to me, ‘Lord, Lord, didn’t we prophesy in your name and expel demons in your name and do lots of miracles in your name?’ Then I’ll tell them, ‘I’ve never known you. Get away from me, you people who do wrong’.” (Matt. 7:22–23 ceb)

This proves that it is not enough to say that Jesus is Lord and to perform services or even wondrous works in His name to enter God’s kingdom.

The ones who are waiting for the day of Christ’s return who will not be disappointed are the ones whom Apostle Peter referred to as being at peace with God (II Pet. 3:14). They are those who are in the one body of Christ:

> “And let the peace of God rule in your hearts, to which also you were called in one body; and be thankful.” (Col. 3:15 New King James Version)

The one body of Christ is the Church (Col. 1:18), the name of which is “church of Christ” (Acts 20:28 Lamsa Translation).

Therefore, to get ready for the nearing return of Christ is to be a member of His Church, faithfully obeying His commands. The faithful members of the Church Of Christ are the ones waiting for Christ’s return who will not be disappointed. They will be blessed with salvation and eternal life, and will be able to enter the Holy City where they will dwell forever.

So, dear readers, time is running out; it is time to get ready! If you want to be ready, if you want to have the reward of salvation when Christ returns, be a member of His Church—the Church Of Christ. ❑

For more articles, visit [www.pasugo.com.ph](https://www.pasugo.com.ph/)

## True Church’s significance emphasized in Isabela West evangelical missions

By MARK ANDRO T. MILAN and KENNETH ROD B. LABASAN

Posted: January 23, 2026

Previous slide Next slide

On January 11, 2026, the [Ecclesiastical District of Isabela West](https://iglesianicristo.net/directory/districts/isabela-west), in the Philippines, held evangelical missions at four separate venues. Ministers preached a Bible-based lesson expounding on the significance of the true Church for man’s salvation. In these last days, the true Church is the [Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ)](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/).

The sites of the event were the houses of worship of the Local Congregations of [Aurora](https://iglesianicristo.net/directory/locales/aurora-2), [Quirino](https://iglesianicristo.net/directory/locales/quirino-2), [Mallig](https://iglesianicristo.net/directory/locales/mallig), and [Roxas](https://iglesianicristo.net/directory/locales/roxas). There, assistant district supervising minister Brother Benigno T. Esguerra Jr., district Light of Salvation overseer Brother Jose C. Canicosa, district [Christian Family Organizations](https://iglesianicristo.net/edification/)overseer Brother Roger D. Larona, and district auditor Brother Efren M. Ruben officiated, respectively.

The said houses of worship proved to be strategic and spacious enough as brethren from nearby local congregations came in droves there with their many guests. Overall, there were 784 guests in attendance, many of whom expressed willingness to continue knowing more about the biblical teachings upheld inside the Church.

“I’m curious. It’s my first time attending an evangelical mission,” said guest Teodora Pascual. “Knowing more about [Jesus Christ](https://www.pasugo.com.ph/is-christ-god-part-i/), and which [Church] to enter lightens my heart. I’m happy.”

“My classmate invited me here. I felt privileged for having heard God’s words,” shared Kurt Froilan Salvador. Asked what caught his attention during the study of God’s words, he replied, “Serving God must be done [without further delay](https://www.pasugo.com.ph/time-is-running-out-time-to-get-ready/).”

“It’s very important that we’re able to invite and bring along people for them to know about God’s will. Because God Himself wants that, for people to be saved,” said Brother Esguerra in an interview after the propagational activity. On behalf of the district, he added, “Such biblical truth inspires us to keep doing our part in the propagation of the true faith. It’s also our response to [the call](https://www.pasugo.com.ph/constantly-uphold-what-is-right-and-honorable/)of our Executive Minister Brother Eduardo V. Manalo, so that more people as possible will also attain salvation.”

For more news, visit INC News and Updates

## Upli Congregation holds inaugural worship

By ERANNIEL ANGELO B. DOSDOS

Posted: January 22, 2026

Previous slide Next slide

Members of the newly established Local Congregation of Upli, [Ecclesiastical District of Dasmariñas City, Cavite](https://iglesianicristo.net/directory/districts/cavite-south), in the Philippines, held its inaugural worship service as a full-fledged congregation on January 10, 2026.

A few weeks earlier, on December 24, 2025, the Church Administration approved that it be elevated from being an extension of [Buck State Local Congregation](https://iglesianicristo.net/directory/locales/buck-state)for several years.

Brother Gerardo T. Purificacion, a minister of the gospel, officiated at the inaugural worship. In his Bible-based homily, he called on the attendees that more than material needs they could offer their fellowmen through the Church’s socio-civic activities, it is the true faith that they ought to share as members of the *Iglesia Ni Cristo*[(Church Of Christ)](https://iglesianicristo.net/about-us/). By demonstrating such genuine love, the minister explained, they lead others into the true Church and to God’s promised salvation on Judgment Day.

After the homily, district edification overseer Brother Richer Cortez led the oath-taking of 16 additional officers in the newly local congregation.

“This occasion is a very great blessing for us,” enthused Felipe Siggaoat Jr., newly appointed third head deacon. “Like what I’ve learned from the homily, I will prove my love for others through actions. I will redouble my efforts in helping in the socio-civic and propagational activities launched by the [Church Administration](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/the-church-administration/).”

“The brethren and officers are filled with gladness,” attested resident minister Brother Darius Almozara. On their behalf, he added, “We’re all the more inspired to remain zealous in our services to the [Lord God](https://iglesianicristo.net/one-god-the-father/)and all other activities of the Church.”

A few hours prior to the inaugural service, the congregation conducted a medical-dental mission, under the supervision of the district supervising minister, Brother Ricky S. Dante. Facilitated by healthcare professionals from the New Era General Hospital and officers and members of the district’s [Christian Medical Dental and Paramedical Society](https://iglesianicristo.net/edification/), they provided for free medical, dental, and OB-GYN checkups as well as eyeglasses, medicines, and vitamins to the beneficiaries.

“Happiness. This is what I feel upon receiving free medical services from this activity launched by the Church Administration,” said deacon Seth Rivera. “This medical mission is a great help for us considering hospitals are far from our place.” — With assistance from Erman Robles and Niko Moncada

For more news, visit INC News and Updates

## Worship

ENGLISH

[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-francais/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-italiano/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-portugues/)

[繁體中文](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-%e7%b9%81%e9%ab%94%e4%b8%ad%e6%96%87/)

Previous slide Next slide

A solemn gathering of the faithful, the worship service of the *Iglesia Ni Cristo*is usually held twice a week in the house of worship and consists of hymn-singing, prayers, voluntary offering, and the study of God’s words to guide the true Christians in their daily living.

#### Houses of worship

To meet the needs of its constantly increasing number of worshipers, the Church Of Christ carries out a vigorous chapel construction program, extending to remote villages in the countryside.

Through the years, the Church has built about 5,000 houses of worship worldwide. Many of them have served as distinct landmarks in the locality.

#### Children’s Worship Service

A weekly worship service for children aged 11 years and below, using age-appropriate methods in biblical instruction.

Worship of God-日本語 - Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)[信じている教え / 神への礼拝](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## 神への礼拝

日本語

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-deutsch/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/worship-of-god/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-portugues/)

*Iglesia Ni Cristo*は、神を礼拝し、その戒めを守ることは人の務 めであると信じている。神を礼拝 することは、人の生得の義務だ。神が私たちの創造主であるゆえ、私たちは自分のものではなく、神 のものであるからだ（詩篇95:6- 7; 100:3）。

神への礼拝は、霊と真理によってなされなればならない（ヨハネ4:23-24）。神の御名を礼拝すること、これが霊による礼拝であり、御言葉を守ることによって天で御心が行われること、これが真理による礼拝（マタイ6:9-10; ヨハネ17:17）。

この終わりの時代のキリストの教会またはフィリピン語でIglesia Ni Cristoは（一世紀のキリストの教会のように）、賛美歌を歌い、お祈りし、神の御言葉を学び、献げ物をすることによって礼拝する（Iコリント14:26, 15; 16:2）。

Iglesia Ni Cristoは、神の戒めにあるように、神が喜ばれるた めに忘れず献げ物をする（ヘブラ イ13:16）。キリストの教会の一員 は各自、心で決めた通りに献げる。神はこのような者を愛されるから だ（IIコリント9:7）。心から献げ るために、前もって献げ物を準備しなければならない。信心深い者は、神より受けた祝福、つまり収 入に応じて献げ物をたくわえてお く（Iコリント16:2; 申命16:16-17）。

キリストご自身が、キリストの教会の礼拝集会をとても大切にしておられる。キリストの教会の礼拝集会の時にはいつでも、キリストもご自分の霊によって、その中におられるのだ（マタイ18:20; ガラテヤ4:6）。

礼拝集会はキリストの教会にとって最も重要である。そのため、メンバーが礼拝をおろそかにすることは厳しく禁じられている。礼 拝をわざとおろそかにすることは 重罪である（ヘブライ10:25-27）。

Worship of God-Deutsch - Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)[Die Glaubensrichtungen / Die Verehrung zu Gott](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## Die Verehrung zu Gott

Deutsch

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-filipino/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/worship-of-god/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs-francais/les-saintes-ecritures/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-portugues/)

Die *Iglesia Ni Cristo*glaubt, dass es die ganze Pflicht des Menschen ist, Gott zu verehren und Seine Gebote zu halten. Die Verehrung zu Gott ist die angeborene Pflicht aller Menschen, weil Er uns erschaffen hat und wir daher kein Eigentum unserer selbst sind, sondern zu Gott gehören (Ps. 95,6-7; 100,3).

Die Verehrung zu Gott sollte im Geist und in der Wahrheit durchgeführt werden (Joh. 4,23-24). Gottes Name sollte verehrt werden, welche die Verehrung im Geiste ist; und Sein Wille sollte im Himmel geschehen, welches durch die Gehorsamkeit zu Seinen Worten erfolgt wird. Das ist die Verehrung in der Wahrheit (Mt. 6,9-10; Joh. 17,17).

Die Kirche Christi in diesen letzten Tagen oder die Iglesia Ni Cristo auf philippinisch, hält (wie die Kirche Christi im ersten Jahrhundert) einen Gottesdienst ab, der durch Psalmen und Singen von Lobliedern, Gebete, Lehren der Worte Gottes und Opfergaben gekennzeichnet ist (1 Kor. 14,26; 15; 16,2).

Die Iglesia Ni Cristo leistet Opfergaben und Abgaben, wie Gott es geboten hatte, die nicht vergessen werden sollten und Gott an diesen Gefallen findet (Hebr. 13,16). Jedes Mitglied der Kirche Christi sollte geben, wie er es sich in seinem Herzen vorgenommen hat, denn Gott liebt einen fröhlichen Geber (2 Kor. 9,7). Die Abgaben sollten vorher vorbereitet werden, sodass sie freiwillig und nicht unter Druck abgegeben werden können. Der treue Diener legt seinen Beitrag beiseite und behält einen Betrag entsprechend seinem Verdienst oder den Segnungen für sich, die er von Gott erhalten hat (1 Kor. 16,1-2; Dtn. 16,16-17).

Christus Selbst hat eine hohe Wertschätzung über die Versammlungen der Kirche Christi in den Gemeindegottesdiensten, weil Er, jedes Mal, wenn sie sich versammeln, durch Seinen Geist unter ihnen ist (Mt. 18,20; Gal. 4,6).

Der Gemeindegottesdienst ist in der Kirche Christi äußerst wichtig. Dies ist der Grund, warum den Mitgliedern strengstens untersagt wird, diese zu versäumen. Diese absichtlich zu versäumen, ist eine schwere Sünde (Hebr. 10,25-27).

## La adoración a Dios

Español

[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/worship-of-god/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-portugues/)

La Iglesia De Cristo cree que es el deber primordial del hombre adorar a Dios y guardar Sus mandamientos. La adoración a Dios es la obligación inherente del hombre, porque Él nos creó, por tanto, no pertenecemos a nosotros mismos sino que a Dios (Sal. 95:6-7; 100:3).

La adoración a Dios debe llevarse a cabo en espíritu y en verdad (Juan 4:23-24). El nombre de Dios deber ser adorado―ésta es la adoración en espíritu; y debe cumplirse Su voluntad en el cielo mediante nuestra obediencia a Sus palabras―ésta es la adoración en verdad (Mat. 6:9-10; Juan 17:17).

La Iglesia De Cristo en estos últimos días, o la Iglesia Ni Cristo, en tagalo (igual que la Iglesia De Cristo del primer siglo), realiza el servicio de adoración la cual se caracteriza por los salmos y el canto de himnos, oraciones, estudio de las palabras de Dios y ofrendas (1Cor. 14:26, 15; 16:2).

En la Iglesia De Cristo se llevan a cabo las ofrendas y contribuciones como mandamiento de Dios las cuales no se deben olvidar y las cuales agradan a Dios (Heb. 13:16). Cada miembro de la Iglesia De Cristo debe dar según lo que haya decidido en el corazón, porque Dios ama al que da con alegría (2 Cor. 9:7). Las contribuciones deben prepararse con antelación para que sean voluntarias y no forzadas. Los devotos apartan y guardan cierta cantidad conforme a lo que hayan ganado o a las bendiciones que Dios les ha concedido (1 Cor. 16:1-2; Deut. 16:16-17).

Cristo mismo trata con sumo respeto las asambleas o reuniones de la Iglesia De Cristo en los servicios de adoración congregacionales, porque cada vez que la Iglesia se congrega, Él está en medio de ellos mediante Su Espíritu (Mat. 18:20; Gal. 4:6).

Los servicios de adoración congregacionales son de extrema importancia en la Iglesia De Cristo: esta es la razón, por la cual a los miembros se les prohíbe estrictamente abandonarlo. Abandonarlo intencionadamente es un grave pecado (Heb. 10:25-27).

## Pagsamba sa Diyos

Filipino

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-espanol/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/worship-of-god/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-portugues/)

Sinasampalatayanan ng *Iglesia Ni Cristo*na ang buong katungkulan ng tao ay ang sumamba sa Diyos at sumunod sa Kaniyang mga utos. Ang pagsamba sa Diyos ay katutubong pananagutan ng tao, sapagkat Siya ang lumalang sa atin, kaya hindi tayo ang may-ari ng ating sarili kundi ang Diyos (Awit 95:6-7; 100:3).

Ang Diyos ay dapat sambahin sa espiritu at sa katotohanan (Juan 4:23-24). Dapat sambahin ang pangalan ng Diyos—ito ang pagsamba sa espiritu; at dapat gawin ang Kaniyang kalooban o sundin ang Kaniyang mga salita—ito ang pagsamba sa katotohanan (Mat. 6:9-10; Juan 17:17).

Isinasagawa ng *Iglesia Ni Cristo*sa mga huling araw na ito (tulad ng Iglesia noong unang siglo) ang pagsambang kinapapalooban ng pag-awit ng mga imno, pananalangin, pag-aaral ng mga salita ng Diyos, at paghahandog (I Cor. 14:26, 15; 16:2).

Si Cristo mismo ay nag-ukol ng mataas na pagpapahalaga sa pagtitipon o pagsamba. Tuwing nagkakatipon ang Kaniyang Iglesia ay naroon Siya sa kanilang kalagitnaan sa pamamagitan ng Kaniyang Espiritu (Mat. 18:20; Gal. 4:6).

Ang pagsambang kongregasyonal sa *Iglesia Ni Cristo*ay totoong napakahalaga: kaya, mahigpit na ipinagbabawal ang pagliban dito. Ang sadyang pagliban ay napakabigat na kasalanan sa Diyos (Heb. 10:25-27).

Worship of God-Français - Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)[Croyances / L’Adoration de Dieu](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## L’Adoration de Dieu

Français

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-italiano/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/worship-of-god/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-portugues/)

L’Iglesia Ni Cristo croit que c’est le devoir même de tous d’adorer Dieu et de garder Ses commandements. L’adoration de Dieu est l’obligation inhérente de tous, car Il nous a créés, ainsi nous ne nous appartenons pas mais plutôt à Dieu (Ps 95:6-7; 100:3).

L’adoration de Dieu devrait être faite en esprit et en vérité (Jn 4:23-24). Le nom de Dieu devrait être adoré—c’est l’adoration en esprit; et Sa volonté devrait être faite en obéissant à Ses paroles—c’est l’adoration en vérité (Mt 6:9-10; Jn 17:17).

L’Église Du Christ dans ces derniers jours, ou l’Iglesia Ni Cristo, en Filipino (tout comme l’Église Du Christ au premier siècle), observe le service d’adoration qui est défini par des psaumes et des hymnes de louanges, des prières, l’étude des paroles de Dieu et des offrandes (1 Co 14:26, 15; 16:2).

L’Iglesia Ni Cristo effectue des offrandes et des contributions étant le commandement de Dieu qui ne devrait pas être oublié et avec lequel Dieu trouve plaisir (Hé 13:16). Chaque membre de l’Église Du Christ devrait donner volontairement venant du coeur, car Dieu aime celui qui donne avec joie (2 Co 9:7). Les contributions devraient être préparées bien avant afin qu’elles soient volontaires et non forcées. Les fidèles mettent de côté et gardent une certaine somme proportionnellement à leur gain ou les bénédictions que Dieu leur accorde (1 Co 16:1-2; Dt 16:16-17).

Le Christ Lui-même a une haute estime de l’assemblée réunie de l’Église Du Christ dans des services d’adoration en congrégation, car à chaque fois que Son église se rassemble, Il y est présent au milieu des membres par Son Esprit (Mt 18:20; Gal 4:6).

Le service d’adoration en congrégation est d’une extrême importance au sein de l’Église Du Christ: c’est pourquoi, les membres sont formellement interdits de l’oublier. L’oublier volontairement est un grave péché (Hé 10:25-27).

Menu Search Search Close this search box. [Credenza / L’Adorazione di Dio](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## L’Adorazione di Dio

Italiano

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/worship-of-god/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-francais/)
[Português](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-portugues/)

La Iglesia Ni Cristo crede che sia un totale dovere dell’uomo di adorare Dio e di osservare i Suoi comandamenti. L’adorazione di Dio è l’obbligo innato dell’uomo, poiché Lui ci ha creati, quindi, non apparteniamo a noi stessi, ma a Dio (Sal. 95:6-7; 100:3).

L’adorazione di Dio deve essere fatta nello spirito e nella verità (Gio. 4:23-24). Il nome di Dio deve essere adorato—questa è l’adorazione nello spirito; e la Sua volontà deve essere fatta, ubbidendo alle Sue parole—questa è l’adorazione nella verità (Mat. 6:9-10; Gio. 17:17).

La Chiesa Di Cristo in questi ultimi giorni, o la Iglesia Ni Cristo, in Filippino (come la Chiesa Di Cristo nel primo secolo), osserva il servizio di adorazione che è caratterizzato dai salmi e dal canto degli inni, dalle preghiere, dallo studio delle parole di Dio e dalle offerte (1 Co. 14:26, 15; 16:2).

La Iglesia Ni Cristo compie il dovere di dare delle offerte o dei contributi come comandamento di Dio che non deve essere dimenticato e con queste, Dio è ben compiaciuto (Ebr. 13:16). Ogni membro della Chiesa Di Cristo deve dare secondo quanto ha deciso in cuor suo, poiché Dio ama un donatore gioioso (2 Co. 9:7). Le offerte devono essere preparate in anticipo, cosicché possano essere spontanee e non forzate. I fedeli mettono da parte e tengono una certa somma in proporzione al loro guadagno o alle benedizioni che Dio riversa su di loro (1 Co. 16:1-2; Deu. 16:16-17).

Cristo Stesso dà grande importanza alla riunione della Chiesa Di Cristo nei servizi di adorazione congregativi, poiché ogni volta che la Sua Chiesa si raduna, Lui è lì in mezzo a loro attraverso il Suo Spirito (Mat. 18:20; Gal. 4:6).

Il servizio di adorazione congregativo è di estre ma importanza nella Chiesa Di Cristo: questa è la ragione per cui ai membri viene proibito severamente di t rasc urarlo. Trascurarlo volontariamente è un grave peccato (Ebr. 10:25-27).

## Link 1

## Link 2

Worship of God-Português - Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) [Skip to content](#content)[Crenças / Adoração À Deus](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/)

## Adoração À Deus

Português

[Español](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-espanol/)
[Filipino](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-filipino/)
[Deutsch](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-deutsch/)
[日本語](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-%e6%97%a5%e6%9c%ac%e8%aa%9e/)
[Italiano](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-italiano/)
[Français](https://iglesianicristo.net/worship-of-god-francais/)
[English](https://iglesianicristo.net/beliefs/worship-of-god/)

A *Iglesia Ni Cristo*acredita que o dever principal do homem é de adorar à Deus e guardar os Seus mandamentos. É uma obrigação inerente ao homem adorar à Deus, pois Ele, é quem nos criou, e portanto, não pertencemos a nós mesmos, mas sim, pertencemos à Deus (Salmos 95:6-7; 100:3).

Devemos adorar à Deus em espírito e em verdade (João 4:23-24). É o nome de Deus que deve ser adorado – esta é a adoração em espírito; e a Sua vontade deve ser feita ao obedecermos às Suas palavras – esta é a adoração em verdade (Mat. 6:9-10; João 17:17).

A Igreja De Cristo destes últimos dias, ou a Iglesia Ni Cristo em filipino (como a Igreja De Cristo do primeiro século), segue o serviço de adoração caracterizado por salmos e cântico de hinos de louvores, orações, estudo das palavras de Deus e ofertas (I Cor. 14:26, 15; 16:2).

A Iglesia Ni Cristo realiza ofertas e contribuições como um mandamento de Deus que não deve ser esquecido e que agrada muito à Deus (Heb. 13:16). Todo membro da Igreja De Cristo deve dar de acordo com o que resolveu em seu coração, pois Deus ama quem dá com alegria (II Cor. 9:7). As contribuições devem ser preparadas de antemão para que assim, sejam voluntárias e não obrigatórias. Os fiéis separam e guardam uma certa quantia proporcional às bênçãos que Deus dá (I Cor. 16:1-2; Deut. 16:16-17).

O próprio Cristo dá grande valor às reuniões da Igreja De Cristo ou aos serviços congregacionais de adoração, pois toda vez que a Igreja se reúne, Ele está presente por meio do Seu espírito (Mat. 18:20; Gal. 4:6).

O serviçode adoração congregacional é de extrema importância na Igreja De Cristo: é por isso que, é proibido, rigorosamente, aos membros de abandonar os serviços de adoração. Abandoná-lo de propósito é um grave pecado (Heb. 10:25-27).

## 10 Things About the Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ)

Have you heard about the Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ)? Here are 10 things you should know and why we believe it's the one true Church.
- [Baptism](https://incmedia.org/tag/baptism/), [Church Membership](https://incmedia.org/tag/church-membership/)

![](https://2022incmediaorg.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/06/13212231/GTKU-2021-001-SEO-2023-WEB-BANNER.jpg)[Ask a Question](/contact/)

Maybe a friend or coworker invited you to attend a Bible study or worship service of the Iglesia Ni Cristo, but you’re on the fence about the invitation. Or, maybe you found the Church Of Christ after googling religious topics. Whatever it may be, the main point is that you’re a little uneasy about accepting an invitation. That’s understandable, there are a lot of religions out there claiming to be holders of the true one.

[Want to watch the video? Click Here to jump ahead.](#watch-video)

So, what makes this one worth your time?

Trust me, I asked that same question when I was in your shoes over 40 years ago. A coworker invited me to attend a Bible study. I said, “No thanks.” My life was good already. I had my family, I had my job, and I even had exciting hobbies to fill my time with.

And then I got into an accident. I asked God for help.

Nothing like a life-changing event to make you rethink your priorities in life, right?

So, the next time my coworker invited me, I accepted. I figured I had nothing to lose, and I was right!

If your search online has brought you here, or you’ve been invited to learn more about the Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ), here are ten things you should know about the Church, and an invitation to dig in and learn more.

- [We are not a denomination.](#we-are-not-a-denomination)
- [We believe that Jesus Christ is a man and thus, not God. In other words, we don’t believe in the Trinity.](#jesus-is-man)
- [We follow the Bible and only the Bible.](#we-follow-the-bible)
- [We’re not a cult.](#not-a-cult)
- [We don’t practice infant baptism.](#infant-baptism)`
- [We don’t celebrate Christmas, Easter, Halloween, Valentine’s Day, or any holiday based on pagan beliefs.](#pagan-beliefs)
- [We are not a Filipino church.](#not-filipino-church)
- [We believe the reestablishment of the Church is Bible-based and supported by biblical prophecy.](#biblical-prophecy)
- [We don’t practice tithing.](#tithing)
- [We believe that to be saved, you need to enter Christ and be part of His body or Church.](#be-saved)

## Ten things you should know about the Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) and why they’re essential to you.

### 1. We are not a denomination.

We get this question a lot since many churches go by the name “Church Of Christ” in many cities across the US. The first point to clarify is that the Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) is not part of the Churches of Christ associated with the American Restoration Movement.

So what makes this Church different? Well, how many of those churches have biblical prophecy as evidence of their authenticity? The Iglesia Ni Cristo was registered in the Philippines in 1914. Both the time and place of this Church’s emergence are supported by biblical prophecy.

![An old fashion style photo of four men with a question mark over it.](https://2022incmediaorg.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/06/02201129/8efcf207-xl-blog-10_reasons-003-denomination-001-js-001-1024x576.jpg)

### 2. We believe that Jesus Christ is a man and thus, not God. In other words, we don’t believe in the Trinity.

Did you know the word “Trinity” or its concept can’t be found in the Bible?

The Bible speaks of the Father, the Son, and the Holy Spirit, but it never refers to all of them as gods nor as three persons in one God; instead, it points to the Father alone as the true God.

This might be completely different from what you grew up believing. That’s why we invite you to set up a [one-on-one discussion](https://incmedia.org/contact/)with a minister of the Church Of Christ to understand what the Bible says about God, Jesus, and what you should believe.

You can also watch videos where we tackle common questions about God’s true nature and our Lord Jesus Christ.

Here are a few videos to check out:

- [Who is Jesus, and Who is God?](https://incmedia.org/who-is-jesus-and-who-is-god/)

- [Meaning of the Word in John 1:1](https://incmedia.org/meaning-of-the-word-in-john-11/)

- [The True God is Not Three Persons in One](https://incmedia.org/the-true-god-is-not-three-persons-in-one/)

- [Does God Have a Name?](https://incmedia.org/does-god-have-a-name/)

- [Is God a Man? Is God a Spirit](https://incmedia.org/is-god-a-man-is-god-a-spirit/)

### 3. We follow the Bible and only the Bible.

![A closed Bible laying on a table.](https://2022incmediaorg.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/06/02201128/7b19dbd1-xl-blog-10_reasons-005-bible-001-js-001-1024x576.jpg)

Some religions use other books to support their teachings.

In the Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ), we use only the Bible to answer questions that are asked. Question and answer. The answers are from the Bible. It’s the same format we follow in worship services, Bible studies, and even the one-on-one conversations you’ll want to have with one of the Church Of Christ’s ministers.

### 4. We’re not a cult.

Unless being a cult means completely following God’s words written in the Bible, then we’re not a cult.

We’d love to help clarify the questions or misconceptions you may have about the Church Of Christ. Let’s set up some time to talk.

You can also watch an episode of [INC International Edition](https://incmedia.org/is-the-iglesia-ni-cristo-a-cult-part-1/)where we cover the question at length.

### 5. We don’t practice infant baptism.

The Bible teaches that to qualify for baptism, one should be taught the words of God, believe in them, repent, and renew his life (Mark 16:15-16; Acts 2:38, Ephesians 4:21). Since an infant cannot do these things, infant baptism is not practiced in the Church Of Christ.

We also follow what the Bible says about [how baptisms are done](https://incmedia.org/true-baptism-in-the-bible/), which is by immersion.

### 6. We don’t celebrate Christmas, Easter, Halloween, Valentine’s Day, or any holiday based on pagan beliefs.

Since the Bible prohibits adding to or subtracting from what is written in it, we don’t follow any religious holidays rooted in pagan beliefs. If you trace the history of any of these holidays mentioned above, you’ll quickly discover how pagan practices crept in and influenced each one.

We’ve even broken down some of the holidays for you, complete with references and Bible verses.

- [Easter](https://incmedia.org/what-does-celebrating-easter-say-about-you/)and [Lent](https://incmedia.org/what-youre-really-giving-up-for-lent/)
- [Halloween](https://incmedia.org/should-christians-celebrate-halloween/)
- [Valentine’s Day](https://incmedia.org/what-is-the-definition-of-love/)
- [Christmas](https://incmedia.org/christmas-why-you-should-not-celebrate-it/)

### 7. We are not a Filipino church.

The Church Of Christ has congregations around the world and members from over 147 ethnicities. While there are many Filipinos and a lot of congregations in the Philippines, people from many different races and cultures make up the Church Of Christ.

![A group of people smiling for a selfie.](https://2022incmediaorg.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/06/02201133/4a7d380f-incmembers-01-1024x576.jpg)

Here’s a quick video to [learn more about the Church Of Christ.](https://incmedia.org/getting-to-know-the-church-of-christ/)

### 8. We believe the reestablishment of the Church is Bible-based and supported by biblical prophecy.

![A collage of newspapers with different headlines from WWI.](https://2022incmediaorg.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/06/02201134/397fdbb2-american-newspaper-headlines-from-the-very-start-of-wwi-in-1914-1155x770-1-1024x683.jpg)War declared: American newspaper headlines from the very start of WWI in 1914 Source: Clickamericana Fuente: Clickamericana

Like we mentioned earlier, everything we believe and follow in the Church Of Christ is Bible-based. This includes why we believe this Church is the reestablishment of the first- century Church Of Christ founded by the Lord Jesus Christ.

Learn the significance behind the timing of its registration in the Philippines and the outbreak of World War 1. And find out how this Church grew from the East and made its way to the West, and the biblical prophecies that back it up.

We’ve got a series of lessons breaking it down with Bible verses for you to follow along and ask questions. Let me know if you want to set up some time to discuss this.

Meanwhile, here’s a link to watch about [God’s messengers](https://incmedia.org/who-will-tell-us-who-gods-messenger-is/)and how they will be revealed to us.

### 9. We don’t practice tithing.

We frequently get this question from those emailing our website. So it’s good we’re covering it in this list. To answer the question, we turn to the writings of Apostle Paul, II Corinthians 9:7, which reads this way:

*So let each one give as he purposes in his heart, not grudgingly or of necessity; for God loves a cheerful giver.*

*[2 Corinthians 9:7 New King James Version]*

Here, we can see what God’s command to the Christian is. He was specific. First of all, who should give? What did He say? Each one should give. How should our offering be given? The Bible says, “as he purposes in his heart.” So not 10% anymore as it was during the Old Testament times. Now,  it’s what the person purposes in his heart.

We cover this topic in more detail on the program *That’s in the Bible*if you want to watch it here: [https://incmedia.org/should-tithing-be-practiced-today/](https://incmedia.org/should-tithing-be-practiced-today/)

### 10. We believe that to be saved, you need to enter Christ and be part of His body or Church.

If your goal is to make it to heaven, the Bible outlines precisely what you need to do to get there. In short, we’ve all sinned, so we all need salvation.

According to the Bible, for a person to be saved, he or she should enter in by Christ, by becoming a member of His body or Church because it is His Church that Christ will save.

Ephesians 5:23 Good News Translation be added here which says: “For a husband has authority over his wife just as Christ has authority over the church; and Christ is himself the Savior of the church, his body.”

We’re not shy in saying that to be saved you need to be part, or a [member, of the true Church Of Christ](https://incmedia.org/how-to-get-right-with-god-to-be-saved/)because that’s what the Bible teaches.

![A couple smiling and standing in front of a house of worship.](https://2022incmediaorg.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/06/02201132/bf76eafc-incmembers-04-1024x576.jpg)

## Invitation to learn more about the beliefs of the Church Of Christ

I get it. This is a lot of information. I still remember the first time I accepted an invitation to attend a Bible study. It was all so new and overwhelming at first. But I remember walking out already wanting to go back to ask more questions.

And I did. And you know what? Just like it is today, every question was answered with the Bible.

So, what are you waiting for? If you’re hesitant about attending an event, why not set up a one-on-one meeting with a minister of the Church Of Christ. You’ll get to ask your questions, and if you’re interested in learning more, we’ll tell you more about the next step.

Over forty years later, I’m still glad I did.

Not only that, these days, I spend my time helping share the biblical teachings taught inside the Church Of Christ as a minister of the gospel.

![A minister preaching in front of a congregation.](https://2022incmediaorg.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/06/02201130/ea8523a7-web-img_7630-1024x576.jpg)
- How did you hear about the Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) * Tell us how you heard about the Iglesia Ni Cristo. Searching Online Through a family member or friend On Social Media Other (Please Specify)
- What were you searching for? *
- Other (Please Specify)
- What would you like to learn more about?

### About the Author(S)

## Robert Pellien

Brother Robert (Bob) Pellien has been an ordained minister in the Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) for over 30 years. He grew up a Catholic in Upstate New York. After joining the Air Force in the 1970s, he found himself wondering if there was more to life than motorcycles and scuba diving. It was at that time he was introduced to the Church Of Christ, where the clear and definite Bible-based answers in the worship services caught his attention.

After getting baptized, he and his wife moved to Florida where he was later called into the ministry. Since then he has been assigned to lead congregations of the Church Of Christ around the world. Brother Bob is currently the host of the show That’s in the Bible and INC International Edition.

[All Posts](https://incmedia.org/writer/robert-pellien/)

## Our Purpose

You’ve looked everywhere, trying to find answers to biblical questions, but nothing seems quite right.

Perhaps your pastor or priest just tells you to “believe” instead of giving you an answer from the Bible.

Or maybe you’re too afraid to question them because you’ve been discouraged from asking?

Well, you’ve come to the right place.

## Find Answers to Your Biblical Questions

At INCMedia.org, our purpose is to inspire you to:

- See life beyond everyday routines and struggles
- Understand God’s plan for eternal life
- Start your spiritual journey to biblical truth today

## Why Seekers Chose the Church Of Christ

![collage of workers from incmedia working on different tasks](https://2022incmediaorg.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/04/02203938/INCMS-BTS-04-1024x576.jpg)

## What is INC Media?

INC Media is a media section under Christian Era Broadcasting Services International, Inc. It’s comprised of creatives and Ministers of the Gospel who work diligently to bring you the inspiration and biblical truth you have been looking for.

Launched on October 31, 2011, this official website of the Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) was created by Christians who have all decided to dedicate their lives in helping seekers find God’s truth in this chaotic world. From videos, articles, and blogs, this site is a collection of Bible-based answers and spiritual tools for people just like you, who are on the journey toward finding truth and fulfillment.

Led by the Executive Minister of the Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ), Brother Eduardo V. Manalo, and Brother Angelo Eraño Manalo, the President and CEO of Christian Era Broadcasting International, INC Media Services has grown from our headquarters in Burlingame, California to satellite offices in Anaheim, Toronto, Florida, Washington, D.C., London, Hawaii, and Vancouver.

![The freshly renovated Iglesia Ni Cristo worship building in Surrey, BC with its newly added steeples, brightly lit by the afternoon sun.](https://2022incmediaorg.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/08/02201000/XL-1920x1080_PIO_BC_Surrey_Chapel_Dedication.jpg)

## About the Iglesia Ni Cristo

The *Iglesia Ni Cristo*or Church Of Christ is a Christian religion whose primary purpose is to worship the Almighty God in a manner taught by the Lord Jesus Christ and His apostles as recorded in the Bible.

The Church Of Christ is a Church for all people. It is for everyone who will embrace the true faith regardless of race, nationality, cultural background, social standing, economic status, and educational attainment.

As of today, the Iglesia Ni Cristo has an international membership comprising 149 racial and ethnic backgrounds. It maintains nearly 7,000 congregations and missions grouped into more than 178 ecclesiastical districts in 161 countries and territories in the six inhabited continents of the world.

## History

![black and white illustration drawing of Felix Y. Manalo](https://2022incmediaorg.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/03/02202346/dc930bfc-xl-ie-what-we-believe-about-brother-felix-y-manalo-01-1024x576.jpg)

The Iglesia Ni Cristo was preached by Brother Felix Y. Manalo, God’s Messenger in these last days, and was registered in the Philippines on July 27, 1914.

From its first local congregation in Punta, Santa Ana, Manila, the Church quickly spread not only throughout the metropolis but also to the neighboring provinces in Luzon and across the islands of Visayas and Mindanao.
When Brother Felix Y. Manalo passed away on April 12, 1963, the Church had already established ecclesiastical districts in more than half of all the provinces in the country.

In 1968, the Church, led by Brother Erano G. Manalo, the Executive Minister then, successively established the first two local congregations outside the Philippines–Honolulu, Hawaii and San Francisco, California in the USA. Thus began the Church’s expansion in the Far West and eventually around the world.

Through the leadership of its present Executive Minister, Brother Eduardo V. Manalo, the Church continues to progress and succeed. Its membership has been constantly increasing.

Why learn the Bible? What are your beliefs? Learn about common questions.

## How to Become a Member of the Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ)

### Share

[Ask a Question](/contact/)

## We're so glad you're here!

The Lord Jesus Christ is the One who established the process of entering or becoming a member of His Church. A person must first be taught or preached the Gospel by those whom He authorized or sent to preach the gospel. Those who believe in the teachings must be baptized into the Church Of Christ.

### Take your next steps based on the Bible

The Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) implements the process established by Christ. A person must follow these steps to become a member:

### Step 1: Learn the Teachings

Learn the basic Bible teachings upheld in the Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ) through Bible Study lessons

![](https://2022incmediaorg.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/05/02193239/Member_Step02.png)

### Step 2: Have Patience & Faith

Undergo a probation period during which a person is able to prove that he truly believes through obedience to the teachings of the Bible.

### Step 3: Be Baptized

Be baptized into the Church Of Christ.

## Interested In Becoming A Member?

Please fill out form below and we’ll help guide you in the process. All forms field marked with * are required.

How Did You Hear About the Iglesia Ni Cristo (Church Of Christ)? Select One Invited by a friend or relative Searching online for answers to Bible questions Passed by a worship building in my city Saw a post on social media Other Other (Please specify) First Name Last Name Email City Country Timezone (to set up a convenient time to meet you via video conferencing) Dateline Standard Time (GMT-12:00) International Date Line West Samoa Standard Time (GMT-11:00) Midway Island, Samoa Hawaiian Standard Time (GMT-10:00) Hawaii Alaskan Standard Time (GMT-09:00) Alaska Pacific Standard Time (GMT-08:00) Pacific Time (US and Canada); Tijuana Mountain Standard Time (GMT-07:00) Mountain Time (US and Canada) Mexico Standard Time 2 (GMT-07:00) Chihuahua, La Paz, Mazatlan U.S. Mountain Standard Time (GMT-07:00) Arizona Central Standard Time (GMT-06:00) Central Time (US and Canada Canada Central Standard Time (GMT-06:00) Saskatchewan Mexico Standard Time (GMT-06:00) Guadalajara, Mexico City, Monterrey Central America Standard Time (GMT-06:00) Central America Eastern Standard Time (GMT-05:00) Eastern Time (US and Canada) U.S. Eastern Standard Time (GMT-05:00) Indiana (East) S.A. I AM INTERESTED IN BECOMING A MEMBER

### FAQ on the process of becoming a member of the Church Of Christ

How long does it take to be baptized? To become a member?

The shortest amount of time it can take to be baptized inside the Church Of Christ is 6 months.

I’ve attended Bible studies before. How can I sign up again?

Set up a time to meet with a minister of the gospel here, so we can help you get started again with attending Bible studies.

Can I join the INC if my parents or family members don’t approve of me joining the Church? (For minors, teens under 18)

If you are under 18 years old, you will need parental approval before signing up as a Bible student.

I have a friend that I want to invite / that wants to learn more. Can you help me?

We actually have a process in place to help non-members, like your friend, learn more about the Church Of Christ and guide them to hopefully attend a Bible study or worship service. I suggest letting your friend know that the Church Of Christ welcomes questions and to drop us a line on incmedia.org: [https://incmedia.org/study-with-us/](https://incmedia.org/study-with-us/).

What is the dress code for worship service?

For events like worship services and Bible studies, we wear “holy array.” We wear clean, conservative clothes (no jeans or sneakers, skirts or dresses for the women) fitting to the holy occasion.

Can I attend worship service online?

Worship services were conducted online only during lockdown, due to Covid-19. Worship services are regularly conducted in-person at the nearest place of worship.

How long does it take to be baptized in the Church Of Christ?

The shortest amount of time it can take to be baptized inside the Church Of Christ is 6 months. The process includes listening to the 28 Bible study lessons regarding the Basic Bible Teachings and consistently for 6 months.

### incmedia.org

Christian Media: Where Truth Meets You

## Blogs

### Share

[Ask a Question](/contact/)

## Is God Working in Your Life?

See how God is at work in your life, using all things for good. Read stories from individuals who experienced blessings through the hardships they faced. ![Portrait of Janlynn Valerio](https://2022incmediaorg.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/02191606/j.valerio.jpg)

## Janlynn Valerio

[READ MORE](https://incmedia.org/is-god-working-in-your-life/)

## Maintaining Friendships as a Young Christian

Keeping adult friendships is hard. Get tips on connecting and maintaining friendships through shared faith, vulnerability, and making time for friends. ![headshot of a woman named Hanna wearing gold dress](https://2022incmediaorg.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/30221820/hanna-headshot.jpg)

## Hannah Limon

[READ MORE](https://incmedia.org/maintaining-friendships-as-a-young-christian/)

## Adjusting to Change

New home, school, friends, and big changes...how overwhelming! Read about how different families deal with change and learn how to call a place “home.” ![](https://2022incmediaorg.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/22164025/Macy.png)

## Macy Nucup-Padilla

![Jeffrey de Guia](https://2022incmediaorg.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/11/17181033/photo_2022-08-18_20-26-39.jpg)

## Jeffrey de Guia

[READ MORE](https://incmedia.org/adjusting-to-change/)

## Preparing for Marriage the Christian Way

Getting engaged is an exciting time in a couples’ relationship, but there can also be anxiousness and uncertainty. Many wonder how to proceed and what the next steps are. What are important things to consider when preparing for marriage? ![](https://2022incmediaorg.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/10/26160231/20210928_110902-scaled.jpg)

## Myrtle Alegado

[READ MORE](https://incmedia.org/preparing-for-marriage-the-christian-way/)

## COLLEGE LIFE: EXPECTATIONS VS REALITY

Expectations rarely match reality, especially in college. A recent graduate shares the lessons she learned about her faith while attending university. ![Taylor Joy Lagpacan](https://2022incmediaorg.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/08/07163251/PJR_4904_Square-scaled.jpg)

## Taylor Joy Lagpacan

## Let Go of Comparison and Embrace YOUR Journey

Ever compare yourself to others? Time to stop and find a happier path. A young woman shares how focusing on God's plan can lead to real fulfillment. ![Portrait of Kez Gutierrez, young woman smiling](https://2022incmediaorg.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/08/31204457/photo_2023-07-22_00-45-11.jpg)

## Kez Gutierrez

[READ MORE](https://incmedia.org/let-go-of-comparison-and-embrace-your-journey/)

## 25 Life Lessons Learned By 25

A young Christian shares the lessons learned as she approached her quarter-life crisis and the reality of turning 25 after passing the milestone birthday. ![Portrait of Nicole Custodio](https://2022incmediaorg.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/08/03210311/nikki-square.jpg)

## Nicole Custodio

[READ MORE](https://incmedia.org/25-life-lessons-learned-by-25/)

## What to Say (And Share) About the Trinity

Use this set of conversation-starters to talk about the Trinity with your friends and family. It’s a great way to learn (and share) the truth about God. ![text graphic, "incmedia"](https://2022incmediaorg.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/05/02195602/incms-logo-igram.jpg)

## INC Media Services

[READ MORE](https://incmedia.org/what-to-say-and-share-about-the-trinity/)

## Parent POV: Dealing With Tantrums and Meltdowns

The developing mind of a child inevitably involves some very big feelings. What's a parent to do when tantrums and meltdowns push them to the limit? ![Jeffrey de Guia](https://2022incmediaorg.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/11/17181033/photo_2022-08-18_20-26-39.jpg)

## Jeffrey de Guia

![Portrait of Denise Alignay](https://2022incmediaorg.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/08/02191618/d.alignay-scaled.jpg)

## Denise Alignay

![](https://2022incmediaorg.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/22164025/Macy.png)

## Macy Nucup-Padilla

[READ MORE](https://incmedia.org/parent-pov-dealing-with-tantrums-and-meltdowns/)

Quiet quitting, burnout, feeling blah...you may have felt it too! See how a change in perspective helped a woman overcome languishing to start flourishing! ![](https://2022incmediaorg.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/10/03172434/Barreda_Michelle-1x1-1.jpg)

## Michelle Barreda

## Compartiendo La Alegría Como Miembro de la Iglesia De Cristo

Un testimonio de Merli de Colombia y la alegría que le inspira a invitar a más gente a conocer la verdad bíblica y vivir la fe en la Iglesia De Cristo.
- [Christian Living](https://incmedia.org/tag/christian-living/), [Christian Relationships](https://incmedia.org/tag/christian-relationships/)

Play Higher ResolutionPlay Lower Resolution[Download Video](#elementor-action%3Aaction%3Dpopup%3Aopen%26settings%3DeyJpZCI6IjQ5MDMxIiwidG9nZ2xlIjpmYWxzZX0%3D)[Ask a Question](/contact/)Click to expand transcript

## Compartiendo la alegría como miembro de la Iglesia De Cristo

**Merli:**Mi nombre es Merli de Rosario Tapias Leal. Nací en Lorica, Córdoba de San Sebastián, Colombia. Un pueblito de aquí a unos tres tres días para la costa. Aquí en Bogotá tenemos ocho años viviendo con toda mi familia.

**Merli:**Cuando pequeña mi mamá nos llevó a mis hermanos, a mis dos hermanos y a mí nos llevo pequeña para Venezuela por la situación. Y con la situación que tuvo aquí, porque aquí Colombia tuvo la situación [era] fea, muy feísima y nos fuimos. Mi mamá tuvo que vender su casita para llevarnos para allá para Venezuela. Y de allá hasta se puso la situación mala y nos regresamos otra vez. Cuando ya yo tenía conocimiento, ellos no inculcaron ese conocimiento de la Palabra de Dios. Mi padre, a lo que yo sabía de ellos nunca nos inculcaron Iglesia Católica, sino evangélica.

**Merli:**Los valores que ella nos enseñó era, ir los domingos, ir a un culto dominical que hacían en el pueblito donde nosotros nos criamos. Íbamos a una iglesia, yo pequeña escuchaba que de Cristo, de Dios nos enseñaban mucho de la Palabra de Dios. Y ella nos inculcaba mucho hacer el bien, ser personas de buena, de buen consentimiento y llegarnos a Dios, llegarnos a Dios. Ella nos daba, nos inculcaba de la [Palabra de Dios](https://incmedia.org/es-la-biblia-la-palabra-de-dios/).

**Merli:**Cuando nosotros nos fuimos de aquí de Venezuela, íbamos porque nuestros padres iban los domingos para la iglesia. Pero a lo que llegamos a Venezuela no de ir a la iglesia.

**Merli:**¿Cuando llegamos acá no conocíamos. No conocíamos. Y yo estaba esperando, esperando y yo le decía Dios mío! ¿Para dónde? ¿Para dónde [iglesia aquí en Bogotá](https://incmedia.org/la-iglesia-de-cristo-en-bogota/)voy a congregarme? ¿Para donde? Porque yo en otras religiones las otras veía era que decían, leían una parte, ellos se basaban, leían un versículo y entonces empezaban a decir de lo de ellos, de las experiencias de ellos. Pero por eso le digo que gracias a Dios el hermano Francis pasó ese día.

**Merli:**Yo personalmente le preguntaba era al hermano Francis y a su esposo, “Hermano, mire esto.” Señor, me respondía muy bien hermano, por la palabra, por la por la Biblia. Y buscábamos hermano, él buscaba y me decía “Mira, hermana, así es, ven”, entonces yo iba aprendiendo por medio de eso. Y él me hizo esta invitación y yo fui. Cuando me invitó hermano, yo sentí una alegría, yo sentí una alegría, porque yo dije bueno, ya vamos a conocer una iglesia, esa actividad muy bonita, muy linda.

**Merli:**El hermano Juan habló de la Iglesia de Cristo y tuvo una predicación muy linda, muy bonita, que llegó, fue corta, pero llegó a los corazones de cada uno y ahí quedé yo, flechada, como vamos a decir flechada, pues con la palabra que que el hermano Juan tuvo ese día. Lo que me gusta es porque se basan en la Biblia. No inventan, no inventan su propia inspiración, sino de la Biblia.

**Merli:**Eso es lo que me ha gustado y me gusta porque todo lo que hacen es por la palabra de Dios y por la Biblia. Primeramente la bendición que nosotros recibimos de ellos fue esa, la palabra de Dios. Ellos nos invitaban, invitaban a los servicios, y segundo salíamos hermano, nos compartíamos con ellos, íbamos, ellos decían vamos a invitar, invitábamos y nos íbamos, salíamos a compartir con ellos, muy bonito, muy lindo, nuestros hermanos.

**Merli:**. Mi membresía allí es primeramente dar ejemplo a los demás hermanos. A los demás, dar el ejemplo, invitar hermanos, invitar para que ellos también conozcan la verdadera Iglesia De Cristo. Eso es la membresía que yo más anhelo en la Iglesia De Cristo estar llevando y llevando personas para que ellos también [conozcan la verdad](https://incmedia.org/es/iglesia-de-cristo-conozcanos/).

**Merli:**Una esperanza, una alegría. Bueno, no tengo ni palabra con qué explicarlo, el hermano una esperanza tan linda. Una esperanza tan linda con [esa esperanza de nuestro Señor Dios](https://incmedia.org/la-iglesia-de-cristo-es-la-ultima-esperanza/).

### Solo Biblia, Sin Tradición: Así Encontré La Verdadera Fe

## Creative Christian Planner 2026

You know your goals. You know your needs.

Now it’s time to build your Creative Christian Planner to make it your most productive year ever.

## Option 1: Select a Pre-Assembled Planner Design

Each download includes a front cover design, planner pages and back cover assembled for easy printing at home, or take it to a professional printer.

![](https://2022incmediaorg.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/03164608/THMB-CC26-PKG-STAR_PATCH-001-JS-001-300x300.jpg)

## Star Patch

This download has the Star Patch cover, the inside pages, and the back cover already assembled for easy printing.

[DOWNLOAD](https://storage.googleapis.com/incmedia-org-misc/downloads/creative-christian-planner/2026/packages/CC2526-CVR-STAR-PATCH-PKG_V2.pdf)![](https://2022incmediaorg.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/03164555/THMB-CC26-PKG-ECHO-001-JS-001-300x300.jpg)

## Echo

This download has the Echo cover, the inside pages, and the back cover already assembled for easy printing.

[DOWNLOAD](https://storage.googleapis.com/incmedia-org-misc/downloads/creative-christian-planner/2026/packages/CC2526-CVR-ECHO-PKG_V2.pdf)![](https://2022incmediaorg.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/03164621/THMB-CC26-PKG-CLIMBER-001-JS-001-300x300.jpg)

## Climber

This download has the Climber cover, the inside pages, and the back cover already assembled for easy printing.

[DOWNLOAD](https://storage.googleapis.com/incmedia-org-misc/downloads/creative-christian-planner/2026/packages/CC2526-CVR-CLIMBER-PKG_V2.pdf)![](https://2022incmediaorg.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/03164618/THMB-CC26-PKG-CHAPEL_SKY-001-JS-001-300x300.jpg)

## Chapel Sky

This download has the Chapel Sky cover, the inside pages, and the back cover already assembled for easy printing.

[DOWNLOAD](https://storage.googleapis.com/incmedia-org-misc/downloads/creative-christian-planner/2026/packages/CC2526-CVR-CHAPEL_SKY-PKG_V3.pdf)![](https://2022incmediaorg.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/03164611/THMB-CC26-PKG-STICKERS-001-JS-001-300x300.jpg)

## Stickers

This download has the Stickers cover, the inside pages, and the back cover already assembled for easy printing.

[DOWNLOAD](https://storage.googleapis.com/incmedia-org-misc/downloads/creative-christian-planner/2026/packages/CC2526-CVR-STICKERS-PKG_V2.pdf)![](https://2022incmediaorg.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/03164615/THMB-CC26-PKG-BLUEPRINT-001-JS-001-300x300.jpg)

## Blueprint

This download has the Blueprint cover, the inside pages, and the back cover already assembled for easy printing.

[DOWNLOAD](https://storage.googleapis.com/incmedia-org-misc/downloads/creative-christian-planner/2026/packages/CC2526-CVR-BLUEPRINT-PKG_V2.pdf)![](https://2022incmediaorg.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/03164605/THMB-CC26-PKG-MTN_LAKE-001-JS-001-300x300.jpg)

## Mountain Lake

This download has the Mountain Lake cover, the inside pages, and the back cover already assembled for easy printing.

[DOWNLOAD](https://storage.googleapis.com/incmedia-org-misc/downloads/creative-christian-planner/2026/packages/CC2526-CVR-MTN_LAKE-PKG_V2.pdf)![](https://2022incmediaorg.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/03164601/THMB-CC26-PKG-LAMB-001-JS-001-300x300.jpg)

## Lamb

This download has the Lamb cover, the inside pages, and the back cover already assembled for easy printing.

[DOWNLOAD](https://storage.googleapis.com/incmedia-org-misc/downloads/creative-christian-planner/2026/packages/CC2526-CVR-LAMB-PKG_V2.pdf)

## Option 2: Make It Your Own​

Maybe all you need is a new cover. Or just want the new inside pages? You can print your own Creative Christian planner by downloading only the pieces you need!

Covers, inside pages and back cover are available as separate downloads below.

## Multiple Design Covers to Choose From​

Just need a front cover for your planner? Each design is 5.5in x 8.5in (Can be enlarged to fit 8.5in x 11in). Don’t forget to download the back cover!

![](https://2022incmediaorg.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/03164519/CC26_Cover_StarPatch-300x300.jpg)

## Cover: Star Patch

A glimpse into the realities of daily life; balancing it all while always putting God first.

[DOWNLOAD](https://storage.googleapis.com/incmedia-org-misc/downloads/creative-christian-planner/2026/covers/CC2526-CVR-STAR-PATCH.pdf)![](https://2022incmediaorg.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/03164542/CC26_Cover_Echo-300x300.jpg)

## Cover: Echo

While every year might seem just like the rest, this is a reminder that 2026 can stand out and be brightest you’ve had.

[DOWNLOAD](https://storage.googleapis.com/incmedia-org-misc/downloads/creative-christian-planner/2026/covers/CC2526-CVR-ECHO.pdf)![](https://2022incmediaorg.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/03164538/CC26_Cover_Climber-300x300.jpg)

## Cover: Climber

The tallest mountains are no deterrent for the climber who secures themself in God’s words.

[DOWNLOAD](https://storage.googleapis.com/incmedia-org-misc/downloads/creative-christian-planner/2026/covers/CC2526-CVR-CLIMBER.pdf)![](https://2022incmediaorg.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/03164533/CC26_Cover_ChapelSky-300x300.jpg)

## Cover: Chapel Sky

Sending our eyes skyward; ponder on the unique, yet familiar, architecture of houses of worship.

[DOWNLOAD](https://storage.googleapis.com/incmedia-org-misc/downloads/creative-christian-planner/2026/covers/CC2526-CVR-CHAPEL_SKY_V2.pdf)![](https://2022incmediaorg.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/03164524/CC26_Cover_Stickers-300x300.jpg)

## Cover: Stickers

For the world traveler and all those we come across in our journeys. Perfect to track who you met, and where.

[DOWNLOAD](https://storage.googleapis.com/incmedia-org-misc/downloads/creative-christian-planner/2026/covers/CC2526-CVR-STICKERS.pdf)![](https://2022incmediaorg.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/03164529/CC26_Cover_Blueprint-300x300.jpg)

## Cover: Blueprint

Everything in God’s design, and in God’s time; from our schedule to the big builds in life.

[DOWNLOAD](https://storage.googleapis.com/incmedia-org-misc/downloads/creative-christian-planner/2026/covers/CC2526-CVR-BLUEPRINT.pdf)![](https://2022incmediaorg.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/03164514/CC26_Cover_MountainLake-300x300.jpg)

## Cover: Mountain Lake

A relaxing vista of two of God’s great creations: the mountains and the lakes.

[DOWNLOAD](https://storage.googleapis.com/incmedia-org-misc/downloads/creative-christian-planner/2026/covers/CC2526-CVR-MTN_LAKE.pdf)![](https://2022incmediaorg.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/03164551/CC26_Cover_Lamb-300x300.jpg)

## Cover: Lamb

Perfect for the INC Kid or young-at-heart in your family. A reminder that we are all sheep in a fold.

[DOWNLOAD](https://storage.googleapis.com/incmedia-org-misc/downloads/creative-christian-planner/2026/covers/CC2526-CVR-LAMB.pdf)

## Inside Pages

Already have a cover? Then these are the inside pages of the planner you’ll need next. You can even print extra copies of your favorite pages.

[DOWNLOAD](https://storage.googleapis.com/incmedia-org-misc/downloads/creative-christian-planner/2026/CCP_26-001-JS-010b.pdf)![](https://2022incmediaorg.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/03170402/Inside-Pages-300x300.jpg)

## Back Cover

Brought to you by INC Media Services and CEBSI, here’s the classic blue back cover for any Creative Christian Planner.

[DOWNLOAD](https://storage.googleapis.com/incmedia-org-misc/downloads/creative-christian-planner/2026/CCP_2026_BackCover.pdf)![](https://2022incmediaorg.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/03170418/CC25-26_BackCover_Thumbnail-300x300.jpg)[Back to Creative Christian Planner Home](https://incmedia.org/creative-christian-planner)![incmedia logo icon](https://2022incmediaorg.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/03/02195630/cropped-cropped-icon-incmedia.png)

Christian Media: Where Truth Meets You

- [BLOG](/blogs/)

## Devote Yourself in Prayer and See What Happens

Discover how devoting yourself to prayer can change your life. See how God answers, learn to pray consistently, and keep track of His responses in your jou ![woman praying in a church](https://2022incmediaorg.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/10121950/WOMAN-PRAYING-DEVOTIONAL-1024x576.jpg)[Ask a Question](/contact/)

Have you heard the story about the young dad who needed a heart transplant and found a match in 6 days?

How about the cute love story about a woman who prayed to God to help her find the love of her life?  After weeks of praying she realized he was right under her nose.

There’s also the story of a lost and confused young woman who was broken by trauma and found a way to manage her healing through the Church Of Christ.

All of these great stories are proof that God answers prayers.

## But remember, God answers according to His will

So I wondered quietly to myself, why was God not answering a specific thing I prayed for?

I had been praying for a while about it and maybe I wasn’t consistent, but I was earnest and hopeful.

*“I know why your prayers haven’t been answered yet…”*

My friend’s words stopped me in my tracks because it was such a random comment and I let my friend continue.

*“…maybe it’s because you’re too impatient.  Give it time.  Also, have you tried setting a set time for your prayer?”*

![man praying in the pews](https://2022incmediaorg.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/10121944/praying_MMercado-0932-1024x683.jpg)

## God loves to help those who rely on and trust in Him

Growing up in the Church Of Christ we’re taught that if we really want God’s guidance for something important in our lives then one of the things we can do is to conduct regular prayers because it shows God that we rely on Him.

There was a Verse of the Week published by INC Media on Youtube that reminds us of this.

## Why are prayers important?

Perhaps my friend was right? Maybe I was too impatient and praying out of routine.

So, I held my own prayer at the same time for one week.  I got my answer.  Then, I held another one until I got an answer.  Then, I held another one, and God continued to respond. And now 10 years later, I’m still praying regularly.  I’m a believer in prayers and here are the things I have learned.

- **God answers His****faithful****children. Not everyone’s prayers are answered.**But those whom God recognizes as His faithful children are the ones who can hope to receive the answer to their prayers. So that’s number one. The second thing is God communicates in a way He knows you will understand. So pay attention to His answer. Prepare yourself to be emotionally and spiritually ready to respond to His answer. And finally, those who can hope to receive the answer to their prayers should be doing what is pleasing to God.
- **Don’t stop praying.**In our worship service lessons, we’re told that God will never get tired of hearing our prayers, as long as we are always obedient and follow His commandments or instructions .  We’re always going to need guidance, so keep on praying. And never doubt that God has the power to answer our prayers.

- **Be devoted to your prayers.****It’s important for us to maintain our firm relationship with God**.  It’s kinda like how we continue to work on our relationships with our friends, family, and loved ones, and one of the ways we can prove that we value our relationship is by spending time with God through praying.

- **Keep a record of all the ways God answers.**Like I said, God answers His faithful children who follow His commands ; I can’t promise you it will be the answer YOU want, but it will be the answer that is right in the eyes of God, so keep a prayer journal.  Take note of the ways He answers.

## Prayers are powerful and not just for life-or-death situations.

As a content creator for incmedia.org, I’ve heard people share their wonderful stories about their favorite answered prayers.

## Put God to the test

Todd Brown was featured on Stories of Faith because he shared his journey to finding the true faith.  When he was a Bible student, he learned the right way to pray and wanted to give it a try.

[Todd Brown](https://incmedia.org/doing-the-right-thing/)simply needed a car.  “ *I was in the worship service one evening. In the lesson, the minister asked, “Put God to the test.” So I’m like, “Okay.” Well I needed a car at the time. And I previously was in a dealership earlier that day trying to negotiate for a car and the price just wouldn’t come together.”*

![Man staring up with the bridge in background](https://2022incmediaorg.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/10121928/man-profile-near-bridge.jpg)

*And then literally, when I came out of worship service there was a voicemail on my phone from the car dealership. It was like, “Oh, Mr. Brown, you know, we couldn’t get the car you want but we got something different, that we were able to approve, all the paperwork is done, you can pick it  up tomorrow morning.” And I was like, “Alright, alright.” I promised that if I get this car, then I’ll have more mobility and I can not only do my work, but I could go to every worship service and be consistent.”*

## Seek to put God first

Kevin Johnson was featured on Blueprint, talked about when he was a Bible student and wanted to see how effective his prayers could be, now that he knew the proper way to pray.

![man in black shirt smiling talking to another man](https://2022incmediaorg.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/10121931/man-smiling-1024x578.jpg)![two two men walking in front of chapel in vegas](https://2022incmediaorg.storage.googleapis.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/10121947/two-men-front-chapel-1024x566.jpg)

[Kevin Johnson](https://incmedia.org/building-a-life-of-purpose-in-las-vegas/)was looking for a place to live. *But when I was a Bible student,*[I prayed](https://incmedia.org/prayer/)*to be closer to the chapel so I can attend Bible studies and so I can be able to be active in all the Church activities.  So I prayed for this, I prayed to be close to the chapel and God answered my prayers…I’m like right here. It’s a great blessing because*[I’m so close to the chapel](https://incmedia.org/finding-peace-in-a-church-of-christ-place-of-worship/)*that every activity, you cannot miss.”*

## God answers prayers. But He has requirements.

Maybe the only thing that’s keeping you from making a decision or finding a solution is earnestly praying to God. And maybe what’s stopping you from starting is understanding exactly what it means to devote yourself in prayer.

You can start by learning what the Bible says about [answered prayers in this video](https://incmedia.org/how-to-receive-answers-from-god/). This video answers

- Why doesn’t God answer my prayers? Is God slow to answer or is silence actually His loudest response?
- What does it mean to have a prayer of faith? Could believing without doubting be the secret to receiving God’s blessings?
- When does God answer prayers? What if obeying God’s commands is the key to unlocking His responses?

Then set up a time to [speak with a minister of the gospel of the Church Of Christ](https://incmedia.org/contact/). You can ask questions about God’s requirements for answered prayers, how to pray and even get real life examples from the Bible of servants of God who have seen their prayers answered by God.

Written by Jan Valerio a staff writer at INCmedia.org. The blog also got doctrinal input from ministers of the gospel, Brother Bob Pellien, Brother Joe Velasquez and Brother Richie Juatco.

### About the Author(S)

## Janlynn Valerio

Janlynn Valerio is a staff writer, producer, and editor at INCmedia.org and considers it her dream job because she helps to create content that proves God exists in our lives. Born and raised in Hawaii, she continues to wear slippers even through the Bay Area winters.

[All Posts](https://incmedia.org/writer/janlynn-valerio/)
